name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: [PETITION]: STOP Republicans from restricting contraception
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
**[Sign on to REJECT Republican efforts to ban contraceptives!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn-R_qWRa8GACVVbEppDkfwRnHFxnY50meUcRI2FSKBqRQ-RoTLoS5pdRHSW70euC-yNGn1SoISRZzH2bkqK7jbGgTyw-E67bJwvxqZHcw4Zl6UgyU9Kucl8kSgqQT9YB6lqfnTSouEMPAw6FD-K9btrM0Syhl8fO5lkU09yfi3uO5TNPDqJfLS-eZkamiTBc6bAc0ucu2Tui3ywty8c_FhECzLLEFrvTUPBrzDGzqBZWtrH_P26kOdJTbKWEC7cnBYwLnDf1j4mFCDLMEFJYtgazd69YwvV_HvvUlgNU_mhfURklGGIXJ72MIlpsvGt4q4NRjf2HilMSjEsJFoKh954r4pgrExc8uV7fynqSVzi_-uXnPxdxO2eerHN-KRp3aonOFf2W65aDH0pfpR22AlG7iSEETWpAEfpz7-emXuXA/43y/cJa_Up6rTO2Ir-wuVKcbig/h0/vLkASP5iLVlAmTiZIv8dVcqtU-WoCYY99Nc1cZ73bRI)**
* * *
Peter, they don’t want you to know it, but Republicans have a long history of attacking contraception, and by all indications, they aren’t going to let up.

When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , stripping the right to access abortion, Justice Clarence Thomas opined that the Court should reconsider its long-standing rulings, including _Griswold v. Connecticut -_ the right to contraception.
**Folks, that’s a DIRECT threat. And it is backed up by the words and voting records of the Republicans.**
_Pro-choice champion Derek Marshall is running for Congress to represent California’s 23rd District. He is fighting to fortify the foundation of reproductive rights, including access to abortion and contraception._
__**[FIGHT BACK! Sign the petition to OPPOSE Republican efforts to erode our fundamental right to reproductive freedom!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn-R_qWRa8GACVVbEppDkfwRnHFxnY50meUcRI2FSKBqRQ-RoTLoS5pdRHSW70euC-yNGn1SoISRZzH2bkqK7jbGgTyw-E67bJwvxqZHcw4Zl6UgyU9Kucl8kSgqQT9YB6lqfnTSouEMPAw6FD-K9btu8E5qbY6ZNUa_x9eksfStdoutGFITm9YYmu1-NFSzFCFa3KsbQJ0hniyIGMBiWjZ7OqwnDFcwbJUauj3M7tpYxT87CrZ9Oad-xB8fAkebSdKnKOSZHpcHhZXA0qXPGZp_aOQ4YzA56rNZvHeSH1V66Tf0UVrn8TE7A8NVof1qvRKv9f0OrIvgHCJC12FXf4OTOZYH4NhCO5fR6mzhKW5tl4HUQoz8KQuupvAxoKM-UeroTNu3-KRbFN2dkLVNhETkKXL3W81OUkz6zc92therQ/43y/cJa_Up6rTO2Ir-wuVKcbig/h1/lNfQO4NXqFWPZO_NFjXCfjJnvKkRQwb1BUqvtXSqJmc)** [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn-R_qWRa8GACVVbEppDkfwRnHFxnY50meUcRI2FSKBqRQ-RoTLoS5pdRHSW70euC-yNGn1SoISRZzH2bkqK7jbGgTyw-E67bJwvxqZHcw4Zl6UgyU9Kucl8kSgqQT9YB6lqfnTSouEMPAw6FD-K9bt5u14Aw8j6wG-GKRZhobzox75WUWJdPPly4W0kTvWkY3oXr5JFUkAOWnDuA3Xz2EZrGIpUNkqMxmTkdIT-mlv0Qu3tY0Tq1I2YcY7vwymVqv6OM-r5qDThSBeS1kvtMeacNISBFvNfnCOnB9wXV19O1JGYfMl3LQKiz6XBMtnbc1NNRPKR3fPx_GiV9f9RoDMyEHOu3y3HDDc0iFEnkH2uh_nMX7uTuV38HNiKB0X_k5fI8HA0DmeVmhDiEc0fwmCuxjZcBzUGt1REHvhVIj2cA/43y/cJa_Up6rTO2Ir-wuVKcbig/h2/9UZ1T5PnjU7i75a5x4EDzlYtFWYrwPb7tE49WBIyfvo) After Justice Thomas’ opinion, Republican Senator Marsha Blackburn called _Griswold_ “constitutionally unsound,” and other Republicans have said contraceptive access should be left to the states... sound familiar?
Derek’s opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte, voted against the Right to Contraception Act. He voted with MAGA Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who has made the false claim that the emergency contraceptive Plan B pill aborts a fetus.
**Republicans push harmful policies, disregarding people's rights, health, and well-being for their own interests.**
_In Congress, Derek will fight back to restore and defend reproductive freedom._

clean_body: | | | Peter, they don’t want you to know it, but Republicans have a long history of attacking contraception, and by all indications, they aren’t going to let up. When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , stripping the right to access abortion, Justice Clarence Thomas opined that the Court should reconsider its long-standing rulings, including Griswold v. Connecticut - the right to contraception. Folks, that’s a DIRECT threat. And it is backed up by the words and voting records of the Republicans. Pro-choice champion Derek Marshall is running for Congress to represent California’s 23rd District. He is fighting to fortify the foundation of reproductive rights, including access to abortion and contraception. After Justice Thomas’ opinion, Republican Senator Marsha Blackburn called Griswold “constitutionally unsound,” and other Republicans have said contraceptive access should be left to the states... sound familiar? Derek’s opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte, voted against the Right to Contraception Act. He voted with MAGA Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who has made the false claim that the emergency contraceptive Plan B pill aborts a fetus. Republicans push harmful policies, disregarding people's rights, health, and well-being for their own interests. In Congress, Derek will fight back to restore and defend reproductive freedom. **In solidarity, Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . So while THEY argue over who’s more far-left, let’s make sure WE are building the infrastructure needed to win.

body:
Here are the stakes in NV-04: | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e9ff02ffc41b/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12683273?e=91a702298f)

[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=d0fe587cc3&e=91a702298f)
|
---
Friend,
The past 3 years of extreme Democrat leadership have taken their toll on our state and country.
Over 6 million illegal immigrants – almost double the population of Nevada – have been encountered at our Southern Border in that time.
The rising prices and inflation rates that we’ve seen have led to over half of all Americans now living paycheck to paycheck.
And the Green New Deal policies that have been pushed by the likes of Steven Horsford and Joe Biden have done nothing to lower gas prices – _instead, they’re only selling out our jobs to the CCP._
| [WANT A CHANGE IN LEADERSHIP? CLICK HERE](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=a34d319136&e=91a702298f)
---
As bad as all of that sounds, Friend– _can you imagine what they’ll do with another 4 years in power?_
_**That’s what I’m running to help stop.** If I win this battle_ground race here in Nevada, it’ll mean one less out-of-touch Democrat in charge running our great country into the ground.
But if I’m not successful? Steven Horsford and the Democrats could take back the House...
_...and their party that is moving further Left by the day could gain even MORE control!_
[**Those are the stakes, and that’s why I’m asking for your urgent support. Will you consider a donation of $30 or any amount today so we can bring an end to the failed leadership from the past 3 years?**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=3892e65262&e=91a702298f)
| [DONATE $30](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=e03535e1a9&e=91a702298f)

**Thank you,**_Fmr. Mayor John J. Lee_ Candidate for Congress, NV-04

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: The moment that changed my life forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | **_"Nothing is going to happen to you tonight, not under our watch. "_****
**
---
These were the words the U.S. Marines told me when my family and I were sheltering in the U.S. embassy after American diplomats were taken hostage in Iran.

I was a little kid who had just moved to a foreign country for my father's new job, and I was absolutely terrified

_But in that moment, for the first time in a long time, I felt safe._

_That was the exact moment I knew that when I grew up, I wanted to serve in the military._

Years later, I went on to attend the Naval Academy and serve for 25 years in Special Operations retiring as a U.S. Navy Captain. **
**
---
[](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=02c81f6bebdc49c0b4c2c3a427e31ed6&_e=YeS-_mV5ybG-DTCmQb5n7SsjyigZYWZXW-DaTn8It-LckJ-K7cUMFEWNaTwLbmWIObM2AyvhqCRoJTX1WMyn4gq32LVITWCoWg2pOdmObEmBmintcoz1xEOqZpm8yc02xWdZR3udDGHk6NAXAeoYhcHdzKwuFfzdjCCvIrzLMKMt6jw0VjPHasCXKWcHHJ9skciTvBM7G_KyUZzn8Z9HC4DuzS6n9SsobCa_IakHCpHaVsyDpGLV7IbMTNA50sanSQ0lMgEIYm6cLTCe7eXUmrABjkJoxqHC0tdZHY9gtw8%3D)

[**SEND A NAVY VETERAN TO THE SENATE **](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=02c81f6bebdc49c0b4c2c3a427e31ed6&_e=YeS-_mV5ybG-DTCmQb5n7SsjyigZYWZXW-DaTn8It-LckJ-K7cUMFEWNaTwLbmWIObM2AyvhqCRoJTX1WMyn4gq32LVITWCoWg2pOdmObEmBmintcoz1xEOqZpm8yc02xWdZR3udDGHk6NAXAeoYhYEZxl1wmwu9y2TzUj58kBBHy2Ee1Rv7d0hqjeY5NBZw0LqV7EerwWn19N9YiSRq3Wd1hO6aJtoxiYmhZApryd0bQ3wtDKurVIfALV91bm6L8Unc49xXi2hWtMNVOp4xjnhaA5y1WEU4KPAusy1U9hs%3D)
---
Serving our country has been the absolute honor of my life, and I couldn't be more grateful for the opportunity to build a better country for my children and their peers.

_But right now, all of the hard work my fellow servicemembers and I put in is in jeopardy._

**Joe Biden is stripping the same freedoms we fought for. Conservatives are being thrown in prison. The radical Left is telling us what we have to believe - and if we refuse to go along with them, the consequences are****dire.**

I didn't put my life on the line for our country just to watch some career politician smear our legacy. That's why I'm not standing by idly.

**I 'm running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because I believe that America is worth saving, and just like when I was in the Navy, I'll do whatever it takes to keep our country free.**

**[Will you join my team today to take back the Senate, FIRE the Biden-Schumer majority, and get our country back on track?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=02c81f6bebdc49c0b4c2c3a427e31ed6&_e=YeS-_mV5ybG-DTCmQb5n7SsjyigZYWZXW-DaTn8It-LckJ-K7cUMFEWNaTwLbmWIObM2AyvhqCRoJTX1WMyn4gq32LVITWCoWg2pOdmObEmBmintcoz1xEOqZpm8yc02xWdZR3udDGHk6NAXAeoYhVDICIXGM_1USx5HpNoX26Udy5wDWj-OUTcwKgqOfliDT1q42urFVqDlYANrVVRwNe_tQ3ftopbITucfPoNOXj2wQG4NrYLcd-V_07XZfGCtvVioKU9l7NFd3hP56WDHj1NbdVQqXHpD8higIDb-LnU%3D)

clean_body: | | | "Nothing is going to happen to you tonight, not under our watch. " These were the words the U.S. Marines told me when my family and I were sheltering in the U.S. embassy after American diplomats were taken hostage in Iran. I was a little kid who had just moved to a foreign country for my father's new job, and I was absolutely terrified But in that moment, for the first time in a long time, I felt safe. That was the exact moment I knew that when I grew up, I wanted to serve in the military. Years later, I went on to attend the Naval Academy and serve for 25 years in Special Operations retiring as a U.S. Navy Captain. Serving our country has been the absolute honor of my life, and I couldn't be more grateful for the opportunity to build a better country for my children and their peers. But right now, all of the hard work my fellow servicemembers and I put in is in jeopardy. Joe Biden is stripping the same freedoms we fought for. Conservatives are being thrown in prison. The radical Left is telling us what we have to believe - and if we refuse to go along with them, the consequences aredire. I didn't put my life on the line for our country just to watch some career politician smear our legacy. That's why I'm not standing by idly. I 'm running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because I believe that America is worth saving, and just like when I was in the Navy, I'll do whatever it takes to keep our country free. Your support means everything to me. Thank you, Hung Cao Ret. Navy Captain Conservative Candidate in VA TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79224642/455834268/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4819-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNiNjA4Yi1mNWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id2EpgWGKejVhPWaMacgfGZ5tL5u4tF0FeiI-KVy8do=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 14 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York in 2022. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79224643/455834269/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4819-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNiNjA4Yi1mNWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id2EpgWGKejVhPWaMacgfGZ5tL5u4tF0FeiI-KVy8do=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79224649/455834296/1575385346?refcode=jtk4819-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNiNjA4Yi1mNWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id2EpgWGKejVhPWaMacgfGZ5tL5u4tF0FeiI-KVy8do=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79224650/455834303/1575385346?refcode=jtk4819-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNiNjA4Yi1mNWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id2EpgWGKejVhPWaMacgfGZ5tL5u4tF0FeiI-KVy8do=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

_**Jamie Raskin told you**_ the Electoral College is hazardous to democracy,
_**And Elizabeth Warren told you**_ we should eliminate the Electoral College! Good Democrats like you _aren’t_ stepping up to fund our ads to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all! **We can’t believe it!** []() | [_$6,936 TO TURN IT AROUND BEFORE MIDNIGHT TOMORROW:_ CHIP IN $7 TO HELP US FUND OUR AD CAMPAIGN TO ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE AND SUPPORT OUR WORK »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38058?t=7&akid=20832%2E4449941%2EtkamhA)

FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives. Please, consider making a . name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackenzie=20For=20Congress?=
subject: DELLICKER & THE DEMOCRATS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Mackenzie For Congress | | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=0c127b49cb&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
__ Ukraine was big in the news yesterday. The pro-war, America Last crowd continues the push to spend billions of your tax dollars to secure someone else’s border, while doing nothing to secure our own U.S. border. Take a look at what was said just yesterday...
**Joe Biden** : At The White House, he continued to push for billions of dollars for Ukraine, advocated for continued war, and said, **“The failure to support Ukraine at this critical moment will never be forgotten.”**
**Susan Wild** : In an email to constituents, she declared her top priority as **“Rep. Susan Wild Calls on Congress to Support Ukraine.”**
**Kevin Dellicker** : In a radio interview, Forever Wars Kevin Dellicker (who for months has pushed for more war funding in Ukraine) **was asked THREE TIMES where he stands on additional war funding for Ukraine, and he refused to answer the question. **
As a candidate for Congress for over 2 years now, Kevin Dellicker has:
* Lost to Lisa Scheller
* Refused to endorse Scheller (even when she was the Republican nominee against Susan Wild)
* Has repeatedly sided with Biden and Wild saying we need **MORE** war funding for Ukraine
* And now, he has mastered the art of not answering questions

Check out this embarrassing Joe Biden-style answer (yes, this is real audio) after he failed to answer the initial question:
| [LISTEN TO DELLICKER](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=147681e6b4&e=5ccada9200)
---
_***** My questions for Kevin Dellicker: Why do you continue to support the Democrat position of Joe Biden and Susan Wild? When will you support America First policies?*****_
**It is important to elect America First candidates who are clear and consistent in their positions!**
**Ryan Mackenzie’s positions:**
* America first, always.
* Build the wall and secure OUR borders.
* Bring back the border policies of Donald Trump that stopped the flow of illegal immigrants, drugs, and crime into our country.
* Impeach DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. **(DONE)**
* Properly fund our military, so we can achieve peace through strength.
* End the funding of forever wars overseas.

My position, as an America First candidate for Congress, is that Kevin Dellicker should stop siding with Joe Biden, Susan Wild, the warmongering RINOs, and the military industrial complex in Washington DC. If Kevin Dellicker was actually in touch with the people he is seeking to represent, he would know that we are sick and tired of funding the uniparty’s forever wars.
| [DONATE TODAY TO HELP ME PUT AMERICA FIRST!](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=225a4550b4&e=5ccada9200)
---
If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com) or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777.

Build the wall and secure OUR borders. Bring back the border policies of Donald Trump that stopped the flow of illegal immigrants, drugs, and crime into our country. Impeach DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. (DONE) Properly fund our military, so we can achieve peace through strength. End the funding of forever wars overseas. My position, as an America First candidate for Congress, is that Kevin Dellicker should stop siding with Joe Biden, Susan Wild, the warmongering RINOs, and the military industrial complex in Washington DC. If Kevin Dellicker was actually in touch with the people he is seeking to represent, he would know that we are sick and tired of funding the uniparty’s forever wars. | If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777. | | | | | CHECKS CAN BE MAILED Mackenzie For Congress P.O. Make no mistake: Trump’s extremism in the White House opened the doors to roll back voting rights, laid the foundation for the overturn of Roe v. Wade, and cultivated anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric that is now putting our youth at risk.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79224779/455845233/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-02-17_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4YjMwOS1mOWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5X94RH429S56AHOzK3ztjHM5oH-3hMAaDHadp-c9MhM=)

| Donald Trump was just in Michigan campaigning ahead of the Republican primary on February 27th.

**However, he didn’t dare come to West Michigan.** He sees the progress we’ve made here, and he’s scared to come back.

In 2022, we flipped a Republican stronghold and elected the first pro-choice woman to serve in Michigan’s third. As Trump comes in full force for a second term, we need to send a clear message that we won’t tolerate extremism and dysfunction here or anywhere.

Make no mistake: Trump’s extremism in the White House opened the doors to roll back voting rights, laid the foundation for the overturn of Roe v. Wade, and cultivated anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric that is now putting our youth at risk. _**He is a danger to democracy.**_

**And although Trump won’t show his face, my race is still a top target of National Republicans. They know in a swing state like Michigan, control of the White House will come down to who wins in our district.** [_**Will you support my campaign to defeat Trump and set the stage for a victory in November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79224785/455845336/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-02-17_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2E4YjMwOS1mOWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5X94RH429S56AHOzK3ztjHM5oH-3hMAaDHadp-c9MhM=)

subject: it’s not just about our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
stand behind Debbie
| | |
---
Friend, the election year is here. If we want ANY chance of saving our Senate majority this fall, it's time to unhitch the trailer and kick things into high gear.
**And it’s not just about our Senate majority — Rick Scott is one of the biggest threats to our country. Period.**
This guy wrote the plan so extreme even Republicans couldn’t win on it! **He wants to end Social Security, end Medicare, and raise taxes on everyone EXCEPT millionaires. Meanwhile, he’s one of the richest members of Congress.**
**[That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in $5 today to help Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (D) hit her $100,000 end-of-week goal and flip Florida blue this November. This race is our best and possibly our ONLY chance of saving the Senate majority and beating one of the worst politicians in America.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79225575/455852727/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk818-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ1NTVmMjItZmJjZC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=__vJ-k7tDDnHqFGTzdNIxDewwLo_h4C4HY3JXdcs8is=) **

clean_body: stand behind Debbie | | | Friend, the election year is here. If we want ANY chance of saving our Senate majority this fall, it's time to unhitch the trailer and kick things into high gear. And it’s not just about our Senate majority — Rick Scott is one of the biggest threats to our country. Period. This guy wrote the plan so extreme even Republicans couldn’t win on it! He wants to end Social Security, end Medicare, and raise taxes on everyone EXCEPT millionaires. Meanwhile, he’s one of the richest members of Congress. = | | = I've spent half a century fighting to elect Democrats. So trust me when I say this: All signs are pointing to a huge upset in Florida. Scott only won his seat by 0.12%, and his approval ratings are tanking. It's no wonder why election experts rank him as one of the most vulnerable senators in the country — people hate his policies. Debbie is a strong candidate, but in a race like this, cash is king — and Scott has already dumped over $3 million into attack ads. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = If grassroots Democrats like you stand behind Debbie and invest in her campaign, she will win this seat and save our majority. Thanks for your help, James Carville | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. Team Rosen, we’re in trouble. We were counting on a big uptick in fundraising this month. Instead, we’ve had our worst slowdown since Jacky announced her reelection campaign. To tell you the truth, we’re really not sure why ...
Maybe people don’t realize that Senate control came down to just 7,928 votes in Nevada last time – and that we’re expecting this year to be just as close.
Or maybe they haven’t heard that the path to the Senate AND the White House runs through battleground Nevada.
Or maybe they don’t know that Nevada is one of the GOP’s best chances to flip a seat red – and that they’re prepared to spend millions to defeat Jacky.

name: The Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Del. Sewell's Week 6 Session Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/New%20Sewell%20Delegate%20Logo%20.png]
Session Week 6 Newsletter
Dear Neighbor,
Crossover 2024 has come and gone. On Monday, February 12th, we had a marathon session on the floor of the House of Delegates to work through all the remaining legislation that needed to be considered before the final crossover deadline passed on February 13th. All the bills that didn’t pass the House by the Tuesday deadline are now considered defeated and will not move forward. For the last few weeks of session, we in the House of Delegates will only consider bills passed by the state Senate before crossover, and vice versa.
During this session, 737 bills were introduced in the state Senate. Of these bills, 453 passed the full Senate to successfully cross over to the House. In the House,1,547 bills were introduced and 734 passed the House to successfully cross over to the Senate.
Of the bills that I introduced, six bills crossed over to the Senate. Several of my House bills had similar or identical Senate versions, known as “cognates,” that already cleared many of legislative hurdles on the Senate side and will pave an easy path for my bills during the second half of session. I’ve provided details about each of my bills which passed to the Senate in the bills section below.
On Sunday, the House Committee on Appropriations and the Senate Finance & Appropriations Committee will present their respective budget plans, and the process of bringing those two budget proposals into agreement will begin.
Unifying the Governor’s, House, and Senate Budgets
Virginia has a biennial budget which is adopted by the General Assembly in the even-numbered years, and amended by the General Assembly in odd-numbered years. Bills requiring state funds are reviewed by two separate committees in the House of Delegates: the Appropriations Committee (which deals largely with state expenditures) and the Finance Committee (which deals largely with taxation and state revenue). In the Senate, there is just one committee that deals with all state budget issues. That is the Senate Appropriations and Finance Committee.
Budget Process In Full Swing
Much of the detailed budget review in both the House Committee on Appropriations and the Senate Finance & Appropriations Committee occurs at the subcommittee level. Subcommittee recommendations give a good indication of what is likely to carry the day in the final budget. On Sunday, February 18th, the House Appropriations Committee will conduct a special meeting to hear the subcommittee reports. You can listen to the reports beginning at 1:00 PM on Sunday by clicking here [https://virginiageneralassembly.gov/house/chamber/chamberstream.php] and selecting “ Appropriations (Torian, Luke E.) [https://virginiageneralassembly.gov/house/members/members.php?committee=H02] .”
There is so much going on, so I encourage you to stay engaged, and please reach out if you have any questions about what the next few weeks will mean for the rest of the General Assembly Session. Remember that you can track specific bills here [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=lnk&val=02] and follow whether specific budget amendments make it into the final House budget using budget.lis.virginia.gov [https://budget.lis.virginia.gov/] .
Welcome to Richmond! Constituent Engagement and More
Although the week was very busy, I was able to meet with some inspiring and dedicated folks. I always appreciate people and organizations who take the time to visit me in Richmond to advocate for the issues they care about. Never forget that your voice is essential and your feedback is critical!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0424_2.jpg] I took part in the Planned Parenthood Advocates of Virginia [https://www.plannedparenthoodaction.org/planned-parenthood-advocates-virginia-inc/about-us] Lobby Day. As a proud champion of reproductive rights, I was honored to meet with these dedicated advocates to talk about what we must do as a Commonwealth to secure access to this critical healthcare and enshrine this protection in the state Constitution.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0442.jpg] I met with the president of George Mason University (GMU), Gregory Washington, along with representatives of the (GMU) Student Government to discuss ways to lower the cost of tuition and expand student opportunities. [https://sg.gmu.edu/] I enjoyed discussing the steps these young leaders are taking to make their school better and how they hope to continue their leadership in the future.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0457.jpg] I had the privilege of meeting with members of the ARC of Greater Prince William [https://arcgpw.org/] to discuss what can be done at the state level to support individuals with developmental disabilities and their families to help pave the way for growth and independence.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0452.jpg] I would like to thank the students representing Virginia21 [https://virginia21.org/] for visiting my office and talking about increasing access and affordability in higher education and the need to support student leaders. As the Chair of the House Education Subcommittee on Higher Education, hearing directly from engaged and empowered students was invaluable.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0401.jpg] This week, my staff had the opportunity to meet with the Virginia Tech Corps of Cadets [https://vtcc.vt.edu/] to discuss the importance of student leadership and building the next generations of leaders who will serve their communities and the wider world.
Bills
Six of my bills have crossed over to the state Senate after passing the House of Delegates. See below for the current status:
House Bill 731 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb731] , works to fix the leaky teacher pipeline and increase teacher diversity through the elimination of a duplicative, expensive, and out-of-date testing requirement for teachers. This bill passed the House of Delegates unanimously, 99 - 0, on February 13th. It has crossed over to the Senate, but it has not yet been assigned to a committee.
House Bill 732 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb732] , requires schools to stock and train staff on the administration of Naloxone, a life-saving medication, in case of an opioid overdose. This bill was unanimously passed by the House of Delegates (99 - 0) on February 13th. It has crossed over to the Senate, but it has not yet been assigned to a committee.
House Bill 736 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HB736] , protects veterans from predatory Veterans Affairs benefits claim sharks. This bill was passed by the House of Delegates (85 - 13) on February 5th. It has crossed over to the Senate and been referred to the Senate Commerce and Labor Committee.
House Bill 738 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HB738] , ensures all members of the armed forces have access to the same earned benefits no matter their service branch. This bill was unanimously passed by the House of Delegates (99-0) on February 1st and it has already been heard in the Senate, passing through the Senate General Laws and Technology Committee unanimously (15 to 0), on February 14th. This bill was sent to the Senate floor on February 16th and successfully passed through its first constitutional reading.
House Bill 739 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb739] , attempts to address the military child care provider crisis by exempting from duplicative Virginia licensure DOD-licensed family providers which are based on military installations or serve only military families. This bill was unanimously passed by the House of Delegates (96-0) on February 9th and it has already been heard in the Senate, passing through the Senate Education and Health Committee unanimously (13 to 0), on February 14th. This bill was sent to the Senate floor on February 16th and successfully passed through its first constitutional reading.
House Bill 1526 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HB1526] allows the DMV to issue overweight permits for an electric utility's operation of vehicles to allow more efficient uses of utility crews and vehicles and ensure power is returned more quickly during outages. This bill was unanimously passed by the Senate Committee on Transportation on February 15th.
Subcommittees
This week, I chaired a meeting of Counties Cities and Towns Subcommittee #2. Below are the actions we took as we considered legislation sent over from the Senate:
(PASSED) SB9 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+SB9] : Authorizes Orange County to establish a department of real estate assessment and to enter into an agreement with a contiguous county or city to establish a joint department of real estate assessment.
(PASSED) SB134 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+SB134] : Allows the board of supervisors of Craig County to appoint one of its members to the Economic Development Authority of the County of Craig.
(PASSED) SB679 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+SB679] : Provides that any enterprise zone in existence as of June 30, 2024, shall be extended for a period of four years in addition to any renewal periods currently authorized by law.
This Week’s Mailbag
This week was no different than previous weeks. We received a lot of emails about a wide variety of issues. My team and I sincerely appreciate your willingness to share your feedback and ideas with us.
This week, the emails focused on bills crossing over from the Senate to the House and budget amendments which are critically important to members of the community. Topics included budget amendments for child nutrition, group violence intervention, and small businesses. In addition, we received many emails with your perspectives on the bills that dealt with ranked choice voting, as well as the regulation of skill games and utility monitoring.
Your messages continue to inform my thinking on the critical issues facing Virginians, and I truly value your commitment to staying engaged in the important work of passing bills and working together to improve our shared Commonwealth. Remember that you can always email my office at DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov [DelBSewell@hous.virginia.gov] or call us at 703-261-4787.
Stay In Touch!
Now that crossover has come and gone, the House is focused on considering all the bills that have come over from the Senate. Next week, we’ll also finalize the budget discussions which will occur this weekend. With so many important things taking place, I encourage you to stay in contact with my team and reach out with thoughts, concerns, and suggestions.
You can email my office at DelBSewell@house.virginia.gov [DelBSewell@hous.virginia.gov] , call us at 703-261-4787, or visit in person at the General Assembly Building. The address is 201 North 9th St., Suite 905, Richmond, VA 23219.
Take care, and I look forward to speaking soon!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/headingcommunitybill%20%281%29.png]
Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell.
Friends of Briana Sewell
PO Box 1849
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDPKPY_4S0izjMklQV7G1w2?unsubscribedata=netrqAT0NYG%2FpTsGd5kC%2Ffgoc78vb17K6Vpa%2FRr2uJ8Nalb7s3Rf988A8uMBxvW68y2bYsUyXUNSxGKhMcpxbC%2BrUkd5ks6reoBQdbRPTghMK8OfL9NsrDU6FljLKsMuOL8gxgUOvvs4oVxBBXEb03AA7u1ljj4zk9137T602otZclKR%2FscDQ5hbuOjY9t13%2B2HYHashbNe3UAaSsOjovTkfAqzxBlB8IjFHJbeLfXJUmZ0F6UYYPJjhqfUgCiP2uag0SOcPMOeh0JFu7qd9XawYeTrjNYRr8dojNBDIcZyH%2BGdkpRBycc77evkNmFiwQsKI0%2B4zmALOxfJHV8WOoGTsLKeh22mPp84%2FCuxUsFj7yTcDxEUc7yLb5IvOlx4pRfk4RHRw6y1pCV0MNYlWeN5kjwvZ3UkBN6O4u%2FkERF0TRvG2VKpo82SnU%2B5EJY6w .

Tickets are $250 per person and promise an evening of networking and insightful discussions, accompanied by a live performance from the band Aviator!

name: avoid melatonin
subject: MIT study reveals why
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=6zs1j7skt6bmn2rn8d8b25itk10ym0xqefqbzi4edk51917e82q29z1w02ssy3x0mv9u7tntg07a0b5gep5lbdhdjnpgjs5bk3lx9l9oviqaeo1zjn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

Hey, Is Melatonin _really_ the best natural sleep aid? [The results of this new MIT study may surprise you.](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=8hjq6wshzwlaqtb9punvu1zvrzz55mq1md10wp5x4dg9o39nseaphiwypseimgtmmm91c72jriwp5bbijtlzu5fioz38yo9y24e6wq73jonsezmakjzpfra185g5ycop953uqn6eleu7nfa9j7gp502pxk0y1vn900lorl9zrgkjes1dcxs25huvitygbraiakafif4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=s91y1j) If you're waking up with bags under your eyes, feeling foggy-headed, and suffering through sleepy, groggy mornings... You need to know it's NOT normal. In fact, a lack of sleep can ruin your health, cause weight gain, and weaken your immune system. Luckily...new research from Harvard shows that getting the deep and restful sleep you so desperately need... is really quite simple. You just have to activate your "sleep zone" ... name: Your America
subject: Bring The Federalist Papers to your home
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39468%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RZ3iAX9UdguIYGZuyCi4mg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39469%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0yp6U2G6hXjapLqpjmxJHA&sysid=1)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39460%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DRPSoKvtDPoupPoJX3JMSw&sysid=1)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39461%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=APXcYRK8UDMO4UKFs18rXQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9829%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=YAFfttlSDlde%2bzXqsrNARg&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39462%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jngJucFe8Gm86vkItp98oQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39463%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GMEKr7KcdZ58u9PIdFaUUA&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9829%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=YAFfttlSDlde%2bzXqsrNARg&sysid=1)

| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf5urtk03qdfu2f6jo7ve9re1b09ioaqinqrk7f0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o31c5h2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zet6vakbopi0i16s4lju3ip7fs2qtjurhf4o4ni8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o31c5h2bs)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpuo09q036kfseklu4noe0tvlfe05oo0605b53t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o31c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Jefferson’s favorite commentary
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zssfvq68hdfrh6pb2b9mm41qtl5qi4e5pj27rnl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o34slh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7414muhdlc8mshkgdcdfgdv1qa6no43u62ukb88_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o34slh2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z37d28i7r8t12gotfg1igcd1j8j2i24v9g88ttdo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o34slh2bs)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4rh3j388d0pguho6gn1qnhh7r673phptkk9bgv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9im2o34slh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1kuev8on97spc7cqoqrvc2urgat5ckok9j3rds8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9imeor6c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm46a7889tg7nj973333arfr710h6nl797h3acvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9imeor6c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qsau8ivo249r3gdarv02ognl3d2967g3fsvrcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9imeor6c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9hlfllqj099hsv7nh794vbb8a3t1lbmu1hk5ms0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9imeor6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

---

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
conservative voices are being suppressed

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zogae7u1rfmhrn421d3hcgel42kmpischmmuo320_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj4c5h2bs)
---
|
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlijmvor8asu6ldkft1p7r0fv4tp6v02bd2dpek0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj4c5h2bs)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdcr4j1n0jnq1gmcq3sv4qdamhqfuij4809q8p08_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj4c5h2bs)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7vldlpv6ek5r8aen3q3ciufmdgpihr4u1oj9rb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj4c5h2bs)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsu721gldp3eg1nte69mtnp6fbsc14freq981a4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj4c5h2bs)
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself

---

name: Trump Train News
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdfbq21cbp91ud1f0k23brdfgndv7votpna1vud8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj7cph2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt3157pijl342081doqvb4mr0gtb22imopfpqi78_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9hm8oj7cph2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. name: Republican Majority
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkEFr4zAUhH-NdIt5en62lIMOC8Gwh2TD9tCjkC0pUWNZRlYo_ffFtD0X5vIxMDPM69mcbZzjcrvY5HVJpmymJEOrrdsh5OwMAtIB8CCUQe50f0SpBPdaSFDYCdEBv2tFwgXygPZIY6AOUaCSksA7REuOR73nAAoFimQrG9nTCL3ofAvCqgkYQfHrc5zjZJdk33KJ9aNZfOWzvte6bqz9w3BgONTyaIofc67Jloevcbk1U04MBxuCmVg75BB8MdGx9iTgyLDfjS_sEL55e47I2tP13_Xv8HIBBIFk_p93_UzlRbv1Pc5z3HrJCG7Jxnnv4vXXqz4DAAD__9QZaF4). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkEFr4zAUhH-NdIt5en62lIMOC8Gwh2TD9tCjkC0pUWNZRlYo_ffFtD0X5vIxMDPM69mcbZzjcrvY5HVJpmymJEOrrdsh5OwMAtIB8CCUQe50f0SpBPdaSFDYCdEBv2tFwgXygPZIY6AOUaCSksA7REuOR73nAAoFimQrG9nTCL3ofAvCqgkYQfHrc5zjZJdk33KJ9aNZfOWzvte6bqz9w3BgONTyaIofc67Jloevcbk1U04MBxuCmVg75BB8MdGx9iTgyLDfjS_sEL55e47I2tP13_Xv8HIBBIFk_p93_UzlRbv1Pc5z3HrJCG7Jxnnv4vXXqz4DAAD__9QZaF4) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyEkEFr4zAUhH-NdIt5en62lIMOC8Gwh2TD9tCjkC0pUWNZRlYo_ffFtD0X5vIxMDPM69mcbZzjcrvY5HVJpmymJEOrrdsh5OwMAtIB8CCUQe50f0SpBPdaSFDYCdEBv2tFwgXygPZIY6AOUaCSksA7REuOR73nAAoFimQrG9nTCL3ofAvCqgkYQfHrc5zjZJdk33KJ9aNZfOWzvte6bqz9w3BgONTyaIofc67Jloevcbk1U04MBxuCmVg75BB8MdGx9iTgyLDfjS_sEL55e47I2tP13_Xv8HIBBIFk_p93_UzlRbv1Pc5z3HrJCG7Jxnnv4vXXqz4DAAD__9QZaF4) on these survival food kits while you can.

subject: Ugh.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Ugh, Friend. This isn’t the email I wanted to send today, but it’s the email I have to send.

| |
---
| | | Ugh, Friend. This isn't the email I **wanted** to send today, but it's the email I _**have**_ to send.
You see, I fell short of my February Mid-Month Goal, and now, I have to face the reality that I could lose in November because I didn't have the resources to get my message, my story, or my values out on the airwaves.
**One last try** - I'm extending the deadline for _**TEN MINUTES**_ in hopes that you'll send in a donation to help me hit my February Mid-Month Goal and stay the course to win in November:
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UviNxcOp1EB7qsqI_sAUew~~/AARclAA~~~ "10 minute timer")
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, DERRICK! >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UviNxcOp1EB7qsqI_sAUew~~/AARclAA~~~ "I’LL CHIP IN, DERRICK! >>")
---
Democrats hate that I speak my mind and call out their BS for what it is... **_BS_**! In fact, Democrats working in the White House, Senate, and House have spent all year attacking me. They've pretty much been against me ever since I pulled into DC on my Harley motorcycle.

I'm not going to let DC Democrats get away with "business-as-usual," and that's why I'm reaching out to you one last time.
---
| | [HELP DERRICK REACH HIS NOV. GOAL! >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UviNxcOp1EB7qsqI_sAUew~~/AARclAA~~~ "HELP DERRICK REACH HIS NOV. GOAL! >>")
---
Please, Friend, remember that I'm counting on you!

Thank you in advance for stepping up,
Derrick Van Orden
---

* * *
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oBgbLpHOFXyAYNI8nHyjHQ~~/AARclAA~~)
---

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. We’ve been reviewing our battle plan for the 2024 elections, and it pains me to say this…but our GOP Majority is more at risk than ever. The Democrats have launched their attacks against some of our toughest GOP candidates and have already raised MILLIONS to defeat them. So, we’re coming to you today with an urgent plea to help the one and only…Navy Veteran Jen Kiggans. Jen is as tough as they come, and she has the courage to fight for our conservative values. She is a Mom, Navy Veteran, and Nurse Practitioner who’s spent her whole career helping people. In 2022, her race against one of Nancy Pelosi’s most loyal supporters was one of the closest races in the entire country. Now, the Democrats are out for revenge and have made Jen one of their TOP targets. Why do the Democrats want to take down Jen Kiggans? It's simple. They recognize her seat is critical to maintaining the House Majority and is strategically positioned on the road to power. If they defeat Jen, they can reclaim the House Majority and undermine everything we have worked so hard to achieve. They will do anything to defeat Jen, even if it means spreading lies and using every trick in their political arsenal. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=35e28360b38fcb0c6a414f5a87d40e07df6e77820ea4686693d80cc6db648e37d6d324f8f13cd4e16aae598697768810e7113f739e9e9648 But Team Kiggans’ knows that Jen won’t go down without a fight. Her dedication to her constituents, unwavering commitment to conservative principles, and remarkable ability to build bridges and find common ground make her the ideal candidate for this crucial fight. As a Veteran, Jen knows what it means to work hard and fight, and I know she will win as long as she has the resources needed to combat the Left’s attacks. But Jen can’t win this fight alone, Peter. She needs as much support as we can muster to stay in the fight. True patriots must rally behind her and show the Democrats we will not back down. Let us stand shoulder to shoulder with Jen Kiggans and ensure she can continue to fight for our values in Congress. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=35e28360b38fcb0c6a414f5a87d40e07df6e77820ea4686693d80cc6db648e37d6d324f8f13cd4e16aae598697768810e7113f739e9e9648 >" alias="STAND WITH JEN >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">STAND WITH JEN >> Together, with your support. I know we can DEFEND Jen’s seat in 2024 and maintain the House Majority. Please, we’re humbly asking you today if you will help us send a resounding message to the Democrats that their attempts to undermine our values will not go unchallenged. Make no mistake – the stakes are high. In their quest to reclaim power, the Democrats will stop at nothing. But we can stop them. Let us join forces, rally around Jen Kiggans, and remind them our commitment to freedom, liberty, and conservative principles is unwavering. | | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYFs4zVw4LDKFqmqUkW99GgNZiBW_IHGplX-fUVKeu515s2Tnubns3kG513cvkPA8c2SoWwiGLCuJvRuq_NBv_DdSC5VzWUteiOqZVwGq0FXOIqO9_Im9CCq1xG47UGiXJRcO4R16OZeD4vqlOrXDobKjaeHS9HzQd3E0AhQGnoJQq3zDWdgioNHKs0b4m5T3AhzJtyP2TsLsbEpVH58LWXPrL0zOTE5pXVFyg0EpJOxiSJSLilik2hjcvoIcenItXczUnm_os7zdjpKMBbCDm6LrH38gy_2E9Unl9NBFln72CnlHW1xcbtWARd3BNY-MIDz19CmWDAW1j5e7vW3px_1Zz6T-q_L2LScwvvTV9ly9eWFc1HRuOy_nfcu644pvp3Gj_Tyvy_6EwAA___Ss51g)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYFs4zVw4LDKFqmqUkW99GgNZiBW_IHGplX-fUVKeu515s2Tnubns3kG513cvkPA8c2SoWwiGLCuJvRuq_NBv_DdSC5VzWUteiOqZVwGq0FXOIqO9_Im9CCq1xG47UGiXJRcO4R16OZeD4vqlOrXDobKjaeHS9HzQd3E0AhQGnoJQq3zDWdgioNHKs0b4m5T3AhzJtyP2TsLsbEpVH58LWXPrL0zOTE5pXVFyg0EpJOxiSJSLilik2hjcvoIcenItXczUnm_os7zdjpKMBbCDm6LrH38gy_2E9Unl9NBFln72CnlHW1xcbtWARd3BNY-MIDz19CmWDAW1j5e7vW3px_1Zz6T-q_L2LScwvvTV9ly9eWFc1HRuOy_nfcu644pvp3Gj_Tyvy_6EwAA___Ss51g) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYFs4zVw4LDKFqmqUkW99GgNZiBW_IHGplX-fUVKeu515s2Tnubns3kG513cvkPA8c2SoWwiGLCuJvRuq_NBv_DdSC5VzWUteiOqZVwGq0FXOIqO9_Im9CCq1xG47UGiXJRcO4R16OZeD4vqlOrXDobKjaeHS9HzQd3E0AhQGnoJQq3zDWdgioNHKs0b4m5T3AhzJtyP2TsLsbEpVH58LWXPrL0zOTE5pXVFyg0EpJOxiSJSLilik2hjcvoIcenItXczUnm_os7zdjpKMBbCDm6LrH38gy_2E9Unl9NBFln72CnlHW1xcbtWARd3BNY-MIDz19CmWDAW1j5e7vW3px_1Zz6T-q_L2LScwvvTV9ly9eWFc1HRuOy_nfcu644pvp3Gj_Tyvy_6EwAA___Ss51g)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkU1vnDAQQH-NuYFs4zVw4LDKFqmqUkW99GgNZiBW_IHGplX-fUVKeu515s2Tnubns3kG513cvkPA8c2SoWwiGLCuJvRuq_NBv_DdSC5VzWUteiOqZVwGq0FXOIqO9_Im9CCq1xG47UGiXJRcO4R16OZeD4vqlOrXDobKjaeHS9HzQd3E0AhQGnoJQq3zDWdgioNHKs0b4m5T3AhzJtyP2TsLsbEpVH58LWXPrL0zOTE5pXVFyg0EpJOxiSJSLilik2hjcvoIcenItXczUnm_os7zdjpKMBbCDm6LrH38gy_2E9Unl9NBFln72CnlHW1xcbtWARd3BNY-MIDz19CmWDAW1j5e7vW3px_1Zz6T-q_L2LScwvvTV9ly9eWFc1HRuOy_nfcu644pvp3Gj_Tyvy_6EwAA___Ss51g)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lFuGnLRJ9nG7KKxC5CwVRg~~/AARclAA~/RgRntF-iP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS9kZWIxODIzZTVjYWYzYmE1P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDIwMV9CREdfU0dDQV9MTF9SRVZfUEEtQUZSJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAyMThXA3NwY0IKZc7C0dFlfB4t1FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
