| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... name: Restore our Nation
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/svuEIhbYv2KKR1fxHiN4kA~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/svuEIhbYv2KKR1fxHiN4kA~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/svuEIhbYv2KKR1fxHiN4kA~~/AARclAA~)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Restore Our Nation

name: Full Mag News
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b29d9760d6d428aa89cd8a16da54b25&_e=5VqTnX4ec3buei-aV-OqIOzONfnNBoDCK-IvqWVZezOMJzoQv7i54a-cXd540CFdg5vb-YaayE_dix-PEohyZzD6MxyGWm5bcCU-mbgeyw9m8oE-MjJ0uLTLJdoCFg_0U6kdNHW-h5k_6YhOgrU5yK7fwBaWiTLBn-Y-aay6_BUES-2gD7mYuUeFBkUGRpYIKOWB3GCtwPDmh7VSzu_-rP1EkKXfPC8X66BeFl2BALNE0ursSjIPywU6mGGo8sW8MH1rHbYiP7HVGf-nwSIdkPujqd9dswMUZsirymNq2GgjK9LOT4A4bRyPJSxlMN_MeD04h-IOneSbTdjJ9Kq747gsVvd5ZqJHBqrDhufalyRgwG2hlmaaz8ds6QcTT3gaZjyFfApmb6zWmqLEacPYnZzKOEb0QuH9c-Y1oG78ufM%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b29d9760d6d428aa89cd8a16da54b25&_e=5VqTnX4ec3buei-aV-OqIOzONfnNBoDCK-IvqWVZezOMJzoQv7i54a-cXd540CFdg5vb-YaayE_dix-PEohyZzD6MxyGWm5bcCU-mbgeyw9m8oE-MjJ0uLTLJdoCFg_0U6kdNHW-h5k_6YhOgrU5yK7fwBaWiTLBn-Y-aay6_BUES-2gD7mYuUeFBkUGRpYIKOWB3GCtwPDmh7VSzu_-rP1EkKXfPC8X66BeFl2BALNE0ursSjIPywU6mGGo8sW8MH1rHbYiP7HVGf-nwSIdkD7_YBgaSFF4lIW3Pf9Gt6HkMke-9InBoF2iKf3YXuIxTj4TWPs_3Gvbr4m-b0ewWPuwm7wfQuz44D5Am_wi5XZwqDYhDtxxwAELbhT8mb1ivoOe1rS_gTJaJ9mpSzOTxZGwxT_yJOg-yrR3LsKIe0k%3D)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b606defe8de347ccae3c4ac901c0b502&_e=8rT5m1bRmHOE7Up4TjubpU04QlHo9gimFHa6ZDYL4NW-pLtMiR82T7j9VMrrC4eWJiQZ5nSANYDbfFDORNgkQFWKDqzDqLa3WFxE8-CknpIlDpRu7Dc4Et-Nx5SYOnGcsnxe7Z-Q62cu-96njYujT5lnqcmuel-y7A6DzY1R3IRb-EZfZTq-ptg00Vm3VKV3_QyRmd95wpShzAaYt7hQ4jz-MEH0qJPNHdiCEFubFP67Rjz4cjBlP9V9GWtBbiWFXjthRLJoLe4cefDtZHrJw8sMLAjVSt9H-0BjjBB96sIXMd93opXXO8mZAmCxTals). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b606defe8de347ccae3c4ac901c0b502&_e=8rT5m1bRmHOE7Up4TjubpU04QlHo9gimFHa6ZDYL4NW-pLtMiR82T7j9VMrrC4eWJiQZ5nSANYDbfFDORNgkQFWKDqzDqLa3WFxE8-CknpIlDpRu7Dc4Et-Nx5SYOnGcsnxe7Z-Q62cu-96njYujTyqm7j4Z21FVBhwhMavYXG26bWCB23oPOeDhnAlHYKPmTaf3x9sGBFIr-YWl3Z9ICIJV7a2h2O8fQf_0MMnBDDyg8H2YI9amX1-2Ql08gmLzhP-i6aF2bSUk0UfoSTWhADZjQ71ZPsqg7RVxCP_fdaC27HAA0NqncoR81FBvLS6I) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b606defe8de347ccae3c4ac901c0b502&_e=8rT5m1bRmHOE7Up4TjubpU04QlHo9gimFHa6ZDYL4NW-pLtMiR82T7j9VMrrC4eWJiQZ5nSANYDbfFDORNgkQFWKDqzDqLa3WFxE8-CknpIlDpRu7Dc4Et-Nx5SYOnGcsnxe7Z-Q62cu-96njYujTz1Fb1oybx-ARGlz_Ojxfqjwij2E8Y3KHeAFiCEaToyFHHQRU9p-sBGcMVv_jc5xJ4LOf8huVWoTUv7dVYb60twZVco6vlcWUVaZiYoUKM_ac4qQHBCVHyjm60I_NNzEAeiWrcpITWH3DoiavfvoybYVwFzmRARumJyNADoUqxKj) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' Rent Control Bill
body:
Given the certification of all six initiatives, we want to highlight our recent interview with Let's Go Washington founder, Brian Heywood. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62821563:s9sMUWiyN:m:1:2610672541:3EDA55957890B7C27E530DDE13BEB7B1:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Democrats continue to ignore their constitutional duty to take up the six citizen initiatives certified by the Democrat Secretary of State for their action... and the 2024 legislative session continues to stagger on. As we continue delivering the latest news coming out of Olympia, we hope to keep you up-to-date with an item or two of interest last week from your own backyard. Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
GOP Representative Keith Goehner discussed his legislative priorities, including addressing transportation issues and restoring law enforcement authority. He emphasized the need for hearings on the Let's Go Washington citizen initiatives, anticipating voter interest. Rep. Goehner also highlighted concerns about bills such as the Democrats' natural gas ban and sentencing modifications. In addition, he explained proposed legislation for back country search and rescue support and lamented the lack of transparency in fuel prices under the carbon tax. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62821564:s9sMUWiyN:m:1:2610672541:3EDA55957890B7C27E530DDE13BEB7B1:r).

**This week 's top story...**
As the Democrat-dominated state legislature surpassed the halfway point of its 60-day session, there was a notable lack of substantial progress on major issues impacting our state. Despite numerous bills thankfully meeting their demise at the latest Olympia deadline, one persistent proposal stands out. Rent control may become a reality, with HB 2114 passing the state House of Representatives. However, the Democrats deny they are pushing rent control, opting instead for the term "stabilization" to downplay the controversial nature of rent control. But semantics don't change the essence, rent control, or "stabilization," is not a viable solution for addressing the state's housing affordability crisis. [Read more this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62821565:s9sMUWiyN:m:1:2610672541:3EDA55957890B7C27E530DDE13BEB7B1:r).

**In case you missed it ...**
Democrats in Washington continue their trend of proposing new taxes during the legislative session, even after Senate Bill 5770, which aimed to triple local property taxes, was abandoned under public pressure. However, House Bill 2276, a real estate tax, remains on the table. Scott Walker, vice president of Rush Residential, criticized the proposal in a recent opinion piece, highlighting the paradox of making housing more expensive in the name of creating affordable housing, especially considering Washington's already high real estate excise taxes. [Read more this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62821566:s9sMUWiyN:m:1:2610672541:3EDA55957890B7C27E530DDE13BEB7B1:r).

**Your bit of inspiration for the week ...**
Enjoy the beauty of Palouse Falls right here in our state, as captured by former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler. | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62821567:s9sMUWiyN:m:1:2610672541:3EDA55957890B7C27E530DDE13BEB7B1:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14428192&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/os9sMUWiyN).
---

Democrats in Washington continue their trend of proposing new taxes during the legislative session, even after Senate Bill 5770, which aimed to triple local property taxes, was abandoned under public pressure. However, House Bill 2276, a real estate tax, remains on the table. Scott Walker, vice president of Rush Residential, criticized the proposal in a recent opinion piece, highlighting the paradox of making housing more expensive in the name of creating affordable housing, especially considering Washington's already high real estate excise taxes. . Your bit of inspiration for the week ... Enjoy the beauty of Palouse Falls right here in our state, as captured by former U.S. Congressman Rod Chandler. | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on & . If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, .

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60d0f9d8681b4c3799a43588cab403da&_e=PRrxbLxg5cAFoZRhiQxLFqR67dBpYaeYseWTGBLjW9qX3a61OtM2VGD7sSpFNH2-tkoXjUcz8SaR3O3F6ZFzD77GatkayTXmoL9CdTi903W3MmV1P6y0zFWDsPb7wtx4FcnJIaPIMFjP0_J7R2m43hK0kov7HeqjzQK1NHO2FCPbBvpkCyDYGow-U42KPfXcPCvG4ozhrslQKEbQH_31CSs2OcLjYJ617q9bvhxUlDsCq3Q3DCPlJS7aZ9MfY8D2vJ4V-6j4AWMlwkO0rJduPlcF8HeNZl99jBp886CSVfcNi3SMR0Yro85GCDsFx-Qqnj2mGhyA6cVkwMsDycJS85y-q2rtRcPkzwJ1YQtu2ZLNFzEwTdt5GE149GvW9g7LXBmHTiMTCm7SQIvnNm-FDg%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60d0f9d8681b4c3799a43588cab403da&_e=PRrxbLxg5cAFoZRhiQxLFqR67dBpYaeYseWTGBLjW9qX3a61OtM2VGD7sSpFNH2-tkoXjUcz8SaR3O3F6ZFzD77GatkayTXmoL9CdTi903W3MmV1P6y0zFWDsPb7wtx4FcnJIaPIMFjP0_J7R2m43hK0kov7HeqjzQK1NHO2FCPbBvpkCyDYGow-U42KPfXcPCvG4ozhrslQKEbQH_31CSs2OcLjYJ617q9bvhxUlDu09AztEUdCfZ9PedcXtomB4bdJ_DC_TD1SbvX5TFGn_mlP_xLWeW34VBAuANTvZ7wi_tUySvNiNiyt45OdTFd9b7iZlCY_3tRaUR-gJZrBxLPcaQ7DhhkmtOIlbHFYU19iX2h6todoZynIKRN8uAWxZF3zG_1E99rLNLhBFu0Iiw%3D%3D)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60d0f9d8681b4c3799a43588cab403da&_e=PRrxbLxg5cAFoZRhiQxLFqR67dBpYaeYseWTGBLjW9qX3a61OtM2VGD7sSpFNH2-tkoXjUcz8SaR3O3F6ZFzD77GatkayTXmoL9CdTi903W3MmV1P6y0zFWDsPb7wtx4FcnJIaPIMFjP0_J7R2m43hK0kov7HeqjzQK1NHO2FCPbBvpkCyDYGow-U42KPfXcPCvG4ozhrslQKEbQH_31CSs2OcLjYJ617q9bvhxUlDuU9jliTIzBRrEp4vFlI6wvXeB4-1nMinCipjDX7nfCmFRLXR7b1oWthsFF-nMPRXwpGdy8T_9hlPpGeeqoyuDbWrA7PUMcZLaCBQ30WpUI9o9v9q37XQuy1O6grhuBPQeshNoMPp7BSYhr7iyG0_hC3pW21p5Ye88xt08z8ftdUA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60d0f9d8681b4c3799a43588cab403da&_e=PRrxbLxg5cAFoZRhiQxLFqR67dBpYaeYseWTGBLjW9qX3a61OtM2VGD7sSpFNH2-tkoXjUcz8SaR3O3F6ZFzD77GatkayTXmoL9CdTi903W3MmV1P6y0zFWDsPb7wtx4FcnJIaPIMFjP0_J7R2m43hK0kov7HeqjzQK1NHO2FCPbBvpkCyDYGow-U42KPfXcPCvG4ozhrslQKEbQH_31CSs2OcLjYJ617q9bvhxUlDsKcr8rHUVsWTuMU6nHkvqKpE0LdQ8DSpk5S-YLguAkyomdq-Epd9gjUXoXQX1OkLY1q-inRke9u3PWG0nPLpkNc79Vx2I4aH3Ekhp7d1siSUFKrYBzpbhGNibmkLgfxQeVf8oDJlMWmft70j1OPHEtEw6ijbMJN03AD0JcIMEZ9g%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60d0f9d8681b4c3799a43588cab403da&_e=PRrxbLxg5cAFoZRhiQxLFqR67dBpYaeYseWTGBLjW9qX3a61OtM2VGD7sSpFNH2-tkoXjUcz8SaR3O3F6ZFzD77GatkayTXmoL9CdTi903W3MmV1P6y0zFWDsPb7wtx4FcnJIaPIMFjP0_J7R2m43hK0kov7HeqjzQK1NHO2FCPbBvpkCyDYGow-U42KPfXcPCvG4ozhrslQKEbQH_31CSs2OcLjYJ617q9bvhxUlDteTv93wZhNo8gkUCcJ9wPwuxsOVIu0W07UMf9jG2HFSBAZ61JfZLhalPIMUUUO0SW6Hen_pXtlqlH0Y30qDuRjMKgkCWe7152I9fc79Cec8kMf2erKM8elwIiMZxNAjHZBiS852V5E2-0ZcGbd1tvwu_4k-LtFIPi_bKbu3NwbkA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
|

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60d0f9d8681b4c3799a43588cab403da&_e=PRrxbLxg5cAFoZRhiQxLFqR67dBpYaeYseWTGBLjW9qX3a61OtM2VGD7sSpFNH2-tkoXjUcz8SaR3O3F6ZFzD77GatkayTXmoL9CdTi903W3MmV1P6y0zFWDsPb7wtx4FcnJIaPIMFjP0_J7R2m43hK0kov7HeqjzQK1NHO2FCPbBvpkCyDYGow-U42KPfXcPCvG4ozhrslQKEbQH_31CSs2OcLjYJ617q9bvhxUlDsZYjPtlxVRvcaj2OtBEi746z4ILIKhkk8eQGqkZ2KBShMNq7Ed_h-5UrpGpYStuchLa-JaNorBl6ZS3apFHYN_bOcVi8XzTfBNiVkbH2PNuFHnEh1EseWaz1WTWEiDbLjUUnEmz-t-yHkQTtfY_juBOE7s4xBDQ-rQCg2R5gJS5A%3D%3D)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ff52a8357d84ced96f38d85ab47d05a&_e=ETJlup7Pkwssh34PWK0qAbINonhh8T9IFoYFfPDG-aoOcLJgVeQf410l6gV1qTq5UEcVoPx2VOmpKMw_zTepbhFXP0eNqbMA8wAon4snHEFT3cnJaqcsFN5Uma_IjANkfDxZdLfMix83aMv9-Ya1DqdQO8a26nCwJvzpu7QwL5NHP8tFVBEpKDCsF7_FmqX719tqUKZZixlykkgldnX_L0AqlDBdFJlK1MnQ_YafgJ8_eLBVphWnFodg8GXMIj8YFWNlqbJiblBxLyG4zrJgXrfZUq--9axak66qm6FwWzz-eK1MNlkg_m8zFSdah6Z01pMaVP12XhlFaExN7uk5qQgDBzyDWz9e0HA_nC-oZTAf7WSHVM68fyO8z7VDIy7XkULajVvgo96Cl6rZUTK3IWVVSL0sRCxf9SKRtaqUTjM%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ff52a8357d84ced96f38d85ab47d05a&_e=ETJlup7Pkwssh34PWK0qAbINonhh8T9IFoYFfPDG-aoOcLJgVeQf410l6gV1qTq5UEcVoPx2VOmpKMw_zTepbhFXP0eNqbMA8wAon4snHEFT3cnJaqcsFN5Uma_IjANkfDxZdLfMix83aMv9-Ya1DqdQO8a26nCwJvzpu7QwL5NHP8tFVBEpKDCsF7_FmqX719tqUKZZixlykkgldnX_L0AqlDBdFJlK1MnQ_YafgJ8_eLBVphWnFodg8GXMIj8YFWNlqbJiblBxLyG4zrJgXteD0u8eyVR1yTORqatcZMCDitqXbMoy3A7ZjakAjGa-wMtqAp9oBf1XOn7-cQmiRPkftbgqUJmVCYGHt3lSHYWvRgxsgcVksr1QgFn7LW9VDLrgMgWEwy4UuX8h1ZS-riMmnXs4Dv26Y9hZ2zxkNUQ%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ff52a8357d84ced96f38d85ab47d05a&_e=ETJlup7Pkwssh34PWK0qAbINonhh8T9IFoYFfPDG-aoOcLJgVeQf410l6gV1qTq5UEcVoPx2VOmpKMw_zTepbhFXP0eNqbMA8wAon4snHEFT3cnJaqcsFN5Uma_IjANkfDxZdLfMix83aMv9-Ya1DqdQO8a26nCwJvzpu7QwL5NHP8tFVBEpKDCsF7_FmqX719tqUKZZixlykkgldnX_L0AqlDBdFJlK1MnQ_YafgJ8_eLBVphWnFodg8GXMIj8YFWNlqbJiblBxLyG4zrJgXsLfoxIvoVNZRY1H0iQJN2lGFd6ivejjmFYpbC_dWJDk9xcBV4I47clgPOoBDwPkX2y9Sy5IiGKg3O0hfYbyX2Gmr9xkk_RYv4-5CvzSuE1VDZ95Qk0gvCkqiZI8oXVc3H5VS3AmDNNL0KB1og3e_ao%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: AMAC Action
subject: Healthcare for illegals but not for Veterans
body:
Medicare is being slashed...

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=262761badbf34cea93e5848f7998cd04&_e=poLdX_yikYxOSR0ecjH-V9Qbbg1qpp06juxSd0_P9zGuSWW7iVHsFp87fPTmd3Wj7lgTmAE2eEz4FtaiYVzwVqMYKgIGqTj2bQN5XAV60AMDZfkQJnWMNnNvixloFBkyDQXJJftGz15hrXWm_SCt-7StRS_1CzT39BYSMlYGoew9IoAT_LkLZp-vP2JVq60804Ose-wweXpm47u0NflkMQ0SHZikoxcWl4a95yp2Trj8hpXV5jo48yIPcfsKbfnhHGDHbiA1wmGmUNfehfuU6vDzbzJ3KU-1sSp695PoF3tyo78fPvm9UVsJWw6agrXlAo7vSEdYXIjJPpM-2uN7HqNMkiFsff2YGLfrl1uY6EE%3D)
---
Fellow American,Medicare is being slashed...the border is WIDE OPEN...and the Veterans Administration (VA) has a massive backlog of claims from our veterans......but now Joe Biden and the VA are colluding with ICE to help **pay for illegal immigrant healthcare** – on your dime. The most important thing we do here at AMAC Action is fight for policies that keep more of your hard-earned money in your pocket.That’s why I want to know what you think:**_Should your tax dollars be used for illegal migrants or Veterans who honorably served and risked their lives for this country?_**
---
| | [**Illegal Immigrants**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=262761badbf34cea93e5848f7998cd04&_e=poLdX_yikYxOSR0ecjH-V9Qbbg1qpp06juxSd0_P9zGuSWW7iVHsFp87fPTmd3Wj7lgTmAE2eEz4FtaiYVzwVqMYKgIGqTj2bQN5XAV60AMDZfkQJnWMNnNvixloFBkyDQXJJftGz15hrXWm_SCt-7StRS_1CzT39BYSMlYGoew9IoAT_LkLZp-vP2JVq608Zb1aYeDKOHbMaJwCgK2ztY4QmiAZlr44NgnKK-djaa3Eqe97elXFC5B7tdRiEeFjNayJqcffTaxE5hZoIa19X7gh_m5EwzVekNfAsLSfvoH0BqbobskUHCcxYwKVobQIoAYjYUB4kkCY4rDga0-EKYBjycJ2u4dKbrn5R0J2AHU%3D)
---
[**Veterans**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=262761badbf34cea93e5848f7998cd04&_e=poLdX_yikYxOSR0ecjH-V9Qbbg1qpp06juxSd0_P9zGuSWW7iVHsFp87fPTmd3Wj7lgTmAE2eEz4FtaiYVzwVqMYKgIGqTj2bQN5XAV60AMDZfkQJnWMNnNvixloFBkyDQXJJftGz15hrXWm_SCt-7StRS_1CzT39BYSMlYGoew9IoAT_LkLZp-vP2JVq608W3URe-TbA68wlV2CjWxxsYvgzgvay56rjPG0PnhUyRfhtY9zfkGMDoQG1hHTMeUHYZ8fUstyvAj-H9sUfycdz7BlD9lqAmEdFn7VtjPbgKbrw6mfZCC7vl0SwbAPmZgQi7twT68DBie3I9n-DOd6GyqvZer2BWyHG6LHkAqJ-8M%3D)
---
Friend, I think this is a no brainer. You and I live in a world where the government continues to slash our benefits. Medicare benefits are always on the cutting board. Social Security is running out. And we pay more for groceries and gas every month.It’s not fair that Joe Biden is using our tax dollars to give free healthcare to freeloading illegal migrants while you and I struggle to stretch every dollar. Last month, Senator Tommy Tuberville introduced legislation to bar the VA from using resources “to provide health care or engage in claims processing for illegal migrants.”That’s the kind of legislation Congress must pass to stop Joe Biden’s betrayal of taxpayers and Veterans.And it’s the kind of legislation AMAC Action is proud to support. If you stand with AMAC Action against the Biden administration, please make your voice heard by answering the poll above – and consider making a generous donation to AMAC Action.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Bob Carlstrom, PresidentAMAC Action

name: BREAKING STATEHOOD NEWS From House GOP
subject: This is an emergency for Conservatives everywhere.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The radical plot to ram through legislation to admit a 51st state into our Union is picking up more steam than we can believe...

| |

---
| | |
* * *
**FIRST:** House Democrats teamed up to force through a bill making Washington DC an official US state

**THEN:** Dozens of top Senate Democrats quickly signed on

**NEXT:** Joe Biden publicly endorsed their plot, giving it the most attention we've ever seen

**NOW: 1,000+ elected leaders in 37 states and territories have thrown support behind it**
* * *

It's urgent - the Radical Left is charging ahead with their plot and this is an emergency for Conservatives everywhere. Why?

Because that city would be electing TWO new senators and filling at least one House seat. It could shift the balance of power in Washington FOR GOOD. As of right now, we have a razor-thin Majority in the House and a 49-51 Senate. And remember: DC is a DEEP BLUE city!

Look:

Democrats are mounting a coordinated political ambush to force DC statehood on the rest of the country. We have no choice but to ask for your help to stop them. Even though the Democrats are CHARGING AHEAD with their plot, we still have a chance to stop them as long as we move right now.

The future of our country is at stake. Are you going to help stop Democrats from pulling off this devastating plot?

We need you with us.

For America,

House GOP

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d5eef869ccb48fab8f37c8b26b754f5&_e=gPPrG3DQjCp9zD647mQgRVFMTP_YkN8FBp6PZ2MPjTW_jqZgMZDJJm1A8x5ek9hngW79KvHH2laSBcE5573LCVkOX5MlBmt9P7_y0sh2y3X6Z31G3RyCud3-msEKe7pzSHkedWeILyIqNywRTJ8cB53J-yIeaK4jUx6hrKHgMCHqkcwKalBmBAQQdFg0PRPYIwRY5jfHk24P-_QaMhlSWtUBRj5Qaz9SmKvbK3zSDrb8jBg_i0mP3dy-oHHpcqeN8I9T4hS9fCV9rkIEhnC8TH7PGXFYJqNkRoG3SWl1YQUb_MyKTzefZ1ohDHzyLSdWT9an7ZaD5J29MAXDi8XtztE8a7qm0_MFupS8y4AsRDr5yqwiF76GVT4Ztst3LE6Lclt2zoh5AxdW3ZKPQG57j3xYTBqdILCUEwKXL2edVYA%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d5eef869ccb48fab8f37c8b26b754f5&_e=gPPrG3DQjCp9zD647mQgRVFMTP_YkN8FBp6PZ2MPjTW_jqZgMZDJJm1A8x5ek9hngW79KvHH2laSBcE5573LCVkOX5MlBmt9P7_y0sh2y3X6Z31G3RyCud3-msEKe7pzSHkedWeILyIqNywRTJ8cB53J-yIeaK4jUx6hrKHgMCHqkcwKalBmBAQQdFg0PRPYIwRY5jfHk24P-_QaMhlSWtUBRj5Qaz9SmKvbK3zSDrb8jBg_i0mP3dy-oHHpcqeN8I9T4hS9fCV9rkIEhnC8TDAcDNTG1XVdxOzW46faAhRIWk2iS9th0FcBybVag8G4yC5IdClxxZcg0Q4VqUexp_N23LJQYUy3PfSGO63ukMThebQcoiLsLvESGzMBXXZCWGbKZx7GifuLHIkpFRrHuDW8b_qGepaR4YCyfn0WZj4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d5eef869ccb48fab8f37c8b26b754f5&_e=gPPrG3DQjCp9zD647mQgRVFMTP_YkN8FBp6PZ2MPjTW_jqZgMZDJJm1A8x5ek9hngW79KvHH2laSBcE5573LCVkOX5MlBmt9P7_y0sh2y3X6Z31G3RyCud3-msEKe7pzSHkedWeILyIqNywRTJ8cB53J-yIeaK4jUx6hrKHgMCHqkcwKalBmBAQQdFg0PRPYIwRY5jfHk24P-_QaMhlSWtUBRj5Qaz9SmKvbK3zSDrb8jBg_i0mP3dy-oHHpcqeN8I9T4hS9fCV9rkIEhnC8TAiPoHBo9ZGAghleyUzVvXNDDcxtrOC7VBmKLA55HDsJbJbGZcm14-lRpV4_IOrRcNdkqBQ6bLtslwVCg1R68Y0K4jVcubv14LyxG16tnNQuTMDEYA8VNfXUrVrsATZQRAQyQYRRZ6GpM-D5cghwRfw%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d5eef869ccb48fab8f37c8b26b754f5&_e=gPPrG3DQjCp9zD647mQgRVFMTP_YkN8FBp6PZ2MPjTW_jqZgMZDJJm1A8x5ek9hngW79KvHH2laSBcE5573LCVkOX5MlBmt9P7_y0sh2y3X6Z31G3RyCud3-msEKe7pzSHkedWeILyIqNywRTJ8cB53J-yIeaK4jUx6hrKHgMCHqkcwKalBmBAQQdFg0PRPYIwRY5jfHk24P-_QaMhlSWtUBRj5Qaz9SmKvbK3zSDrb8jBg_i0mP3dy-oHHpcqeN8I9T4hS9fCV9rkIEhnC8TCE5VAfn6NcvyR6WSzjvmeMRLStrqHJcqnpmElcsrhfS8-D2fm9b_FZceyGo_niXw3CPn6l-YcRaW5xxeDGWMkF6loPVgG-yPt6imIjxRHhzJyo9qaqI_xNzRvKg6CmRD-PBIIoGJ2U_YrtU_5MrrjM%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

**Friend, I NEED YOU AFTER THE SHAM RULING!**
Democrats are ramping up their attacks on me, doing anything to preserve their grip on power and their control over you.
They see us crushing **Crooked Joe Biden** in the polls on rebuilding the economy, ending the border invasion, and stopping World War III.
**Our America First movement is growing and more popular than ever.**
**That’s why they’re doing everything to _CRUSH ME!_**
**BUT YOU WON’T LET THAT HAPPEN!**
When we win back the White House, we’ll enact _**Agenda 47.**_
It’s the most thorough policy initiative **EVER CREATED.**
And right now, I’m asking YOU to help shape it.

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj11gfNrt7R9c67_JBjFUhOCVWF1sv0z16S9yIQ4h--mfglN8Ihbz4CLUbxy2NUCh65C6EghZU0LRVzHGZGEXtPhQa7ivYQQoFKeaRKlOhCw5tptCT6XfeBAc5xc2euOlocAeGwg5-y4OawgKowNmSNq1J31ILXprvsL9curh009jQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj25ywBdVbhvMI80njtjwKfYyCza8OVqu7AcNvRBYP35Dw3pDK-OFlQ3qiCzRMMQpPPOONvqI9HiXwM9RShFHdsdrbMNwpdheBGy_5jpIviNTVcU0SRzdRa9U8RDVBJwAB4iKoOrveYDlNDVZoRfBqY5g2sFSf2mPDn3gcchg08WVg%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj2A4jg-F3ag4ZtinnWEVCr2_nmb_8CtvQoTqVqeD3unJud3F_JkZTfFWJI1agwzeoVc2pV5RNAZpEA2ldS53ALkbkigIPnnxFFxjW5k17VO_F9g7mX2Jp0Br__89uh7ygLx5aWYhJo7bFylU1IYJOPKJtikhqxbdWC_oSbn-bf7bQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj1bhpCLMhG5W3SrYNGa-nAstCW0hCbp2fpTDd2oWYRyTuI6Lg1R-q9JbIFa5rHOM4jp5Y1jPUSonROqfyQTr3mSW0K8qreioY7vMI7jCPZMXNXUComY0Cx9Vjzxq1eJmdHKxqUlGEIMNpzZuOCCdQLlQOVCwGlWnnVxKjpfwk1-0g%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj2O36WPakWTm_oRrpR86dgznD5CTyT6TCRTL8kEdYy-tanCXi3Fc49XoGSx7nVIVp02ipZV0D4sjgwrjfNecFUPNYpAudrx5iFssq0-2oRO0nmWgllE8QWTuZQgOUDsYrGRE8DOTeECln_fEdOa-0knwdP-HzDBuk4GbkvBrrrOVg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|

| | [**DONATE**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj3Rh03cBhsE1dV0opFB_VvbYrRbmoZSjwHX3YUuIcSmJ_nVr-VoSXEOHmrHv3pNcJ0VPU-DAb6Q_zmfnjT3Q_Op1k071Z-6vJVjrYQbH-Pfx9ieUpgbdbWx7aumbV4xcGNcy8P_IelGGSKzlV4Gb2F7fl-YMe_lTrrongUsNVhNnQ%3D%3D)

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj3Vqa_UInKYcDBJF2c734csNF-MclAn888bOejlr0_3eF3IeZi5ISBlo3M-IPcV6Aisr6dJYo9RFzvrvt1HRKaiXaCqSunj8qCmdxgbnxaEkX298qYeLeTKJXv-IWgP-aIU-ep9NnGAb4hqU7clWQUz0MzEg3cgokXykXFFmVABXA%3D%3D)

[**Join My Campaign**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a2dd177c0b9648d4958057ace3d535cd&_e=2psfuU_blIJ6f-uS4o3qlDcdmkxf2xGwLx7j_EE7jRVMANmK0609sY4MyjEpttWOVzhjPEs9g4gASsKJ1kTM1Y7df7tl5h8E-cklpjsWxW248TbW9G0x-TGXeugFNJQMTBPYQxJRZe_5f_9Cy0RoAGGgSsNsjIi9Qmd1B43JwZ5q6oSWTcrBOz0X-epyaYbxqDW6hwMxN1Kg67DzJl4jtjPn2v56wKnf-GBrLwh9gj0GPWAUvXxElEZe-YRmvQMBhLUzjdBmcwWIB7zvOIGgFZMKuj6u8qEf6GowbHREezsqUevejlny9RnBYJisu5i3635DI4jElT-UKF6Mr_FYzPI0iE9ZHc0SXhD-7j-DtmLFn2hEWYje-ZWzlm8ztva63_ndTU5XzzW5sGxQo5eZnA%3D%3D)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c78dfc4b5be4f28acaf71a02bcef656&_e=3YfWGfZhU1NrLM-kyRTQLg-b_SGflb1KPvMHxSnr3G5sbh5_Ljg0d63PUa3tc_sN4H-aWcXvc6XrcdGd9IdFv1jtZLyHEwVXIK5esOGfh5KwX2h1uNRycUBw1k5HBDmw80rX-1BdEufOtZbE1qtg5WjnIMah4m5ZfhZjw95iltfrnX5YILBQro0TGMLH_GGFdf0TwfyWp0JwzSWN2mKclOGvjI2TyOm8LEQ1auIyH2iLevyMCKa7Wc2GdXvJulc4H5eDB21SUmFczilLKoaBqqEl5NdtiKpKJ3RB4ldaqCprX997n9jbgFXOItzzSow6FRh05F3UoqwtZEnQsB3r5elJyacg2e-xkRtIdKxlM7y284lzEXSTRk5mdlj-VHXOgeXUxB4fpnAJ_IvsaxFXg8fxYExiBq2Sdwg3EsI-q-Y%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c78dfc4b5be4f28acaf71a02bcef656&_e=3YfWGfZhU1NrLM-kyRTQLg-b_SGflb1KPvMHxSnr3G5sbh5_Ljg0d63PUa3tc_sN4H-aWcXvc6XrcdGd9IdFv1jtZLyHEwVXIK5esOGfh5KwX2h1uNRycUBw1k5HBDmw80rX-1BdEufOtZbE1qtg5WjnIMah4m5ZfhZjw95iltfrnX5YILBQro0TGMLH_GGFdf0TwfyWp0JwzSWN2mKclOGvjI2TyOm8LEQ1auIyH2iLevyMCKa7Wc2GdXvJulc4H5eDB21SUmFczilLKoaBqmidgEKJHQ-TMKP2yADDSCnemJzSh1XqQ5IZaAflx3aMaK6K-BKYqyqRJiPt-5OLFmpCrlBgTnX3Yo8TLJCBdiGJl99cFD_GM-3KBuX_HW3C52r3QLB_JfSvn2G6uTrsyVLnUolOpROrIRc9yhr_3io%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c78dfc4b5be4f28acaf71a02bcef656&_e=3YfWGfZhU1NrLM-kyRTQLg-b_SGflb1KPvMHxSnr3G5sbh5_Ljg0d63PUa3tc_sN4H-aWcXvc6XrcdGd9IdFv1jtZLyHEwVXIK5esOGfh5KwX2h1uNRycUBw1k5HBDmw80rX-1BdEufOtZbE1qtg5WjnIMah4m5ZfhZjw95iltfrnX5YILBQro0TGMLH_GGFdf0TwfyWp0JwzSWN2mKclOGvjI2TyOm8LEQ1auIyH2iLevyMCKa7Wc2GdXvJulc4H5eDB21SUmFczilLKoaBqjPj7nAg61CA35WvE_VLCfhyyTsBZvE8Byu35c7j_VIFlsrfb1mD9eJHwom4m8o0jw40vjrW62MX5fRd4qRH3mBn07pH4zbQFo4FByEQ_yTwa4PrlborfBwqEQ72JmJbNtPpCtBJFpslqqvvqAXx8E8%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:

| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d5362882f344dee9a9e7312d5071fde&_e=TfQZRitV8jje_2CNeDCQ7y8mwO0H_odr_sZJAFVpquhdetqSVekE7Nhs1URjTADahJXlBurInwHnAFLt1rz8f4rYEYNGsWlXWhnFwc8oN_PBvWFX9JgMSoeiJ76SMLM-Pem1n85L5VSx_WebY7fd-CHgeU5crkccAAcxwQ1pn6ag8bLsFcl8NQAixihGGMOy06o3IoUZ7FoX7xiqpB8JMi2PgI20y1Zu0uFN4JJ1zRjq2L3q6uemiOJS_RDUn-OzbBiIio1DZDOiBrVQ77DObKaV5f36h4RRxhg5Ux2AjHIq2x9c5iPUKvIr-QBOppMpJqa1wYwua26bS99x1F5DrBYY2t6SpntJ7uRn0PnShPZVsLO447kv2tbRRB9cc_rTttpLX1YZja1TX9NRzo3cYQ%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d5362882f344dee9a9e7312d5071fde&_e=TfQZRitV8jje_2CNeDCQ7y8mwO0H_odr_sZJAFVpquhdetqSVekE7Nhs1URjTADahJXlBurInwHnAFLt1rz8f4rYEYNGsWlXWhnFwc8oN_PBvWFX9JgMSoeiJ76SMLM-Pem1n85L5VSx_WebY7fd-CHgeU5crkccAAcxwQ1pn6ag8bLsFcl8NQAixihGGMOy06o3IoUZ7FoX7xiqpB8JMi2PgI20y1Zu0uFN4JJ1zRj7Ht-5UX0AkcYblswmMnSnGhmdzLevwcUaCENt8rDjXae7tRys-4gnexd5tlRYcBciIt8S9df6qYu45LJsCNpTWZb0C8g2hr8S67WAgna3-p21UcAC_k7NU6ecc9sm_0lwTZIOkxbavUXfrPnv2JBCG7kmLYuyX5EosAQLDxQ_uw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d5362882f344dee9a9e7312d5071fde&_e=TfQZRitV8jje_2CNeDCQ7y8mwO0H_odr_sZJAFVpquhdetqSVekE7Nhs1URjTADahJXlBurInwHnAFLt1rz8f4rYEYNGsWlXWhnFwc8oN_PBvWFX9JgMSoeiJ76SMLM-Pem1n85L5VSx_WebY7fd-CHgeU5crkccAAcxwQ1pn6ag8bLsFcl8NQAixihGGMOy06o3IoUZ7FoX7xiqpB8JMi2PgI20y1Zu0uFN4JJ1zRjyoggQXqGgeseCcOLOYzVbwZNM1DuDFTmncSUZW70zIw_uzYlKbQ3-kVpO7GfSW2wSlPa661jllD03BOvixYuQqwr5fdN2LTEWRcTjX_JiaUeDC7wwAvKpYw_Hi6KSR4XyHos1QNGcqWkQxqmVnqG7TZwf6Mppn61T1FhggSXAwQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d5362882f344dee9a9e7312d5071fde&_e=TfQZRitV8jje_2CNeDCQ7y8mwO0H_odr_sZJAFVpquhdetqSVekE7Nhs1URjTADahJXlBurInwHnAFLt1rz8f4rYEYNGsWlXWhnFwc8oN_PBvWFX9JgMSoeiJ76SMLM-Pem1n85L5VSx_WebY7fd-CHgeU5crkccAAcxwQ1pn6ag8bLsFcl8NQAixihGGMOy06o3IoUZ7FoX7xiqpB8JMi2PgI20y1Zu0uFN4JJ1zRjO30qsSks0SO784Gs3TZN-yj2NTKSomro2qppuQ8QM5ExzQoCm5Tq8de_VWV4krn4SWKOhwm9KdoapQ4QXn3neTVs63zKblaIhBNe2f6cBGe1IZc0l_TAMb8bNsgjftZj-3BIJ2qsppqavJNDnuinYTFutTaQncKfUULreEodzRQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. body:
When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away.

|
---

---
Dear Peter,
The ruling elites in Washington want to ignore the humanitarian, public security, and economic nightmare that is America’ porous southern border.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is the only presidential candidate who has a workable plan to solve our current crisis – which goes far beyond an uncontrolled border.
_If the Biden administration spent half as much effort stemming illegal immigration as it does trying to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, the problem would be solved._
If you agree with me that the safety, prosperity, and well-being of our country comes before politics, please help make sure my name is on the ballot – not only in your state, but in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away.
To oppose the well-funded efforts to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, our campaign _needs to raise $20,000,000 over the next three months_.
[Your gift of $5, $10, $100, or even more is essential if you want to secure the border and undo the damage done by illegal immigration over the last several years.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_18_24_em1rs_nd1&n=3)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_18_24_em1rs_nd1&n=9)
America’s open borders have created a flood of illegal immigrants that has overwhelmed the resources of cities and states across the country and caused a dire humanitarian crisis.
At the same time, ruthless cartels have woven drugs and human trafficking into a multibillion-dollar criminal empire, and violent terrorists are sneaking into our country.
We simply must reassert control over our border by rebuilding the technological and physical barriers dismantled by the Biden administration.
We have both the means and personnel to control the border. We just need to use them.
But we also need to realize that illegal immigration will not abate until we change the conditions that make so many people desperate to flee their homelands. Sadly, the United States has contributed to those conditions. That means America must be committed to...
| ➢ Ending the military adventurism that destabilizes other nations and generates millions of refugees.
---
➢ Holding despotic governments, juntas, and other repressive regimes that trample on basic human rights accountable.
➢ Cooperating with Mexico and Central American nations to improve their economies so people will be able to prosper in their home countries.
With your help, we will make all of this a reality. We will end the immigration crisis the Biden administration has chosen to ignore. But to do it, RFK, Jr. must first be on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
[So please contribute what you can to help our campaign raise the $20,000,000 needed to make sure that your freedom to choose is not taken away.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_18_24_em1rs_nd1&n=10)

clean_body: When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away. | | | | | Dear Peter, The ruling elites in Washington want to ignore the humanitarian, public security, and economic nightmare that is America’ porous southern border. Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is the only presidential candidate who has a workable plan to solve our current crisis – which goes far beyond an uncontrolled border. If the Biden administration spent half as much effort stemming illegal immigration as it does trying to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, the problem would be solved. If you agree with me that the safety, prosperity, and well-being of our country comes before politics, please help make sure my name is on the ballot – not only in your state, but in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away. To oppose the well-funded efforts to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, our campaign needs to raise $20,000,000 over the next three months. America’s open borders have created a flood of illegal immigrants that has overwhelmed the resources of cities and states across the country and caused a dire humanitarian crisis. At the same time, ruthless cartels have woven drugs and human trafficking into a multibillion-dollar criminal empire, and violent terrorists are sneaking into our country. We simply must reassert control over our border by rebuilding the technological and physical barriers dismantled by the Biden administration. We have both the means and personnel to control the border. We just need to use them. But we also need to realize that illegal immigration will not abate until we change the conditions that make so many people desperate to flee their homelands. Sadly, the United States has contributed to those conditions. That means America must be committed to... | ➢ Ending the military adventurism that destabilizes other nations and generates millions of refugees. ➢ Holding despotic governments, juntas, and other repressive regimes that trample on basic human rights accountable. ➢ Cooperating with Mexico and Central American nations to improve their economies so people will be able to prosper in their home countries. With your help, we will make all of this a reality. We will end the immigration crisis the Biden administration has chosen to ignore. But to do it, RFK, Jr. must first be on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Thank you for your support. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Friend, It’s no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.
---
| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ →](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkT_r2zAQQD-NvNnoX2Rr8BBwvZSUUAIdxUW62KKS7Upy0nz7kjZ06NLf-o573OO-ncwJfPDL9AUi9iUVk7IBNMsz1993F9ZHvW8OChpOuawpr1lnWOV62XInVIU9a2nHVSs6Ws295Lq1lErbdbTV0N2uB6TqqnUrHFAKle9fHspZx4Q8CN0A09oydRNUWKU1I5JCwFRyU2ZMuO3X4C0sBSE2do1V6OdStkzEkfCR8HH7GRqfC-HjtOT19rT2x0zEuJdo8roni0QMx0-EqxeJ6PweiRgwgg9vaCFu4KeFiOHzn-LzeSBc3XFxazILxL-ON_rPhk0Ixd_x33FOlojh8vUilWKiSr3bHj4En1VLJJ1eJ_1OLB_-w68AAAD__1XlkFk)
---
| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we’ll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It’s a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I’ve been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I’m asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: The Real 'Banned Books' in School Libraries | 'Non-partisan' PAC Makes Partisan Donations + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week.

Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty's Weekly Reads.

What We’re Hearing: “Governor Shapiro would have you think the Commonwealth is abounding in riches and the cash is burning a hole in our pockets, but this is very misleading when the Commonwealth has a structural deficit, and the Governor’s proposed budget does nothing to address it.” - Sen. Seth Grove (R-York)

Subscribe to our daily email list (https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3b749423c&utm_source=www.d3playbook.com&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=sample-broad-liberty-daily-update-2-9-2024) and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox.

** 1. What books are really ‘banned’ in local school districts? (https://broadandliberty.com/2024/02/16/beth-ann-rosica-what-books-are-really-banned-in-local-school-districts/)
------------------------------------------------------------

By Beth Ann Rosica

“Last month, this point was made quite clear in an article in The Free Press (https://www.thefp.com/p/the-truth-about-banned-books?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email) , entitled ‘The Truth About Banned Books.’ The author, James Fishback, surveyed the library catalogs for thirty-five of the largest public school districts in eight red and six blue states. “What I discovered isn’t so much a problem of banned books. It’s that kids are often exposed to only one side of the story.”

Fishback’s research showed that the vast majority of districts had significantly more liberal leaning books than conservative leaning books. He opined, ‘should libraries carry books that peddle progressive ideas? Absolutely, but only if they carry books that advocate for conservative ones too, so our young minds can benefit from the full spectrum of opinions. Unfortunately, in the school districts I surveyed, this isn’t the case.’

Given the amount of debate on this topic locally and the impact on local school board elections, I decided to use Fishback’s methodology to analyze library holdings in twelve districts across the suburban collar counties.”

Why It Matters. “While many of us would like to stop talking about library books and focus on the real task at hand, addressing learning loss, the progressives can’t seem to let it go. Some of them insisted on being sworn in on a stack of so-called ‘banned books.’ Please ignore the fact that these books are available at the local public library and Amazon.

The point that I assume these newly elected officials were trying to make is that these books were under scrutiny for being located in a public school library. Never mind that school libraries have limited space and librarians must make decisions about what to procure, maintain, and discard from the collection on a regular basis. Someone is making a choice every day about what’s available in the library, and it can’t be every book ever published.”

Quotable. “The next time you hear someone talking about book bans, ask them if Woke Racism or Capitalism and Freedom are in their school library.”

Continue Reading (https://broadandliberty.com/2024/02/16/beth-ann-rosica-what-books-are-really-banned-in-local-school-districts/)

** 2. PA nonprofit involved in controversial 2020 election grants now making donations to Democrat-aligned PACs (https://broadandliberty.com/2024/02/14/pa-nonprofit-involved-in-controversial-2020-election-grants-now-making-donations-to-democrat-aligned-pacs/)
------------------------------------------------------------

By Todd Shepherd

“A relatively new nonprofit that orchestrated the distribution of grants to county election offices all across Pennsylvania in the runup to the 2020 presidential vote has recently made donations to Democratic-aligned political action committees, further undercutting the organization’s own claims it is nonpartisan.

The revelations shed more light on a nonprofit that, while launched in the Trump era, has remained active and has hosted voter registration parties in Bucks County in advance of Tuesday’s special election for House District 140. Those parties have included live bands with giveaways like free coffee and funnel cakes, and ‘amazing prizes like couches and coolers!’

According to its website (https://www.thevoterproject.com/) , ‘The Voter Project is a non-partisan, non-profit organization dedicated to ensuring all Pennsylvania voters can cast a ballot in a safe, secure, and convenient way.’ The project is organized as a 501(c)4, meaning it is a nonprofit, but it can engage in certain activities that a 501(c)3 could not.”

Why It Matters. When is a non-partisan group not non-partisan? When it funnels all its money to groups supporting one party. Todd’s reporting shows why groups’ claims to be unbiased should not be taken at face value. Trust, but verify.

Quotable. “The Voter Project’s 990 does not indicate any grants to any organizations that could arguably be characterized as right of center.”

Continue Reading (https://broadandliberty.com/2024/02/14/pa-nonprofit-involved-in-controversial-2020-election-grants-now-making-donations-to-democrat-aligned-pacs/)

** 3. Lightning Round
------------------------------------------------------------
* Seth Grove: The surplus, the rainy day fund, and why Shapiro’s budget gets it wrong (https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/mNI1PUhx4feUsWfHGxEW2yeT0reO4NtoEKggPd7_ubTBeitVKafTvZ02spU3kVWjM9-UA4YvOjqW5F3accZh9DqAMM4zMg_lcrSBetT4rT6hBxnH8-vEizaBHA2P7A-EVEaG4QxIjHTa1VSKahmOnUNzDO6pHBvJjM8ftq-2Fj0clj0QBxnlt4NCNOH0YKtHPgNiKLUrakv9f9lZoZz_MG0WT6VmOCw6kK1ZCVIRsBa7L7BvD5ckgk_RKig7_2zMTq-5seYPPc2ysYZjwLQ-GQbG1GVeneeZMitf4dvD3QuEGd-QKb5Ha-IxJ2k4jamR/43p/E_twoHZ8R-mIxhZ15dCNuA/h24/ybSYJCDFottZFRSM8h2YOd7TFjG1XR5t8pdlX7CN2Ig)

What We’re Reading...
The Way of the Fetterman? Ruy Texiera this week wrote on his Substack, The Liberal Patriot, about the one Democrat who seems to be beating the odds in appealing to moderate and independent voters in a swing state (https://www.liberalpatriot.com/p/the-way-of-the-fetterman) : John Fetterman. While his fellow Dems seem terrified of offending the activist left, Fetterman has become the surprising standard-bearer for normal people. Any Democrat — or Republican — who followed his lead would be a force to be reckoned with in the Keystone State.

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. Good morning, and welcome to Broad + Liberty's Weekly Reads. What We’re Hearing: “Governor Shapiro would have you think the Commonwealth is abounding in riches and the cash is burning a hole in our pockets, but this is very misleading when the Commonwealth has a structural deficit, and the Governor’s proposed budget does nothing to address it.” - Sen. Seth Grove (R-York) Subscribe to our daily email list () and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. 1. What books are really ‘banned’ in local school districts? () By Beth Ann Rosica “Last month, this point was made quite clear in an article in The Free Press () , entitled ‘The Truth About Banned Books.’ The author, James Fishback, surveyed the library catalogs for thirty-five of the largest public school districts in eight red and six blue states. “What I discovered isn’t so much a problem of banned books. It’s that kids are often exposed to only one side of the story.” Fishback’s research showed that the vast majority of districts had significantly more liberal leaning books than conservative leaning books. He opined, ‘should libraries carry books that peddle progressive ideas? Absolutely, but only if they carry books that advocate for conservative ones too, so our young minds can benefit from the full spectrum of opinions. Unfortunately, in the school districts I surveyed, this isn’t the case.’ Given the amount of debate on this topic locally and the impact on local school board elections, I decided to use Fishback’s methodology to analyze library holdings in twelve districts across the suburban collar counties.” Why It Matters. “While many of us would like to stop talking about library books and focus on the real task at hand, addressing learning loss, the progressives can’t seem to let it go. Some of them insisted on being sworn in on a stack of so-called ‘banned books.’ Please ignore the fact that these books are available at the local public library and Amazon. The point that I assume these newly elected officials were trying to make is that these books were under scrutiny for being located in a public school library. Never mind that school libraries have limited space and librarians must make decisions about what to procure, maintain, and discard from the collection on a regular basis. Someone is making a choice every day about what’s available in the library, and it can’t be every book ever published.” Quotable. “The next time you hear someone talking about book bans, ask them if Woke Racism or Capitalism and Freedom are in their school library.” Continue Reading () 2. PA nonprofit involved in controversial 2020 election grants now making donations to Democrat-aligned PACs () By Todd Shepherd “A relatively new nonprofit that orchestrated the distribution of grants to county election offices all across Pennsylvania in the runup to the 2020 presidential vote has recently made donations to Democratic-aligned political action committees, further undercutting the organization’s own claims it is nonpartisan. The revelations shed more light on a nonprofit that, while launched in the Trump era, has remained active and has hosted voter registration parties in Bucks County in advance of Tuesday’s special election for House District 140. Those parties have included live bands with giveaways like free coffee and funnel cakes, and ‘amazing prizes like couches and coolers!’ According to its website () , ‘The Voter Project is a non-partisan, non-profit organization dedicated to ensuring all Pennsylvania voters can cast a ballot in a safe, secure, and convenient way.’ The project is organized as a 501(c)4, meaning it is a nonprofit, but it can engage in certain activities that a 501(c)3 could not.” Why It Matters. When is a non-partisan group not non-partisan? When it funnels all its money to groups supporting one party. Todd’s reporting shows why groups’ claims to be unbiased should not be taken at face value. Trust, but verify. Quotable. “The Voter Project’s 990 does not indicate any grants to any organizations that could arguably be characterized as right of center.” Continue Reading () 3. Lightning Round Seth Grove: The surplus, the rainy day fund, and why Shapiro’s budget gets it wrong () Guy Ciarrocchi: America — Out of many, one () Gina L. Pope: Did taxpayers pay for Shapiro’s vacation flight to Hilton Head? () Andy Bloom: Hur Report tells voters their suspicions about Biden were true () Lawsuits allege government union officers engaged in dubious financial schemes () What We’re Reading... The Way of the Fetterman? Ruy Texiera this week wrote on his Substack, The Liberal Patriot, about the one Democrat who seems to be beating the odds in appealing to moderate and independent voters in a swing state () : John Fetterman. While his fellow Dems seem terrified of offending the activist left, Fetterman has become the surprising standard-bearer for normal people. Any Democrat — or Republican — who followed his lead would be a force to be reckoned with in the Keystone State. Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you.
