name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff7a631db20f4b15b036769ef9a182b9&_e=xxNgYKo_rs6VFRvcZiWzzFZk_YZnddM2wvMRcJEwZ6dw23Fy4Cr9Fi6oBlopLhsvvvDBdTlAms0Rmhpb_ixVuMhHVRZhNfnhC9wt8NLDWXP3DqmgPZ9aDzf3XiVPPK8gCVSk3zThOESyewdFgPsF1-PEgnzGVJLoonFC8ifTjqN-1-_oIutEBJY-N6mi9R6qDsC_M9PbmjCZwMZehztCIpG8bQXjloRg8VDCjKx4La4gM7NnVpYfk4xK4dVGNwLeK2SQsr0lgy8-guwtwx3SZZ27Uuitdc3NruveLeSVo5zhAUf_ZqqAHX8ioNMoajG48t_BiWXQ8EHBUtIrS497vyYGb7S1Q5Y42ShCrGefBlcz0qNaEezPJL49oBe1O7qBG6cujfja_BHEpsJYuNWqffNrknB0VJPmAtq62ot5IiY%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff7a631db20f4b15b036769ef9a182b9&_e=xxNgYKo_rs6VFRvcZiWzzFZk_YZnddM2wvMRcJEwZ6dw23Fy4Cr9Fi6oBlopLhsvvvDBdTlAms0Rmhpb_ixVuMhHVRZhNfnhC9wt8NLDWXP3DqmgPZ9aDzf3XiVPPK8gCVSk3zThOESyewdFgPsF1-PEgnzGVJLoonFC8ifTjqN-1-_oIutEBJY-N6mi9R6qDsC_M9PbmjCZwMZehztCIpG8bQXjloRg8VDCjKx4La4gM7NnVpYfk4xK4dVGNwLeK2SQsr0lgy8-guwtwx3SZWu1DDQWC2r7JmaG1PC0uN_-Bsnl1wvfcyH5r0PO14vDaN0UUJE_zI2m7v7psJamrLcHpcvsTkjJpl4PCWx0GDXDw43DQJJIjknRfx4VV4-q2X-oTvFC5sOfR_qW9HrY6eYoxDSb4bF53n525vIvWew%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff7a631db20f4b15b036769ef9a182b9&_e=xxNgYKo_rs6VFRvcZiWzzFZk_YZnddM2wvMRcJEwZ6dw23Fy4Cr9Fi6oBlopLhsvvvDBdTlAms0Rmhpb_ixVuMhHVRZhNfnhC9wt8NLDWXP3DqmgPZ9aDzf3XiVPPK8gCVSk3zThOESyewdFgPsF1-PEgnzGVJLoonFC8ifTjqN-1-_oIutEBJY-N6mi9R6qDsC_M9PbmjCZwMZehztCIpG8bQXjloRg8VDCjKx4La4gM7NnVpYfk4xK4dVGNwLeK2SQsr0lgy8-guwtwx3SZe-gy9nA2FrU5kNwQZt188iCz8yamajSKk4C3zFqSKaPehGycVlwMOzN8S6UQwjayM20DsNAvnEj3YeArzsLzFiuSVbovE-QIMjvqbwqt03s6De80MUN0wcT9KzzvRuufdjm2hL_xqv9oZxb-0k7gUQ%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Fellow Conservative,

With over 20 years of raising money under his belt, it’s no surprise that my opponent has had no trouble raising more than **$5.5 million in the final quarter of 2023.**

With more than 18 years of chumming it up with Washington Elite under his belt, it’s no wonder that the most powerful Democrats in the country are _**rushing**_ to spend as much money as possible to secure a fourth Senate term for Jon Tester.

Whether it’s the **25 million dollars** Tester raised in 2023 or the **44.9 million dollars** his friends in DC have **earmarked** to spend on TV ADS in Montana this fall, one thing is sure: Democrats know that I am the one who has what it takes to beat Jon Tester.
**
Navy SEALS fight to win. We don’t quit, and we don’t lose. **

And Jon Tester is ripe for defeat.

| [H.B. 2](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irQShdgryTWS5cqtgYcfIkr3vsqRX8dPHfhNaeiVUwegIhtpDpHVmmgFnxoa7quMzz_aBZfVDNJu9uT2oO8rYPyZoHIgZfaIgNUoPJ7IPCHqR_rlBZnp1Rz9L7DdPSNGATyFZpMvOf6IYepHDVMiNGcyKqu0mfIruf9M-FlQx6gowimDqbTFg5YAVW2DgjEuxAT-4O4rI2c=&c=dsQsI3yLGHMHBU_BOBEoO0s6ywzknyCSoGnPw6RBMx5Kwc1j1GlNfA==&ch=GT78LcwQy7Sq0ylt--voOGhuAA7wVJA7Gb0SfYOCtHmqNhdAk2f4ag==) Patron: Helmer Purchase, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalty. Creates a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person who imports, sells, manufactures, purchases, or transfers an assault firearm, as that term is defined in the bill, and prohibits a person who has been convicted of such violation from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm for a period of three years from the date of conviction. The bill provides that an assault firearm does not include any firearm that is an antique firearm, has been rendered permanently inoperable, is manually operated by bolt, pump, lever, or slide action, or was manufactured before July 1, 2024. The bill also prohibits the sale of a large capacity ammunition feeding device, as that term is defined in the bill. The bill provides that any person who willfully and intentionally (i) sells an assault firearm to another person or (ii) purchases an assault firearm from another person is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor and that any person who imports, sells, barters, or transfers a large capacity ammunition feeding device is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person younger than 21 years of age to import, sell, manufacture, purchase, possess, transport, or transfer an assault firearm regardless of the date of manufacture of such assault firearm. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ [15.2-915.5](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irQShdgryTWS5cqtgYcfIkr3vsqRX8dPHfhNaeiVUwegIhtpDpHVmmgFnxoa7quM4vDKOrXQME1uc3RN56zK52nAnbT1cXGCy5ETZjqwobW4yTt-qpMSB3jJ_0IXbqIbuKTXBq252P-WpF7eKQM9RelbN_yNWrP_vclP3SKNUQsigCfqsPoORA==&c=dsQsI3yLGHMHBU_BOBEoO0s6ywzknyCSoGnPw6RBMx5Kwc1j1GlNfA==&ch=GT78LcwQy7Sq0ylt--voOGhuAA7wVJA7Gb0SfYOCtHmqNhdAk2f4ag==), Prohibits the manufacture, importation, sale or offer to sell, possession, transfer, or transportation of an auto sear, defined in the bill as a device made of any material designed for use in converting a firearm to shoot automatically more than one shot, without manual reloading, by a single function of the trigger. A violation is punishable as a Class 6 felony. Manufacture, import, sale, transfer, or possession of plastic firearms and unfinished frames or receivers and unserialized firearms prohibited; penalties. Creates a Class 5 felony for any person who knowingly manufactures or assembles, imports, purchases, sells, transfers, or possesses any firearm that, after removal of all parts other than a major component, as defined in the bill, is not detectable as a firearm when subjected to inspection by the types of detection devices, including X-ray machines, commonly used at airports, government buildings, schools, correctional facilities, and other locations for security screening. The bill updates language regarding the types of detection devices that are used at such locations for detecting plastic firearms. Under current law, it is unlawful to manufacture, import, sell, transfer, or possess any plastic firearm and a violation is punishable as a Class 5 felony. The bill also creates a Class 1 misdemeanor, which is punishable as a Class 4 felony for a second or subsequent offense, making it unlawful for any person to knowingly import, purchase, sell, offer for sale, or transfer ownership of any completed or unfinished frame or receiver, unless the completed or unfinished frame or receiver (i) is deemed to be a firearm pursuant to federal law and (ii) is imprinted with a valid serial number. The bill creates a Class 1 misdemeanor, which is punishable as a Class 4 felony for a second or subsequent offense, making it unlawful for any person to knowingly possess a firearm that it not imprinted with a valid serial number, or to manufacture or assemble, cause to be manufactured or assembled, import, purchase, sell, offer for sale, or transfer ownership of any firearm that is not imprinted with a valid serial number. The portions of the bill prohibiting unfinished frames or receivers and unserialized firearms have a delayed effective date of January 1, 2025. Requires any person who possesses a firearm in a residence where such person knows that a minor under 18 years of age or a person who is prohibited by law from possessing a firearm is present to store such firearm and the ammunition for such firearm in a locked container, compartment, or cabinet that is inaccessible to such minor or prohibited person. The bill provides that a violation is a Class 4 misdemeanor. The bill exempts (i) any person in lawful possession of a firearm who carries such firearm on or about his person and (ii) the storage of antique firearms and provides that the lawful authorization of a minor to access a firearm is not a violation of the bill's provisions. The bill also requires firearm dealers to post a notice stating such firearm storage requirements and the penalty for improperly storing such firearms. Makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person to knowingly possess in or transport into the building of any hospital that provides mental health services or developmental services in the Commonwealth, including an emergency department or other facility rendering emergency medical care, any (i) firearm or other weapon designed or intended to propel a missile or projectile of any kind; (ii) knife, except a pocket knife having a folding metal blade of less than three inches; or (iii) other dangerous weapon, including explosives and stun weapons. The bill also provides that notice of such prohibitions shall be posted conspicuously at the public entrance of any hospital and no person shall be convicted of the offense if such notice is not posted, unless such person had actual notice of the prohibitions. The bill provides that any such firearm, knife, explosive, or weapon shall be subject to seizure by a law-enforcement officer and forfeited to the Commonwealth and specifies exceptions to the prohibition. Requires the governing board of each public institution of higher education to develop and implement policies requiring that a campus safety and emergency preparedness training program be provided to and completed by all first-year students by the last day of each student's first academic term and reviewed biennially by each returning student at such institution. The bill provides that such training program will focus on active shooter event preparedness and may be offered in any format and include any supplementary materials as the governing board of each such institution deems appropriate. Finally, the bill directs the State Council of Higher Education for Virginia to encourage private institutions of higher education to develop and implement policies requiring a campus safety and emergency preparedness training program be provided to each first-year student by the last day of each student's first academic term and reviewed biennially by each returning student at such institution. [H.B. 776](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irQShdgryTWS5cqtgYcfIkr3vsqRX8dPHfhNaeiVUwegIhtpDpHVmmgFnxoa7quM5cD9BX5ey15f903QSdsDE-Xwb6lr6umG2BoQm3yx76E7pL0f9LOu4mIm031G9zPoZVAJVYiSww4ssfM1ig5X9L_l1vUN2ZZgUW8A09h6r-I_OST1PZ4QiaODkjtwk_G5jtErDLr139k=&c=dsQsI3yLGHMHBU_BOBEoO0s6ywzknyCSoGnPw6RBMx5Kwc1j1GlNfA==&ch=GT78LcwQy7Sq0ylt--voOGhuAA7wVJA7Gb0SfYOCtHmqNhdAk2f4ag==) Patron: Herring Minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship; waiver. Allows individuals who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence who have resided in the United States for no less than 60 months and who are both eligible for and have applied for United States citizenship to qualify for the positions of chief of police and all police officers of any locality, all deputy sheriffs and jail officers in the Commonwealth, and all law-enforcement officers. The bill allows any agency or department employing law-enforcement officers to hire, recruit, or refer an individual who is a citizen of the United States over another individual who meets such qualifications if such individuals are equally qualified. Current law only allows citizens of the United States to qualify for the named positions; the citizenship requirement can only be waived for good cause upon request of a sheriff or chief of police or the director or chief executive of any agency or department employing law-enforcement officers to the Department of Criminal Justice Services. A BILL to amend and reenact § [15.2-1705](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irQShdgryTWS5cqtgYcfIkr3vsqRX8dPHfhNaeiVUwegIhtpDpHVmtOfwY8BuK6CEgf9Xu0R2vjnjb6x2b8UDU9iEKb6y29xh54wEcSYGDX6C6wig-QkVJvNvRKFuorM5henG9Zxm4BkqN3r6ZLOPzOT9yuaCcQqkzeHGsXCjJo=&c=dsQsI3yLGHMHBU_BOBEoO0s6ywzknyCSoGnPw6RBMx5Kwc1j1GlNfA==&ch=GT78LcwQy7Sq0ylt--voOGhuAA7wVJA7Gb0SfYOCtHmqNhdAk2f4ag==) of the Code of Virginia, relating to minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship; waiver.24102761D

Increases the minimum wage from the current rate of $12.00 per hour to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2025, and to $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2026. The bill satisfies a reenactment clause included in Chapters 1204 and 1242 of the Acts of Assembly of 2020. [H.B. 107](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irQShdgryTWS5cqtgYcfIkr3vsqRX8dPHfhNaeiVUwegIhtpDpHVmmgFnxoa7quMSOtsU2xChFrdVb_mRUpurRcJb_UvvDPYp23TahnZFjwbtRu3MKLa3iLWxx9k5wjeb6PqHmTbXtnamWEh-y_C69pOPmdva4nJuNKqmEu0Z7j48ebh-aOxn0E9Dt0KAQXWEz9u4Q-XPUQ=&c=dsQsI3yLGHMHBU_BOBEoO0s6ywzknyCSoGnPw6RBMx5Kwc1j1GlNfA==&ch=GT78LcwQy7Sq0ylt--voOGhuAA7wVJA7Gb0SfYOCtHmqNhdAk2f4ag==) Patron: Sullivan Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund created. Creates the Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund to assist private developers with non-utility costs associated with the installation of public electric vehicle charging stations in certain localities. The bill provides that a private developer is eligible to receive grants of 70 percent of such non-utility costs for public electric vehicle charging stations installed in a city or county that meets the criteria of a distressed locality, as defined in the bill. The bill has an expiration date of July 1, 2028. Amends the provision that prohibits an employer from discriminating against an employee for such employee's lawful use of cannabis product pursuant to a valid written certification issued by a practitioner for the treatment or to eliminate the symptoms of the employee's diagnosed condition or disease, with certain exceptions, by specifying that such use must conform to the laws of the Commonwealth and that such protections extend to the employees of the Commonwealth and other public bodies. [H.B. 819](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001irQShdgryTWS5cqtgYcfIkr3vsqRX8dPHfhNaeiVUwegIhtpDpHVmmgFnxoa7quMfblcyJ1Vwb7s6UU_eg8p72D78aDVvSVnQJx5GpzVj-r31jsfKYapoqGadKnImUlQwuz3JIGkyGH6QuDaTEQm9Wi-njC46ugOJOFIvKnj_01iS4erGOwlIBGK4pnhS48P1WuGlO0X-KA=&c=dsQsI3yLGHMHBU_BOBEoO0s6ywzknyCSoGnPw6RBMx5Kwc1j1GlNfA==&ch=GT78LcwQy7Sq0ylt--voOGhuAA7wVJA7Gb0SfYOCtHmqNhdAk2f4ag==) Patron: Mundon King Health insurance; coverage for prescription contraceptives. Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage under any health insurance contract, policy, or plan that includes coverage for prescription drugs on an outpatient basis, for any prescribed contraceptive drug or contraceptive device. The bill prohibits a health insurance carrier from imposing upon any person receiving contraceptive benefits pursuant to the provisions of the bill any copayment, coinsurance payment, or fee. The provisions of the bill apply to health insurance contracts, policies, or plans delivered, issued for delivery, or renewed on and after January 1, 2025. # ACTION, ACTION, ACTION
---
|
Friends, Monday is President's Day. And to celebrate Democrats are coming after your gun rights, yet again.
Please notice the number of gun control bills that are coming up on Monday morning in Senate Courts of Justice at 8am. Let your voice be heard.
We can complain and grumble but better yet, we can do something about it on Monday.
YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home.
YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time.
This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING.
Above I have listed the dockets for THIS MONDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Monday that are of interest to you.
Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely?
Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill.
It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Monday's docket.

| Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly.
I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.
If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars?
It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | Senate Bills Up MONDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | Senate Committee Public Hearings for MONDAY BILLS TO WATCH Monday's Dockets | | == | == Patron: Helmer Purchase, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalty. Creates a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person who imports, sells, manufactures, purchases, or transfers an assault firearm, as that term is defined in the bill, and prohibits a person who has been convicted of such violation from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm for a period of three years from the date of conviction. The bill provides that an assault firearm does not include any firearm that is an antique firearm, has been rendered permanently inoperable, is manually operated by bolt, pump, lever, or slide action, or was manufactured before July 1, 2024. The bill also prohibits the sale of a large capacity ammunition feeding device, as that term is defined in the bill. The bill provides that any person who willfully and intentionally (i) sells an assault firearm to another person or (ii) purchases an assault firearm from another person is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor and that any person who imports, sells, barters, or transfers a large capacity ammunition feeding device is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person younger than 21 years of age to import, sell, manufacture, purchase, possess, transport, or transfer an assault firearm regardless of the date of manufacture of such assault firearm. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, and == of the Code of Virginia and to amend the Code of Virginia by adding sections numbered ==, ==, ==, and ==, relating to purchase, possession, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalty.24105958D == Patron: Jones Manufacture, importation, sale, etc., of auto sears; prohibition; penalty. Prohibits the manufacture, importation, sale or offer to sell, possession, transfer, or transportation of an auto sear, defined in the bill as a device made of any material designed for use in converting a firearm to shoot automatically more than one shot, without manual reloading, by a single function of the trigger. A violation is punishable as a Class 6 felony. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to manufacture, importation, sale, etc., of auto sears; prohibition; penalty.24105447D == Patron: Simon Manufacture, import, sale, transfer, or possession of plastic firearms and unfinished frames or receivers and unserialized firearms prohibited; penalties. Creates a Class 5 felony for any person who knowingly manufactures or assembles, imports, purchases, sells, transfers, or possesses any firearm that, after removal of all parts other than a major component, as defined in the bill, is not detectable as a firearm when subjected to inspection by the types of detection devices, including X-ray machines, commonly used at airports, government buildings, schools, correctional facilities, and other locations for security screening. The bill updates language regarding the types of detection devices that are used at such locations for detecting plastic firearms. Under current law, it is unlawful to manufacture, import, sell, transfer, or possess any plastic firearm and a violation is punishable as a Class 5 felony. The bill also creates a Class 1 misdemeanor, which is punishable as a Class 4 felony for a second or subsequent offense, making it unlawful for any person to knowingly import, purchase, sell, offer for sale, or transfer ownership of any completed or unfinished frame or receiver, unless the completed or unfinished frame or receiver (i) is deemed to be a firearm pursuant to federal law and (ii) is imprinted with a valid serial number. The bill creates a Class 1 misdemeanor, which is punishable as a Class 4 felony for a second or subsequent offense, making it unlawful for any person to knowingly possess a firearm that it not imprinted with a valid serial number, or to manufacture or assemble, cause to be manufactured or assembled, import, purchase, sell, offer for sale, or transfer ownership of any firearm that is not imprinted with a valid serial number. The portions of the bill prohibiting unfinished frames or receivers and unserialized firearms have a delayed effective date of January 1, 2025. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia and to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to manufacture, import, sale, transfer, or possession of plastic firearms and unfinished frames or receivers and unserialized firearms prohibited; penalties.24105692D == Patron: Simon Storage of firearms in a residence where a minor or person prohibited from possessing a firearm is present; penalty. Requires any person who possesses a firearm in a residence where such person knows that a minor under 18 years of age or a person who is prohibited by law from possessing a firearm is present to store such firearm and the ammunition for such firearm in a locked container, compartment, or cabinet that is inaccessible to such minor or prohibited person. The bill provides that a violation is a Class 4 misdemeanor. The bill exempts (i) any person in lawful possession of a firearm who carries such firearm on or about his person and (ii) the storage of antique firearms and provides that the lawful authorization of a minor to access a firearm is not a violation of the bill's provisions. The bill also requires firearm dealers to post a notice stating such firearm storage requirements and the penalty for improperly storing such firearms. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to storage of firearms in a residence where a minor or person prohibited from possessing a firearm is present; penalty.24104245D == Patron: Hernandez Weapons; possession or transportation; facility that provides mental health services or developmental services; penalty. Makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person to knowingly possess in or transport into the building of any hospital that provides mental health services or developmental services in the Commonwealth, including an emergency department or other facility rendering emergency medical care, any (i) firearm or other weapon designed or intended to propel a missile or projectile of any kind; (ii) knife, except a pocket knife having a folding metal blade of less than three inches; or (iii) other dangerous weapon, including explosives and stun weapons. The bill also provides that notice of such prohibitions shall be posted conspicuously at the public entrance of any hospital and no person shall be convicted of the offense if such notice is not posted, unless such person had actual notice of the prohibitions. The bill provides that any such firearm, knife, explosive, or weapon shall be subject to seizure by a law-enforcement officer and forfeited to the Commonwealth and specifies exceptions to the prohibition. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding a section numbered ==, relating to weapons; possession or transportation; hospital that provides mental health services or developmental services; penalty.24106763D == Patron: Sickles Assault firearms; purchase; age requirement; penalty. Provides that in order to purchase an assault firearm a person must be 21 years of age or older. The bill also expands the definition of "assault firearm" as the term applies to criminal history record information checks. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to assault firearms; purchase; age requirement; penalty.24106297D == Patron: Laufer Firearm in unattended motor vehicle; civil penalty. Provides that no person shall leave, place, or store a handgun in an unattended motor vehicle, as defined in the bill, when such handgun is visible to any person who is outside such motor vehicle. The bill provides that any person violating such prohibition is subject to a civil penalty of no more than $500 and such unattended motor vehicle may be subject to removal for safekeeping. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 2 of Chapter 12 of Title 46.2 a section numbered ==, relating to firearm in unattended motor vehicle; civil penalty.24105291D | | == | == Patron: Torian Institutions of higher education; campus safety and emergency preparedness training; first-year completion and biennial review. Requires the governing board of each public institution of higher education to develop and implement policies requiring that a campus safety and emergency preparedness training program be provided to and completed by all first-year students by the last day of each student's first academic term and reviewed biennially by each returning student at such institution. The bill provides that such training program will focus on active shooter event preparedness and may be offered in any format and include any supplementary materials as the governing board of each such institution deems appropriate. Finally, the bill directs the State Council of Higher Education for Virginia to encourage private institutions of higher education to develop and implement policies requiring a campus safety and emergency preparedness training program be provided to each first-year student by the last day of each student's first academic term and reviewed biennially by each returning student at such institution. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 2 of Chapter 8 of Title 23.1 a section numbered ==, relating to institutions of higher education; campus safety and emergency preparedness training; first-year completion and biennial review.24107101D | | == | == Patron: Watts Local regulation of door-to-door vendors; political parties exempted. Provides that local ordinances regulating the activities of door-to-door vendors shall not apply to any person participating in certain specified political activities. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to local regulation of door-to-door vendors; political parties exempted.24102435D == Patron: Campbell Virginia Economic Development Partnership Authority; eligible site for site development grant; minimum acreage requirement. Reduces from 100 acres to 50 acres the minimum number of contiguous acres required for a site that is not a brownfield to satisfy the acreage requirement to be considered eligible to receive a site development grant from the Virginia Business Ready Sites Program Fund by the Virginia Economic Development Partnership Authority. The bill also exempts from the minimum acreage requirement any site that exists in a locality that has three or fewer eligible sites that are at least 100 acres. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to Virginia Economic Development Partnership Authority; eligible site for site development grant.24102915D == Patron: Herring Minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship; waiver. Allows individuals who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence who have resided in the United States for no less than 60 months and who are both eligible for and have applied for United States citizenship to qualify for the positions of chief of police and all police officers of any locality, all deputy sheriffs and jail officers in the Commonwealth, and all law-enforcement officers. The bill allows any agency or department employing law-enforcement officers to hire, recruit, or refer an individual who is a citizen of the United States over another individual who meets such qualifications if such individuals are equally qualified. Current law only allows citizens of the United States to qualify for the named positions; the citizenship requirement can only be waived for good cause upon request of a sheriff or chief of police or the director or chief executive of any agency or department employing law-enforcement officers to the Department of Criminal Justice Services. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to minimum qualifications for law-enforcement officers; citizenship; waiver.24102761D | | == House Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar ... == == == == == == == == == == == == | | == | == Patron: Ward Minimum wage. Increases the minimum wage from the current rate of $12.00 per hour to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2025, and to $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2026. The bill satisfies a reenactment clause included in Chapters 1204 and 1242 of the Acts of Assembly of 2020. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to minimum wage.24100469D == Patron: Sullivan Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund created. Creates the Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund to assist private developers with non-utility costs associated with the installation of public electric vehicle charging stations in certain localities. The bill provides that a private developer is eligible to receive grants of 70 percent of such non-utility costs for public electric vehicle charging stations installed in a city or county that meets the criteria of a distressed locality, as defined in the bill. The bill has an expiration date of July 1, 2028. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Chapter 17 of Title 45.2 an article numbered 10, consisting of sections numbered ==, ==, and ==, relating to Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund created.24101049D == Patron: Helmer Employee protections; medicinal use of cannabis product. Amends the provision that prohibits an employer from discriminating against an employee for such employee's lawful use of cannabis product pursuant to a valid written certification issued by a practitioner for the treatment or to eliminate the symptoms of the employee's diagnosed condition or disease, with certain exceptions, by specifying that such use must conform to the laws of the Commonwealth and that such protections extend to the employees of the Commonwealth and other public bodies. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to employee protections; medicinal use of cannabis product.24100935D == Patron: Mundon King Health insurance; coverage for prescription contraceptives. Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage under any health insurance contract, policy, or plan that includes coverage for prescription drugs on an outpatient basis, for any prescribed contraceptive drug or contraceptive device. The bill prohibits a health insurance carrier from imposing upon any person receiving contraceptive benefits pursuant to the provisions of the bill any copayment, coinsurance payment, or fee. The provisions of the bill apply to health insurance contracts, policies, or plans delivered, issued for delivery, or renewed on and after January 1, 2025. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to health insurance; coverage for prescription contraceptives.24107022D | | == | Click above for agenda | ACTION, ACTION, ACTION | Friends, Monday is President's Day. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09c9caf84abb4710ae2908b21f933bfb&_e=smSJ_tGcVZtU95t7E6j7f5OFMGfZ1l-unYIn5_MzhkPq6biZx4hcFsvXtKlg0KLKEK_-4h669RNhcpyioWhbj12dntetBPEK3dim8oi4pnLMi9Qz6RsAtJniFBLmeii39jEobIr95vwivpO0QJx7oz-VATu4DommFEb-z4NNWLBrnKOE_FwXNRuqf_rcqNTstndwXMDdnJAIHRsCKXr6PedcwO6RMHkTZn_NbC92af7lok7CoEDw1yemsaQhlPn9umyTDOd3ZPdjYueDweGLZTxgMEcQQFzXU1v-R4NA54vsZoMTK_cZGGf81ybewS79-1kNy5_dXsP7Ky7UPlAmHaBKjXFv4n9LdQzkJbeh4ualP0RElLa7Rye-PZ7HvYKm21mryLADP4UfT0E3j1Rliw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09c9caf84abb4710ae2908b21f933bfb&_e=smSJ_tGcVZtU95t7E6j7f5OFMGfZ1l-unYIn5_MzhkPq6biZx4hcFsvXtKlg0KLKEK_-4h669RNhcpyioWhbj12dntetBPEK3dim8oi4pnLMi9Qz6RsAtJniFBLmeii39jEobIr95vwivpO0QJx7oz-VATu4DommFEb-z4NNWLBrnKOE_FwXNRuqf_rcqNTstndwXMDdnJAIHRsCKXr6PedcwO6RMHkTZn_NbC92af7t0r-mhX4peREiPMPL5D-RhUrWAhwFwLNb8YURSZ5pE_spcxLnvmjDSToly9EgzJfpZf5P4lCf6P2EjL_6oE-jQcSgjpRsuvDHV9lFOKoEs-INLCii7aTwmSeyruFwT_OZIvqq8V5KQzGnnjyoQvcJaDMvPboIGkJM27gEYRw9-g%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09c9caf84abb4710ae2908b21f933bfb&_e=smSJ_tGcVZtU95t7E6j7f5OFMGfZ1l-unYIn5_MzhkPq6biZx4hcFsvXtKlg0KLKEK_-4h669RNhcpyioWhbj12dntetBPEK3dim8oi4pnLMi9Qz6RsAtJniFBLmeii39jEobIr95vwivpO0QJx7oz-VATu4DommFEb-z4NNWLBrnKOE_FwXNRuqf_rcqNTstndwXMDdnJAIHRsCKXr6PedcwO6RMHkTZn_NbC92af41ndqFjRr9ln5-Jbf7DOvRr2L9bNSqcO2-QIBHxqdkT7FormgLZiQ-YTadvNIhKwpvwcgZW8CPKQvtxDAp77XjYjk2FOgiiTEQqPTI0gXlQUjMRv0MF1PN2qeciaqO1MHeVkeB5a7l7cu6iwZwNnynFrqgD0dDVjNrnIKH5ZvfEQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: In honor of Black History Month, we’rehighlighting Black Democratic leaders who are making big waves in ournation’s politics and calling out theGOP’s harmful anti-Black agenda.
body:
Welcome to the latest Black History Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter, February 18th, 2024 | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGpwpXgoJxt9wxxr6-3NGZy8uzjP7lQns4eM7mQr18nbBTscuYL22isIY29FSQLcV6mr91eEUVyemsu9wrmEdKfUol6ra6mgPDPO5Av17eb-tR8iaIr_h9k9frq4tcn4arOOBmask10-VEpm1DzN2BtPapj06jATQ9bzZA-bWPwbeSGfG1w7qYKrYExnL3RY8V2DqN5bf3oS3IJAdUHeUpbTvtXxmEbYRRQsj0XOswkQu_SOZVeyzT1L2JcgA377m_M6XzHIwL2q15i43unY3IFppFwuR7KawjcZ0_EyPDsvr-WlTak7akEqiDUdFozhv5hTx07AncXJxDnSV7kx4DcivA9X5o6zArHSFi4VPnoDIxBZBySZn4-upV7Fb4NBCOgCTzhA8T8vJ077laaa7vbHi1sN-iDH7H8Fpy5x3RfwfIGAlXSK5OlKe53oXRUvDJYBG9W2NZZN0p7OZuVJG-c3HTK82UUxBmiaXCU4kGM-xfCH2NkESyZl3Oc4_whG2GlRZ2XeWYrl_AfASIrp4o2UXaVyDX39TsXcbuiOG4vG3GsG9dwOwaCs9q6LhGr4Q/43y/1SdKvqtUQveNkWSEUPigJA/h0/v5JGfKVecC-Hj8IpSXaLhBCzfIq56bSXdJk6O8gBYDI)
---
👉 **_Virginia:_ Del. Don Scott is the first Black speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates **
In Virginia, Del. Don Scott’s speakership marks a pivotal moment, bringing the new total of Black House Speakers up to seven for the _first time_ in our nation’s history. Speaker Scott has been a strong voice for reproductive freedom, criminal justice reform, and uplifting working families. [**His historic election as Speaker paves the way for more inclusive leadership in our statehouses →** ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEK_It6EH_8VwiNW7tp4p-ZlB51iHofQCWvD9JltjEu8MX3wqEseQhGD9EeKPBdo0ZsBRj3AjWQMtXsGIUrKFKCIBpKNqUQKDjQxKvnklpotofjYxVphQfA4F6j0Jc7JzzMc0gf_p4a1tp5NBqoUAfxMHi354XgZ7LpWCSCsvl10HqXymLXhkJCyu9uY5kedPAKdU4kqulE5n6ssRmxV9Hoiv3kPwKlwSZ5G6ubwzHNViM-S3NDGM2Tz-UxHIbeaYwv5MEoFe2jKn1MIuEW3RdJ9tvtKJwgrKrIMSWDz1NNoWxFN_dpT-5NDNv3BlXKA-vVKvUEtkAEGAwywLvslmEjRz4RAfew0LHQdhlkfaK8P0nEpg33bXWJew3I_hS2W13zHyIzdiNrBEtArPqEiicO88f8vTe-ovO3EFq_NrVqLhDZY4RsDeSTxiRjzKDzX1LHCsrsnRkLRErUDGbhyGqZaVG0kl3LsPgdMi373-Slk0NnwbYgn7cCETZ5bn1Nlv6KZrewqjDQ6GhQnQZErwfBSF8PoDOZm1DVxsP2YiFUcH80gpdBdw9WR3JMvUhxhdtv3L1FVr87sZPmLmvfKGVtYxpbONpvXJBd7i8tZDzu6dH6ayRh2pJaON6SAS8xRb9j9C0_epW685A8oEvS1T6iwdGgtRYVTiN2g63FQjZZEAFjUp7AdUQgNReADUipkkb5ugFT4tpEb31tDmwQ6PCY/43y/1SdKvqtUQveNkWSEUPigJA/h1/1C7B81LIXg1x90usV0vqxveDrhfaq2cYwPmBzUkmQuE)

👉 **_Pennsylvania:_ Joanna McClinton is the first woman elected as Speaker of the House **
In Pennsylvania, Joanna McClinton made history in 2022 when she became the first Black woman elected Speaker of the state House. She’s serving as a powerful example of progress and is breaking down historic barriers. Speaker McClinton has [**big plans for 2024, focusing on education, creating jobs, raising the minimum wage, and more →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHEDHGujXx7nwQEMz2pVjiGjTKZF_goEnBHbXwoyPu2CtT9PSa9GPCKEdRteieLfSPucjPXNfLyQNfousyZ1bABmzFoBpVqk8vLBjQpnUp_8PPAbUx9WBGqRwTBy0leGmAcpxlbn6PkLTiSX8ZJ321MF57O_EhaaX4xotVvdk_l6WU57gcKBLMb2e6kYuFY4o4yZtw3V9oYO_aNZ1Cx8_4nrY1XNhQSTEsXX4CUDrQiTlzUTPHD_Xx1rcjmIGkhavhSKrMAxseKjmQUVl1uXZNq1FUOHKYf6ZvgpTkqyP8brqOk59aScjujyp_Tn_oLA65NtKuP5Kdk5Kv4nxbzrIJiLXPTklGgWZVFUYzUz8yH8CgSIGkYWLc7yLVxSTQFBMjUOB_hvA8Y6N9yUMNhJ9FGFV-bdZdufwczqoQEXuEceuJVYbX0-j2DFWQ7b4_DdrAfmnQVRoy3nzqKjdgN5I6AX2mJWoe0XNFJzhq_XoBtXrfG9D_1cFoIqDsXRxKptbpVr95Gt6ZUoHPqBEfkpQfXobtySO7OVAG_WQMJFhJNHQ_VbQwaHZEmfskJS9NBENlyHNtzR6soQ4s5MMg4tcbMdwjmljAUI7kskD3ZZAmkiW88tlCUQBiMddu_rcBWoBD88KQTZafZnLsK5Q3U7KGurTA-4icdi4V8UAb98mzGa/43y/1SdKvqtUQveNkWSEUPigJA/h2/qD6-PH7JTpQiBC6TAWeqjS_4I_GjoUiE985CK2i3dxQ)
👉 **_Michigan:_ Joe Tate is the first Black leader elected as MI Speaker of the House **
In Michigan, Rep. Joe Tate was elected as Michigan’s first Black Speaker of the House. Since 2022, Tate has led efforts to secure record funding for K-12 education and even passed a bill to reopen the Lewis College of Business, Michigan’s only recognized HBCU. [**As Speaker, Tate has continued fighting for public education, investing in infrastructure, and environmental protections →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEgmZ3WfRXKNNYpUgDb_6CjUwGBAbpWwPnh5QH-eIQWjdgJeZDdUOTTi0sqCSNQP25yXqhECB11DKOYxvgJyV1tXG1985C8EKMbZFnr2Bxdxz6XfhH7FjDtWeIPLd8awCATtsCsjIplS2rGc3LD39JunHK3FS1Ib7915pS2eGiGAi3RL82YRLnE1ewAu3-NycmgzHudH1Bp-03iKjCkqtslPvtp6pFxrIBCe_2sutuGF-JOn_4LaOIFv89XuolKLmYraRLyriwZXn979X7QKR9VmajRPiAylo-pSR-w3cHfVzV-KygOZBdFteokvKLMffHQf-wK-O6VOazwlimvkwEjtPIJOhUfONpg21mtVek8GSK4VSQI5-0VCeuUrBOTWVVlWjVlnI7H6UsIJGxSnoXMwLDMS5rxPhMBlXqzKzNQsMvyqvEyW2FFXFc5pCeI9bPLaVbB_cFWUnQFTY4w6UNPIj0gqSq-OhB0IlOwzLAh1C0UiUZaJv4VTCYgFY5mXoTFrgFds1H3n7iA74jJiPANVmy9aQdu0pATNPq579YTY9Jiq7PExuhMI4HlZyOa4RAHzus_KsMeqShIk4hoyOiCLjlbjzx5OYSW_OmxctE3mqMc-IVSj7zs40wvK0hAa5ya4ViqM2btTO0JJciX5QXQIRoWn_ZVBULnVohdp_ERRAaHPGOSh19yqi7IJM_ji32symPKgVNZLFP64qze3GZI/43y/1SdKvqtUQveNkWSEUPigJA/h3/jQBqh08SqUISnVpBe5nMX_n0IUiZKurweLWHLTQ22hc)
👉 **_New York:_ DLCC Board Chair and NY Senate Majority Leader Andrea Stewart-Cousins is the first Black woman to lead a New York legislative chamber **
In New York, Senate President Pro Tempore and Majority Leader Andrea Stewart-Cousins has overseen the passage of transformative legislation surrounding gun safety, reproductive rights, voting reforms, and LGBTQ+ rights. As Chair of the DLCC’s board, she serves a vital role in defending Democratic majorities across the country. Her leadership underscores the importance of diverse voices at the highest levels of state decision-making and sets a precedent for future generations. She advocates for contraceptive and abortion access, pay equity, [**and most recently began working towards making housing more affordable for New York residents →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbaHosqOHgcJFiAwDL_38PGvbNf5QcogvwdjiVvhEClWjWjcXsZ33HRGsMH5Pui35jkYbr1D2NRBfoOqUIuk2kq-zesdDJzMwl49c1iU3O147cOVqC2ag5zFcGGstjZZY5HpSh0itQiIuNIo-QGA4H2icPkmGjpNBhNV3dIl66jz8M9AhOkj8ipTZ5tQDfqriikXny8srDrABouvSiLLdE8NT2FgHi5vXnl_XX0IvgPHBjx-46Tpxn0SXXsBitKnDi0DeG8ssEl_zg01eaQ9FPuX5R5wj3Fnd5VpimqMZOwvrZUUmJQwnr7a7LklD1jNa0L-Suld4kRMY0vYIZsciAqyjcDFnIgppxXrEjCjpcok7w1k9ZVmmVQDOolMy2VAI077pI7KCNbM5Rn_d2i03pZ6_y-eOOQX1QV1wlzv3RrWapI02oIGUXzm5P50MlgnY2eLmoPKMk1Pny7_tXA_3fp-hWMOFWkOJkQgAUVDVDzg83fXvTcJnujdT7osfklHPQCxjadhWHAvcH6T3HV82WhwaDOXDQDjq4tQdWd-EIsm-y3PmrUPa8FdB2fql-fiiK4fUpvQkjiwc_r2CyhoC6C_MJAbAQRoi9pHVDE3EkkfJBD5I-YmSF7-QBZixEWnyLPGCOKS-p2_zCk5zi2U4GbDdUcnLjh91kODTXVIkFcNEViQaonbi2aYHExhJIytZ6SWvoLEjFEQrmIzMY9EzLdvjcCo12DXNhLqDta2xXkcl/43y/1SdKvqtUQveNkWSEUPigJA/h4/HzL-52nqg-PmyzY-7G4ydtfcci0klM8PJs1VZshpSM8)

👥 **_Read about Right-wing Gerrymandering:_ Republican-drawn maps use district lines to restrict the voting power and voices of Black voters **

clean_body: Welcome to the latest Black History Month edition of the DLCC's newsletter, February 18th, 2024 | | | | | 👉 Virginia: Del. Don Scott is the first Black speaker of the Virginia House of Delegates In Virginia, Del. Don Scott’s speakership marks a pivotal moment, bringing the new total of Black House Speakers up to seven for the first time in our nation’s history. Speaker Scott has been a strong voice for reproductive freedom, criminal justice reform, and uplifting working families. 👉 Pennsylvania: Joanna McClinton is the first woman elected as Speaker of the House In Pennsylvania, Joanna McClinton made history in 2022 when she became the first Black woman elected Speaker of the state House. She’s serving as a powerful example of progress and is breaking down historic barriers. Speaker McClinton has 👉 Michigan: Joe Tate is the first Black leader elected as MI Speaker of the House In Michigan, Rep. Joe Tate was elected as Michigan’s first Black Speaker of the House. Since 2022, Tate has led efforts to secure record funding for K-12 education and even passed a bill to reopen the Lewis College of Business, Michigan’s only recognized HBCU. 👉 New York: DLCC Board Chair and NY Senate Majority Leader Andrea Stewart-Cousins is the first Black woman to lead a New York legislative chamber In New York, Senate President Pro Tempore and Majority Leader Andrea Stewart-Cousins has overseen the passage of transformative legislation surrounding gun safety, reproductive rights, voting reforms, and LGBTQ+ rights. As Chair of the DLCC’s board, she serves a vital role in defending Democratic majorities across the country. Her leadership underscores the importance of diverse voices at the highest levels of state decision-making and sets a precedent for future generations. She advocates for contraceptive and abortion access, pay equity, ☑️ Read about GOP-Backed Black Voter Suppression: Extreme Republicans have started banning drop boxes and reducing the number of polling places in Black neighborhoods The introduction of these measures represents a significant threat to voting rights, particularly for communities and neighborhoods with Black voters. 👥 Read about Right-wing Gerrymandering: Republican-drawn maps use district lines to restrict the voting power and voices of Black voters The manipulation of district lines to divide and pack voters of color into districts to reduce their voting power is a stark reminder of the challenges Black voters continue to face in our democracy. | | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . To unsubscribe and stop receiving emails about our efforts, please | | Sent via . name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7ae7f092614606a4a65152c8c817af&_e=g7kLuA1iH2OBncp_vmXwbWJZosgYUfLNTUgQGlL8TS9DTEFl37cYLPda643vFruD0FsTxlj0XgfOP5aCagLHwqdJSe9bB9K9QWepf4k3bFmyjG2cc_emeZcqmfDW2G9vFcwdEsagh_Y-PzZQuKerKN5Zq7Nw2nr3giq0Gr4KxbdoTGX_cLRS0p1oUxN0UI3c-qWp2odwfarIpaCXmzgTbWiJDJiPoa9B646kq1ZHFvsDL3biHpkQDZuv5QkuXenT9aug0dq56nZJqqHa43o4E5kB7sXa_QHBdsCgrVxhDaylAx7d_7w04BrZ5LB4F0OZIoqURPEoIH0h6Mhuo5UAtlb30dR4IFn1HwtwnYOhmEKAh_WlatP17BvhTcv_F-r3xOa6n4CZqe_VlgKqPsZNoIppvutHjdGrIJjqEYTrnPA%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7ae7f092614606a4a65152c8c817af&_e=g7kLuA1iH2OBncp_vmXwbWJZosgYUfLNTUgQGlL8TS9DTEFl37cYLPda643vFruD0FsTxlj0XgfOP5aCagLHwqdJSe9bB9K9QWepf4k3bFmyjG2cc_emeZcqmfDW2G9vFcwdEsagh_Y-PzZQuKerKN5Zq7Nw2nr3giq0Gr4KxbdoTGX_cLRS0p1oUxN0UI3c-qWp2odwfarIpaCXmzgTbWiJDJiPoa9B646kq1ZHFvsDL3biHpkQDZuv5QkuXenT9aug0dq56nZJqqHa43o4E3MYL8vhhD0cPYsBD0bvSfPz0TTuDC0fljoC-IKNeHj08DceQodejP0lsuTEakmbaL3ml1Cm-TGDEhyshy6pgEp9V5KDbNyV70o15HRY2z4iwewpxd3uZe_GsRdhkVZWninsif6_wo-rmLhJ2cD8zqA%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa7ae7f092614606a4a65152c8c817af&_e=g7kLuA1iH2OBncp_vmXwbWJZosgYUfLNTUgQGlL8TS9DTEFl37cYLPda643vFruD0FsTxlj0XgfOP5aCagLHwqdJSe9bB9K9QWepf4k3bFmyjG2cc_emeZcqmfDW2G9vFcwdEsagh_Y-PzZQuKerKN5Zq7Nw2nr3giq0Gr4KxbdoTGX_cLRS0p1oUxN0UI3c-qWp2odwfarIpaCXmzgTbWiJDJiPoa9B646kq1ZHFvsDL3biHpkQDZuv5QkuXenT9aug0dq56nZJqqHa43o4E0BmUiTlQP_8KMNuwo5_38Jfaprw1t2-Ge8cJ0w_MGzrDcl7dqYEoql8Ofs6A8Y-abQH3zljeZJ-rPP7aA6XhDoIM08OsxMOEWFEHS1VR2CoyMxf7brup5VTOgfuhLdM5QEfrUUoSlLpoMgnPy9qMAQ%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=fa7ae7f092614606a4a65152c8c817af&_t=AsOCbQL7QSxKUxpFTcncV-ENEJXZlcgA9Fn29e16CJerOcY6gwaBUQ5nuCD1U3iY_XYYQNDmq0EQPPdA9RBkLWchNW-ljgb1C-dp6TR38ssByQUxKtBMDjgWJX2qPhy8R5kHLLeZwqDSQw_WVg6H7kYHrtlTYa_fnBBrPYou6bQ%3D)

On top of that? Pundits and political experts agree that Texas is one of the most flippable Senate seats this year.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What Trump did in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1150%2E135344%2E3Ziai-)

Friend --
Last night, Donald Trump visited Michigan to rally his supporters. It was his third visit in 8 months because, as he said last night, “If we win Michigan, we win the election.”
He’s admitting what we’ve always known: Trump can’t win the White House – and Republicans can’t flip the Senate – without winning Michigan.
He spent his time here advancing lies about the 2020 election, criticizing union workers, attacking voting rights, and bragging about appointing the SCOTUS judges who overturned Roe v. Wade. This came on the heels of news about his support for a national abortion ban this week. Republicans continue to tell us who they are – and we need to believe them.
And this won’t be the last time we see Donald Trump here in Michigan, spewing lies about our state and its people.
Last night’s rally is an indication that Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they can at Michigan, and that Michigan Democrats can’t take anything for granted.
No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state – full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.
[**We can't let that happen. Want to help? Chip in what you can and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240218&t=2&akid=1150%2E135344%2E3Ziai-)

name: Carville, James
subject: Locked in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Re: Nevada
| | |
---
Friend – I’ve worked in politics for half a century, so believe me when I tell you: **Democrats are in BIG trouble.**

The 2024 Senate map is the toughest one I’ve ever seen. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies will use every trick up their sleeves to snatch back power.
**The GOP is coming at us with full force – and with experts saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, they’re zeroing in on Jacky Rosen as a TOP target for defeat. Polling shows the Nevada Senate race in a statistical dead heat!!! It’s not looking good, friend.**
**[Jacky needs to raise another $7,198 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP attacks and fuel her campaign forward – but the ONLY way she can get there is with your immediate grassroots support. So PLEASE, will you chip in $5 or more now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79240510/455887190/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3477-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2NiNDY5Ni02YmNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=30iDYBcuC8AgQf-qr81Cuutm8nLuRnZurj_gy4P6n8M=)**
Democrats won in Nevada by less than 1% in 2022, making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. Now that they have a second chance at winning in Nevada, Republicans aren’t going to leave anything up to chance – and they’re already pulling out all of the stops to flip this seat.
**If Jacky loses in Nevada, McConnell and his far-right posse will take back the majority and enact their dangerous, out-of-touch agenda. We CANNOT let this happen.**

In my expert opinion, we CAN win this race and keep control of the Senate – but that starts with raising the resources, today, to prepare for the tough fight ahead.

name: Sam Brown
subject: They blew up my body, but they’ll never destroy my spirit.
body:
You can never take away the heart of a soldier

| |
---
| | | Friend,

**[This was God's message for me.](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ada237b1b484326ad60c3661d988910&_e=mmuoF8-5xvfMCoKi73Rr0RLkiuh3Sp_8Ikav5mmRHsV3PURtwgqtlZGAwyZfvnQeQeES8nC2WTJUBcVBNZ1olJ8KWWXAISMKTF0s0ccMhm0FHSvIe6WyMcoSK0z3H1MS1qm0RlBDAE-xmPr9xVJykC6-XIIGsyhH8cjq9_c-OHULXvNQPfqS0BRG67Qx6xQJaX-teSxUZR6u7beCNqJ3VnGjMGvXWz1P5GayZ4F1FK1XnOyRjxHXnKIqzT6sr0mnJEBO8OsHhlUUwTUNDnAeypEvhW38qi00Y6bGd16PTk4LT_VahCTxMRfzfSZMGO7Wutbr-vdMxZKrLxK9DNRteQ%3D%3D "This was God’s message for me. ")**

I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever.

In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion.

---
| [](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ada237b1b484326ad60c3661d988910&_e=mmuoF8-5xvfMCoKi73Rr0RLkiuh3Sp_8Ikav5mmRHsV3PURtwgqtlZGAwyZfvnQeQeES8nC2WTJUBcVBNZ1olJ8KWWXAISMKTF0s0ccMhm0FHSvIe6WyMcoSK0z3H1MS1qm0RlBDAE-xmPr9xVJykC6-XIIGsyhH8cjq9_c-OHULXvNQPfqS0BRG67Qx6xQJBUWnFXKwxsHgfG4jtwDTrztblPK0rriJ9YK7GfuL-w7MsaaL2ddVVFV5Lkqw6M6zMY3Lki8LKssRYZd8V40ocZb8kqg4_XTNIU50W9X6MjzpcDwCkmC-fTANSBC6DxRxY25lPkN7Vg2ciSC6vJZjwA%3D%3D)
---

My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day.

**But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me.**

Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason:

_**My new life belonged not to me, but to Him.

That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. **_

God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something.

Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second.

God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life.

**Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him.**

That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, **[I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ada237b1b484326ad60c3661d988910&_e=mmuoF8-5xvfMCoKi73Rr0RLkiuh3Sp_8Ikav5mmRHsV3PURtwgqtlZGAwyZfvnQeQeES8nC2WTJUBcVBNZ1olJ8KWWXAISMKTF0s0ccMhm0FHSvIe6WyMcoSK0z3H1MS1qm0RlBDAE-xmPr9xVJykC6-XIIGsyhH8cjq9_c-OHULXvNQPfqS0BRG67Qx6xQJUN2SjxtD91LcrORu9_VCL1b5Owj6orR97peaMV0JdkfypKpOVj-M0znhoRFG0LW00cefc6XTSM5T8od5pOHPP58ZIjabHhOdLhGOxM8QvStxVn8GvJcGWtCfDP7c0wUnENgwGq2tknPAgfQTm0JpvA%3D%3D "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.")**

America is at a tipping point.

Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness.

Our border is collapsing.

Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools.

We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C.

But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help.

So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things.
1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world?
2. **[Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ada237b1b484326ad60c3661d988910&_e=mmuoF8-5xvfMCoKi73Rr0RLkiuh3Sp_8Ikav5mmRHsV3PURtwgqtlZGAwyZfvnQeQeES8nC2WTJUBcVBNZ1olJ8KWWXAISMKTF0s0ccMhm0FHSvIe6WyMcoSK0z3H1MS1qm0RlBDAE-xmPr9xVJykC6-XIIGsyhH8cjq9_c-OHULXvNQPfqS0BRG67Qx6xQJ0gfxUE1gIR6FoyPiV3LNbp4ObxZlwgYIzuPI2Fy7m0EBpXWPU4FWzx6itatkO8jhBz_alTzZqE3L0nkGvT3CDsS8I2c7pQM-tOT4IHct9-1cJxB2t73MO6OcPT8Ds8G7hWD8Zisr3xduhLdy2i8n4g%3D%3D "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?")** I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election.

Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU.

Duty First,
---
| [](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ada237b1b484326ad60c3661d988910&_e=mmuoF8-5xvfMCoKi73Rr0RLkiuh3Sp_8Ikav5mmRHsV3PURtwgqtlZGAwyZfvnQeQeES8nC2WTJUBcVBNZ1olJ8KWWXAISMKTF0s0ccMhm0FHSvIe6WyMcoSK0z3H1MS1qm0RlBDAE-xmPr9xVJykC6-XIIGsyhH8cjq9_c-OHULXvNQPfqS0BRG67Qx6xQJrCL8rFuqNII49gB5PT7p2pUKnLEhgE7QfCPnoJtJS66Vr10l4xJKP6UPI3hUgePgq1YF9O10pQ_4IHgJLXW4GafRGkCkt72p6w1n0skz5IoxG9xYegZcTDLjoxyNVf8pXbN1aU31bOcN9dEBegFQHw%3D%3D)
---

Sam Brown

---
| | [DONATE](http://links.constitutionmedia.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8ada237b1b484326ad60c3661d988910&_e=mmuoF8-5xvfMCoKi73Rr0RLkiuh3Sp_8Ikav5mmRHsV3PURtwgqtlZGAwyZfvnQeQeES8nC2WTJUBcVBNZ1olJ8KWWXAISMKTF0s0ccMhm0FHSvIe6WyMcoSK0z3H1MS1qm0RlBDAE-xmPr9xVJykC6-XIIGsyhH8cjq9_c-OHULXvNQPfqS0BRG67Qx6xQJNtE9VjxunuOdBYLS2Q44tgKH3eEXU-L2qBW7QstZ2w2r9hHG6ELM8ZB4rnMHyJHxv9H4trL70Nkp-WFOwagCI_Z80mdE6pFjtV69Qtg1hXqiGVK4lYfAEWBzCcMM4e3DRdTmQJplCVaDfOq2oB2rig%3D%3D)
---
|

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: What if you knew just $25 would keep Trump out of the White House,wouldn’t it be the best $25 you everspent?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's together. | | |
---
$25. If you knew that donating $25 would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. **Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's together. clean_body: There's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's together. | | | $25. If you knew that donating $25 would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's together. So please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We’ve had years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
82 people have already been killed in mass shootings this year.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240218-3529-footer&t=1&akid=3529%2E420207%2EZvFIs-)
_Content Warning: This email discusses the topic of gun violence. Please read with discretion._
Peter, how many lives is enough?
82 people have already been killed in mass shootings this year. From Newtown to Las Vegas to Parkland and now Kansas City, gun violence has claimed far too many American lives.
We’ve had years to address America’s gun violence epidemic, and yet we still haven’t found a way to prevent these horrific events from happening again.
**This needs to change -- we need bold action now.**
**This doesn’t have to be our new normal.**[**We must pass strong, common-sense gun control now. Add your name to call on Congress to prioritize passing common sense gun laws now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_202402018/?source=em20240218-3529&akid=3529%2E420207%2EZvFIs-)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition_202402018/?source=em20240218-3529&akid=3529%2E420207%2EZvFIs-)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

clean_body: 82 people have already been killed in mass shootings this year. - Content Warning: This email discusses the topic of gun violence. Please read with discretion. Peter, how many lives is enough? 82 people have already been killed in mass shootings this year. From Newtown to Las Vegas to Parkland and now Kansas City, gun violence has claimed far too many American lives. We’ve had years to address America’s gun violence epidemic, and yet we still haven’t found a way to prevent these horrific events from happening again. This needs to change -- we need bold action now. This doesn’t have to be our new normal.- - In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal - | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

subject: Poll: 1 in 3 Republicans believe Taylor Swift election conspiracy
body:
Right-wing misinformation is just as pervasive as it was in 2020. Help us fight back.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79243117/455892799/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjNjNjQtNmVjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QeZiagCUo2B8jLqTobod1-bqC1As6REBFDMvdlEso1s=&emci=dfd9f6a6-f6cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=05af3c64-6ece-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79243129/455892812/-593472309?refcode=20240218-EM-TaylorSwiftConspiracies&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjNjNjQtNmVjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QeZiagCUo2B8jLqTobod1-bqC1As6REBFDMvdlEso1s=)
**New Poll: 1 in 5 Americans, 1 in 3 Republicans believe Taylor Swift election conspiracy**
_\- SOURCE: Monmouth, 2/14/23_
Peter,
It’s official: the Chiefs are Super Bowl winners, Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are the biggest power couple of 2024, and, according to one of the most accurate pollsters in the country, **a third of Republicans think Swift and Kelce’s relationship is a government conspiracy to help Biden win re-election later this year. **
🤦
Of course, the claim has absolutely zero basis in reality. But the sheer speed with which this bananas theory became a fact for 60 million Americans says a lot about right-wing propaganda and what we’re up against in the 2024 election.
[**In a moment, we’ll explain how the Swift story went from the stuff of Rom-Com to Qanon, but if you already know you’re ready to support our mission of stopping the spread of right-wing conspiracies, can you give $13 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79243131/455892819/-593472309?refcode=20240218-EM-TaylorSwiftConspiracies&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjNjNjQtNmVjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QeZiagCUo2B8jLqTobod1-bqC1As6REBFDMvdlEso1s=)
The roots of the Chiefs/Biden conspiracy started last year when a former running back for the Houston Texans made a joke on a podcast that the NFL was scripted.

Then, in the fall, right-wing media personalities like Megyn Kelly and Charlie Kirk criticized Travis Kelce for appearing in a Pfizer ad promoting COVID-19 vaccinations.
Those attacks (and Kelce’s ad for Bud Light) led to a surge in online hate towards the couple from right-wing personalities and online influencers on “ _X_ ” and _TikTok_.
By the time the Super Bowl kicked off last Sunday, Swift/Biden/NFL conspiracy theories were running wild through right-wing media and social media.
Presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy called Swift a “Pentagon asset.” Leaders in the QAnon movement (including the actual guy who organized the “stop the steal” rally that led to January 6th) used a lack of grass stains on the players' jerseys to argue that the Super Bowl was rigged.
**And the most important part of all this? The 50 million Americans who now believe the wackadoodle conspiracy theory about Swift saw these lies amplified and shared by the right-wing media, influencers, and even their friends and family over and over again. **
That’s how it works, Peter. It’s the same playbook that led to our current reality where a majority of Republican voters believe that the 2020 election was stolen by Joe Biden and Democrats.
So that’s _a lot_ , but the good news is that COURIER has a playbook that works too. Our ten battleground newsrooms craft free, factual local news that sticks and corrects misinformation. And we meet people in the same social media feeds and email inboxes where right-wing lies and conspiracies spread.
**[But it takes resources to keep our newsrooms running and providing _Timeless_ news for our readers. So let’s ask you a _Question...?_ Can we count on you to give $13 to help us fight misinformation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79243138/455892821/-593472309?refcode=20240218-EM-TaylorSwiftConspiracies&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZjNjNjQtNmVjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QeZiagCUo2B8jLqTobod1-bqC1As6REBFDMvdlEso1s=)**

body:
And The Billionaire Class Is Fueling The War Against Abundant American Energy

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684164%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I73U%2bEh68qM%2fWeu6Sm%2ffOA&sysid=1 Biden Admin To Ease Electric Vehicle Goals In Bid For Union Support: REPORT

The Biden administration is planning to ease restrictions this spring on tailpipe emissions that were put in place to facilitate the transition to electric vehicles (EV) in a bid to appeal to unions and the auto industry, according to The New York Times.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I won’t mince words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Ted Lieu emailed.
My parents emailed.
My brother emailed.

Trump, McConnell, and Brown want to flip Nevada red
| | |
---
Friend,
I don’t have much time, but there are three things I need you to know about the GOP’s plans to regain control in 2024:
**1.** **Donald Trump** has been rallying his base here in Nevada because experts predict that Nevada could deliver White House and Senate control to Republicans in 2024. _And just last month, he returned to Las Vegas for a campaign rally and won Nevada’s GOP caucus by a landslide._
**2.** **Mitch McConnell** only needs to regain **two****seats** to take back the Senate – and he personally recruited Sam Brown to defeat me.
**3.** **Sam Brown** is an anti-choice extremist who is being funded by MAGA billionaires and shady dark-money groups like the Koch network. And if that wasn't bad enough, he just set a new GOP fundraising record against me!
**With Trump and the GOP determined to flip Nevada red, I need your urgent grassroots support to fight back. But right now, I’m still very short of my $20,000 midnight goal – and it looks like you haven’t given yet.**

clean_body: Trump, McConnell, and Brown want to flip Nevada red | | | Friend, I don’t have much time, but there are three things I need you to know about the GOP’s plans to regain control in 2024: 1. Donald Trump has been rallying his base here in Nevada because experts predict that Nevada could deliver White House and Senate control to Republicans in 2024. And just last month, he returned to Las Vegas for a campaign rally and won Nevada’s GOP caucus by a landslide. 2. Mitch McConnell only needs to regain twoseats to take back the Senate – and he personally recruited Sam Brown to defeat me. 3. Sam Brown is an anti-choice extremist who is being funded by MAGA billionaires and shady dark-money groups like the Koch network. And if that wasn't bad enough, he just set a new GOP fundraising record against me! With Trump and the GOP determined to flip Nevada red, I need your urgent grassroots support to fight back. ---
Peter --

The Michigan Republican presidential primary is coming up fast this month and it would mean A LOT to me if you would chip in before then.

I am asking for a contribution $15 or whatever you can afford — before Republicans vote in Michigan. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate to our campaign and Defeat Republicans today:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkin-dr-split](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79246075/455900007/-2001351941?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg2ZTdjMTJmLTcxY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HaoOMi8Kz7TvsZD3kLIUbp4z0zIneoSwRhV9dL3P6LQ=)

Here's how former President Trump's likely nomination plays in our race:

Public polls show that President Biden and former President Trump are just about tied in a head-to-head race here in Michigan — along with our race being a dead-heat. Given that the Senate race is the top of the ticket in the state, it’s just a matter of time until Trump turns his attacks toward us.

That means we can likely expect to see Trump in Michigan— in fact, he’ll be here this weekend.. And National Republicans will be doing everything they can to flip our state red and boost our ultimate GOP opponent in the Senate race.

So we need to continue building up our reserves if we are going to be able to fight back against the attack ads and outside spending and keep this seat blue in November.

The Michigan Republican primary is coming up fast.

[It would be a huge help to our campaign if you would chip in and show your support before he gets here. Our goal is to send a message that we are NOT letting them win back Michigan! name: Mandela Barnes
subject: let's give little Black girls another role model
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em240218-1-tt&refcode2=5214.196590.sEJlSh&t=1&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
---
Hi friend, I’m writing to you today about history in the making. My friend Lisa Blunt Rochester is on the cusp of becoming the first woman and Black U.S. Senator from Delaware, but she can't do it without our help.
I'd like to tell you more about her, but if you don't have time, [**all I ask is that you split a donation between her campaign and The Long Run of whatever you can swing today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=2&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
[CHIP IN >>](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=3&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
To say Lisa is the right person for the job would be an understatement.
She has a proven track record of fighting for reproductive freedom, voting rights, and affordable housing as Delaware’s Congresswoman for the past 6 years. And she's always brought all Delawareans' voices to the table.
Lisa has also shown us what it means to fight the good fight in the era of MAGA extremism. She's stood arm-in-arm with vulnerable communities across her state in defiance of hatred and bigotry.
If it isn't yet obvious, **we need Lisa Blunt Rochester in the Senate.**
But, here's the catch: she has two Republican opponents and they're working hard to stop her campaign from keeping this seat blue. Losing Delaware would be crushing for our Senate Majority – we can't let that happen.
[**Whether it's $5 or $25, please split any amount between The Long Run and Lisa Blunt Rochester to help win her historic race for Senate. Let's give little Black girls another role model to look to in government.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=4&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.cp-6e9&amount=3&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=23&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.SMkXri&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=24&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.USlMqV&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=25&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.o-G_WE&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=26&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.pxekyz&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=27&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-lbr-split.1yl6wL&refcode=em240218-1-tt&t=28&akid=5214%2E196590%2EsEJlSh)
My best,
\- Mandela Barnes
