name: =?utf-8?Q?Gordon=20Ackley?=
subject: The New Republican Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Will you join it? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6964215b306e/re-hey-10281813?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| | Fellow Republican,

After a much-needed break following the Virgin Islands caucus earlier this month, your Republican team met Saturday for the organizational meeting of the Republican State Committee.
**Watch my appearance on the latest edition of "[ Comes with the Territory](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=131354f8cd&e=d30db4cde8)," which airs today at 1 p.m. on WTJX.**
The recently elected members of the State Committee elected the leadership posts of the party for the next two years.

I'm pleased to announce that Mike Meluskey was elected to be vice chairman for St. Croix. April Newland was elected vice chairman for St. Thomas-St. John. Rounding out the team's leadership are Barbara de la Portilla of St. Croix as secretary and Alexandra Bonthron of St. Thomas as treasurer.

We are working on finishing the party's calendar for the remainder of the year. Tentative events include additional receptions with congressmen and senators. We've also extended invitations to a couple of Republican governors to come down to the territory. As for the State Committee, the next meeting is scheduled for 8 a.m. March 9.

If you would like to join the team, we have a couple of State Committee vacancies for anyone who is a resident of St. Thomas, Water Island, or St. John. For more information or to apply for the vacancy, please reply to this email.

We are also actively recruiting credible, viable candidates for senator from St. Croix, senator from St. Thomas-St. John, Board of Education, Board of Elections, and delegate to the territorial constitutional convention ahead of the mid-May filing deadline. If you or someone you know is interested in running for office in 2024, reach out by replying to this email and we'll schedule a meeting to discuss how the party can help you (or them) get elected.

I want to again say thanks for your continued interest in the Republican Party. Together, we can and will build the political alternative that our fellow Virgin Islanders desperately deserve.

Onward,

Republican Chairman Gordon Ackley
---
| | **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=04dad0667d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&t=b&e=d30db4cde8&c=04dad0667d).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&afl=1)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Why voter registration?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Dear,

I want to take a moment to share why we’re spending so much of our time,
energy, and resources on helping Texans register to vote.

First, Texas makes it harder to register to vote than any other state.

That might have something to do with the fact that we’re the most diverse
swing state in the country. The Texas GOP knows that if more young Texans
and people of color were able to register, their days in power would be
over.

With no online, automatic, or same-day voter registration, the onus is on
volunteers like ours to knock on doors, hold voter registration drives
across the state, and help Texans navigate the bureaucracy and red tape
when registering to vote.

Second, Democrats have a significant voter registration deficit to
overcome if we want to win big, important elections.

Coming out of the 2022 elections, Texas had 7.9 million registered, likely
Republicans and 7.5 million registered, likely Democrats — a deficit of
nearly half a million registered voters.

While we may be able to overcome this challenge in close local and state
house races, it will remain difficult to win statewide elections until we
substantially change the composition of the Texas electorate.

Even the most aggressive Democratic turnout efforts will likely continue
to fall short until we bring a significant number of the 3 million+
eligible but unregistered Democrats in Texas off of the sidelines and into
the game.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240218.MsBWjS&refcode=ema20240218-239476&t=1001&akid=239476%2E444211%2EgXJYHR ]I hope you’ll consider making a contribution of $3 or
whatever you can today to help us register the millions of eligible but
unregistered Democrats in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240218.MsBWjS&refcode=ema20240218-239476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=239476%2E444211%2EgXJYHR ]DONATE $3

Getting this done is going to take years of work, but I know we’ll get
there with the support of people like you.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=239476%2E444211%2EgXJYHR

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. clean_body: “Montana is a top target for Republicans looking to take control of the Senate” | | | GOP super PAC makes first major Senate investment “Montana is a top target for Republicans looking to take control of the Senate” —NBC News = | | = Here’s the situation: The situation → Two GOP super PACs just announced they’re dumping $50 million into Montana’s Senate race! $50 MILLION. Here’s the problem → Experts across the country are saying Jon’s race could be the most competitive in the country, coming down to just a handful of votes. With the polls tied, an investment like this could sink our chances of winning if we don’t respond. Where you come in → We’re proud to run a grassroots campaign, but that means our success entirely depends on your support. We need you to rush a donation to help us fight back ASAP. This is just the beginning. We’re expecting outside groups to spend astronomical amounts to defeat Jon Tester and buy this Senate seat. So we’re turning to you now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express,your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately : | | | = | | = | | = | | = —Team Tester | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
2024 is the year of public schools in North Carolina.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79250453/455908699/823540626?refcode=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM2OGFhMi03NWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdcPqZuI8LJt9UCqjUiiWRAabv25j4QCdIy4WQuO2GI=&emci=a541c299-08cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1049176)
Peter — _Roy needs your immediate input on one important question:_ | **[Do you support increasing funding for North Carolina’s public schools?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79250454/455908700/2145845267?refcode=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM2OGFhMi03NWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdcPqZuI8LJt9UCqjUiiWRAabv25j4QCdIy4WQuO2GI=&emci=a541c299-08cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1049176)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79250455/455908701/2145845267?refcode=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM2OGFhMi03NWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdcPqZuI8LJt9UCqjUiiWRAabv25j4QCdIy4WQuO2GI=&emci=a541c299-08cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1049176) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79250456/455908702/2145845267?refcode=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM2OGFhMi03NWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdcPqZuI8LJt9UCqjUiiWRAabv25j4QCdIy4WQuO2GI=&emci=a541c299-08cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1049176)
---|---
Our state boasts some of the nation’s very best public school teachers — and they’re educating the kids who will shape North Carolina’s future. But Republican legislators have prevented us from investing in public school funding so that we can pay our teachers what they deserve.
Instead, Republicans in the legislature are diverting $4 billion from our public schools to prop up an unaccountable voucher program.
Peter, Roy is personally committed to ensuring that our teachers and students have the resources they deserve. **That’s why he recently declared 2024 the year of public education in NC.**
**[Do you share Roy’s commitment to our public schools? Let him know if you agree with increasing funding by answering our one-question poll now>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79250457/455908703/2145845267?refcode=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGM2OGFhMi03NWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdcPqZuI8LJt9UCqjUiiWRAabv25j4QCdIy4WQuO2GI=&emci=a541c299-08cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=ddc68aa2-75ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1049176)**

Country star John Rich (from Big & Rich) is hosting a PRIVATE CONCERT - in his home - benefitting my fight to protect Tennessee and protect America. The guest list is short, and the night will be unforgettable. "I’m setting aside two tickets for a lucky winner, and I’m personally inviting you to enter as a thank you for all of your recent support." * Invitation for you Who: John Rich + Marsha Blackburn + YOU What: A Night of Country Music with John Rich Where: Nashville, Tennessee | | | "Accept Your Invite To Enter To Win" I've known John Rich for a long time. He loves conservative principles, he loves Tennessee, he loves country music, he loves God, and he loves this country. He and I share that in common. That 's why we get along so well - and something tells me you'd fit right in. Entering this unforgettable sweepstakes is simple. By chipping in any amount (yes, even just a few bucks), you'll be automatically entered to win. It won't take more than a few minutes of your time. "The only thing I ask is that you enter as soon as possible. The window for entering is closing fast."** If you put this off, and someone else wins, would you regret not responding in time? I'd really love to see you there. Make sure to enter now! | | | "Accept Your Invite To Enter To Win" Thank you, Marsha Blackburn | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Summer Lee in Pennsylvania—and her primary election is coming up on April 23.** Like me, Summer doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. Instead, our campaigns are people-powered, funded by grassroots donors like you. Summer Lee and I were both community organizers before running for state-level public office and then for Congress.
On both the state and federal level, I’ve created multiple Neighborhood Service Centers to help constituents with everyday needs. In Congress, I’ve been training my colleagues on how to do similar work in their districts.
In her first year of office, Summer has so far opened up 5 satellite offices in her district, in addition to her main office, and has run mobile service centers.
Through this on-the-ground service work, she has supported 1,600 constituents with getting their Social Security benefits, and has helped other constituents with issues like navigating our immigration system.
**We need to keep Summer Lee in Congress so she can keep doing this essential work—the work that all members of Congress should be doing.**
She is truly rooted in her community, and while prioritizing the needs of her constituents, she also recognizes the importance of equality and freedom for all people across the country and the world.

clean_body: AIPAC’s spending millions against me and Summer Lee. | | | Friend, When Summer Lee first ran for Congress in 2022, she overcame $4 million in attacks from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC. Despite those attacks, Summer has been boldly calling out U.S. complicity in the ethnic cleansing of Palestinians. She’s also a champion on environmental justice, gun safety reform, affordable healthcare for all, workers’ rights, and more. AIPAC recruited a candidate to run against Rep. Summer Lee in Pennsylvania—and her primary election is coming up on April 23. Like me, Summer doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. Instead, our campaigns are people-powered, funded by grassroots donors like you. | Here I am with Summer: Like me, Summer also understands that we’re in office not only to pass transformative policies, but also to serve our constituents with everyday challenges. She’s a community organizer, and it’s an honor to serve alongside her in Congress. Funded primarily by right-wing GOP donors, AIPAC spent millions of dollars trying to defeat both me and Summer in 2022’s elections. Now, they’re planning to spend $100 million in 2024’s elections, targeting me, Summer, and a few other progressives from our Squad who’ve been champions for a ceasefire. As Summer Lee said last month: "I am so proud of the multigenerational, multiracial movement we have built in Western Pennsylvania to protect and expand our democracy—it is our greatest defense against the dark money super PACs and corporate lobbies who seek to undermine it. They have Donald Trump and Nikki Haley's donors, we have the overwhelming power of the people." Let’s flex our people power! With lots of small-dollar donations, we can overcome right-wing attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much for standing with our Squad. Together, we will build the world we deserve, where everyone can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Feb 17, 2024 Subject: Black and Palestinian solidarity in Congress To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We’re celebrating Black-led movements for justice and social change this Black History Month, including the history of Black solidarity with Palestinians. I’m proud to serve in Congress alongside Black progressive leaders who’ve been demanding a ceasefire and speaking up for Palestinians’ rights. One of my fiercest allies in Congress is Rep. Summer Lee , who overcame millions in attacks from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC in 2022, during her first election to Congress. Members of the U.S. House of Representatives run for re-election every two years, which means this is her first re-election. And this year, Republican-funded AIPAC is planning to spend $100 MILLION to defeat Summer and other Black progressives from our Squad. AIPAC even recruited an anti-ceasefire opponent who’s running against Summer in Pennsylvania’s April 23 primary election. With her primary election coming up so soon, Summer needs grassroots fundraising support to once again overcome AIPAC’s attacks. Summer Lee and I were both community organizers before running for state-level public office and then for Congress. On both the state and federal level, I’ve created multiple Neighborhood Service Centers to help constituents with everyday needs. In Congress, I’ve been training my colleagues on how to do similar work in their districts. In her first year of office, Summer has so far opened up 5 satellite offices in her district, in addition to her main office, and has run mobile service centers. Through this on-the-ground service work, she has supported 1,600 constituents with getting their Social Security benefits, and has helped other constituents with issues like navigating our immigration system. We need to keep Summer Lee in Congress so she can keep doing this essential work—the work that all members of Congress should be doing. She is truly rooted in her community, and while prioritizing the needs of her constituents, she also recognizes the importance of equality and freedom for all people across the country and the world. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Onward together! -Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: the Senate doesn’t need another millionaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1043%2E52803%2EgUCiq5)

| | Peter, unlike my multi-millionaire opponent, I can’t write my campaign huge checks at the drop of a hat and spend millions on running TV ads every second of every day. _But what I can do is actually relate to the hardworking Marylanders I’m running to represent._ **We don’t need another millionaire in the Senate, Peter. We need more people who understand the challenges working families face every day.** **[My grassroots team is staring down a multi-millionaire with limitless resources, and I need your help countering his spending advantage to keep from being drowned out. Will you please chip in $25 ASAP so we can get our Maryland-first message in front of voters?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10592?t=12&amount=25&akid=1043%2E52803%2EgUCiq5)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10592?t=13&amount=25&akid=1043%2E52803%2EgUCiq5)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10592?t=14&amount=35&akid=1043%2E52803%2EgUCiq5)
---
With so many millionaires in the Senate and the House, Peter, it’s no wonder corporations and the ultra-wealthy are thriving while working families are struggling.
**Families are struggling to pay off medical debt, get out from under student loans, ensure their kids get a good education, and have enough for groceries every week.**
We need more elected officials who understand the struggles folks are facing — _otherwise, how can we ever hope to address those struggles and fix those problems?_
**I’m running for Senate in Maryland because people need someone who can relate to their needs.[Can I count on you to support my campaign by making a grassroots donation right away?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10592?t=15&amount=25&akid=1043%2E52803%2EgUCiq5)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

name: Bob Casey
subject: How I see this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2032%2E552475%2ECO3vuz)
Hi Peter, let me explain where we are in this race.

**First:** We learned that my hedge fund mega-millionaire opponent gave his campaign $1 million of his personal fortune last quarter, and there’s more where that came from.

**Then:** Out-of-state billionaires started rushing to support his effort to defeat us. One single donor gave a super PAC supporting my opponent $10 million.

**Now:** I’m hoping that this team will step up to help us meet this moment and fight back against the GOP’s efforts to flip Pennsylvania red.
[**I mean it when I say your contribution will directly help us defend this seat and our narrow Senate majority. Can you chip in right away?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240218-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240218-1&refcode2=2032_552475_CO3vuz&akid=2032%2E552475%2ECO3vuz)

name: Team Harper
subject: 🚨BREAKING: Detroit Postal Workers Union endorses Hill Harper for Senate!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hill is the union candidate Michiganders deserve — but he needs YOUR help to win!
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=979%2E62735%2EFhgWFF)
Big news, Peter —
We’re thrilled to announce that the **Detroit Postal Workers Union has endorsed Hill Harper for U.S. Senate in Michigan!**
**[DONATE »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/436?t=2&akid=979%2E62735%2EFhgWFF)**
As an elected board member of a union, Hill intimately understands the challenges union workers and their families face in the fight for better pay, better benefits, and better working conditions.
**That’s why he’ll be more than just a friend to organized labor in the Senate — he’ll be a champion for workers. He’s fought for stronger collective bargaining and a worker’s right to organize for more than 30 years.**
_But Peter, Hill can’t win this Senate race alone._
Just like union organizing, the only way to secure victory is to stand together and _fight_ for the outcome we deserve. That’s the power of collective action — and it’s how **you can help send Hill, a champion for organized labor, to Washington this November.**
**[With his victory this November, Hill would become the ONLY active union member in the Senate! Please, chip in any amount now to help him win this critical race for Michigan’s future and put unions and workers FIRST in Washington>>>](https://act.hillharper.com/go/436?t=3&akid=979%2E62735%2EFhgWFF)**
**[DONATE »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/436?t=4&akid=979%2E62735%2EFhgWFF)**
When we fight, we win. Thanks for your support!
\- Team Harper

subject: We can win Wisconsin with your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

As Tony’s campaign manager, I’ve worked tirelessly with Tony and the team
to win several close elections, not unlike the one we’re sure to face
during this November’s election.

I won’t lie, we’re up against a strong Republican opposition with a
seemingly endless stream of fundraising. But my experience has shown me
that every dollar we receive from generous supporters like you makes a
difference.

With both abortion rights and fair elections on the ballot, we must be
strategic with our efforts to preserve our democracy. There is no room for
error in a state like Wisconsin that has the potential to determine the
entire course of the election outcome.

As we gear up to November, we must keep making critical investments now.

name: David Hogg
subject: 2024 issues survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Your opinions inform our work.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240218-1&t=1&akid=396%2E587540%2ECr1abQ)
Peter,
When Kevin and I launched Leaders We Deserve last year, one of the first things we did was survey our grassroots supporters to learn which issues you all cared about most. We were blown away by the response we got, and it helped _immensely_ in figuring out where we should focus our efforts.
**But we’ve grown a ton since then, and a ton of things have happened in that time. So now that 2024 is well underway, we thought it was time to survey our community again.**
**[Take our 2024 Issues Survey →](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/lwd_2024_email_survey/?amount=5&refcode=em20240218-1-396&akid=396%2E587540%2ECr1abQ)**
As we begin to endorse candidates in more races, knowing what’s most important to grassroots supporters like you will help inform our work.
Knowing exactly which issues and races are most important to you will help us make sure we’re spending the money that you donate in a way that will make you proud. After all, none of what we’re doing would be possible without your support to begin with.
[**So Peter, please take a few moments today to complete our 2024 Issues Survey and let us know what your priorities are in this November’s election.**](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/lwd_2024_email_survey/?refcode=em20240218-1&amount=5&akid=396%2E587540%2ECr1abQ)

Thank you again for your support!

David Hogg

That means defending access to the ballot box, registering voters regardless of their political affiliation, fighting back against misinformation, and so much more that ensures the foundation of our democratic principles remains steadfast. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

A Super Bowl Parade should be a place for celebration and community, not a place of blood and destruction.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79259241/455926509/444630146?refcode=2-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYjM5Y2Q2LTdmY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-04LSOt2ym-BMibygY4bx7tMwkqSaStJFnG_skzfZ6s=)

| | Friend, A Super Bowl Parade should be a place for celebration and community, not a place of blood and destruction. But this week, one person was killed and over 20 more were injured in a shooting at the Kansas City Chiefs Super Bowl victory parade. What could be more American than that? Gun violence should be a problem of the past, but Republicans across the country continue to put allegiance to the NRA above the lives and safety of the American people. It doesn’t have to be like this forever.**[**The NRA will always have Republican politicians to do their bidding until we get Dark Money out of politics. And until we do, the American people will continue to pay the price. Can you chip in $10 so we can continue to work together to get Dark Money out of politics and give power back to the people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79259242/455926510/444630146?refcode=2-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYjM5Y2Q2LTdmY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-04LSOt2ym-BMibygY4bx7tMwkqSaStJFnG_skzfZ6s=)** Listen, we know that with the amount of gun violence in our country, it’s easy to become desensitized to it. But we’re fighting hard to not let that happen. Rampant gun violence doesn’t have to be the norm, and it’s down to us to get the NRA out of politics once and for all.**[We need everyone’s help if we’re to keep up our work toward getting the NRA’s Dark Money out of politics. By contributing $10 today, you can join ECU/LAV Action Fund and we can work together to fight back against these preventable tragedies.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79259244/455926511/444630146?refcode=2-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYjM5Y2Q2LTdmY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-04LSOt2ym-BMibygY4bx7tMwkqSaStJFnG_skzfZ6s=)** It’s because of the NRA’s control of Republican politicians that we can’t pass common sense gun reform measures like an assault weapons ban. Their “thoughts and prayers” following every mass shooting is craven and cowardly.Our country’s gun laws must change. Our lives, and our children’s lives, depend on it. **[It’s beyond time for us to pass gun reform laws. Solving gun violence is crucial and it starts with breaking the NRA’s grip on the Republican Party. To do that we need to shut off their spigot of Dark Money. Your contribution of $10 will help us get the NRA’s blood money out of politics once and for all and save lives every day.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79259245/455926512/444630146?refcode=2-17-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYwYjM5Y2Q2LTdmY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-04LSOt2ym-BMibygY4bx7tMwkqSaStJFnG_skzfZ6s=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

Their “thoughts and prayers” following every mass shooting is craven and cowardly.Our country’s gun laws must change. Our lives, and our children’s lives, depend on it. = Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action | | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund 100 M Street SE Suite 1050 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

It’s Chuck Schumer, and I’m reaching out with an urgent message for all Democrats: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s Senate campaign in Florida is one of our BEST — _and only_ — chances to save our Senate majority.

I know that a donation of $10 might not sound like enough to make a difference in a race like this one. But Debbie’s story shows exactly how impactful a small action can be.
You see, Debbie immigrated to America from Ecuador when she was only 14. After watching her mom work double shifts to pay the bills, Debbie got a job at the local doughnut shop.
Her minimum wage checks were small, but they helped make ends meet. Eventually that doughnut shop job made it possible for her to put herself through college, pursue a career of service, and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress.
Now, Debbie is running for Senate against a megamillionaire who spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat last time around. But she’s not scared.
Debbie knows that just $10, about the cost of a dozen doughnuts, can be enough to change _everything._
**_Just $10_** will help her run ads to fight back against Scott’s lies.

**_Just $10_** will help her hire incredible staff and travel around the state to meet voters.

**_Just $10_** will help her turn out the vote in blue districts, register new voters, and reach swing voters who could make or break this election.

**_Just $10_** could be enough to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority.

If enough people step up and chip in $10 or $25 or whatever you can spare tonight, we can finally flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79259942/455928058/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk821-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk4N2M1OGItODBjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O4ZmZNfgsgnJK0Rbeg5-_ZnvkVfd0Cn78pfehpekDTg=)**

Chuck Schumer

name: Mike Johnson ---- Speaker of the House
subject: This is the single most important email I’ve ever written:
body:
Can you spare JUST 2 minutes of your time?

| |
---
| | | Hi, Mike Johnson here.

I was recently named the 56th Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

**And from the start, I made it very clear:[I work for you, the American People.](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e97409a96c914653b5b49cdbf85c216e&_e=9XRvKCsUEe0Sj63vzuEblrtmVQCwXkONlQcxmB-q0R8gU2Np6amGvLX3rbYQ6lAyQCmXgx0Zz72ncPgk10tLwtq8xOEWYzCYFeeypPiQiNVo9G87r3Udjz9YDhpVIxsJEVRBqc8CIwjt8MQ3QIcfSe-jaZAMKD8XdLHoj1P6naW1npOs-gtmQaqffl0HqEDPek7NSuK50ahrOGwCpfzJkhAVxBfVD0FbetTWomfxMShUGIPB01LpFR2XjXkH6C6-_TrU3uxfV_5IHJTJReQoN1QG8IVR61aMIx93JxQYMq0-0hZDS9u1NUxK9GZUMOhaRPAsTRTlJ9CX9qi7jdW2GfzXNtw4wykVIfsRJGJM_nGJZaDq0aLFkYTfj2MJHp6TjzPJtz5eIbBYWlh4Z1UyJbvYITj-UgLEgIa5WIxDLis%3D "I work for you, the American People.")**

That is why I launched my first initiative as Speaker: A nationwide survey to collect feedback from our most informed, most reliable supporters.

_I 'm pleased to say you made the cut._

As part of this select group, I'm personally asking you to fill out my **[NEW SPEAKER SURVEY](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e97409a96c914653b5b49cdbf85c216e&_e=9XRvKCsUEe0Sj63vzuEblrtmVQCwXkONlQcxmB-q0R8gU2Np6amGvLX3rbYQ6lAyQCmXgx0Zz72ncPgk10tLwtq8xOEWYzCYFeeypPiQiNVo9G87r3Udjz9YDhpVIxsJEVRBqc8CIwjt8MQ3QIcfSe-jaZAMKD8XdLHoj1P6naW1npOs-gtmQaqffl0HqEDPek7NSuK50ahrOGwCpfzJkhAVxBfVD0FbetTWomfxMShUGIPB01LpFR2XjXkH6C6-LPhIpOaSxbLCK3PIn6W84u8K2-3p4nH5874ZXc9BltadXl4N3_8lkWV4Dtu8Z5BayL4kk54XpYxudm_7yOi2LZ1arwiOCXC9hamHIiVuj8_LgPGbOpuBjiq8nIoJCnZSo288mC5reoUHbZthhBHFVWTbftuDx64vpHMpbEgEcAA%3D "NEW SPEAKER SURVEY")** before closing out of this email. I timed it myself and it shouldn't take more than five minutes to complete.

---
| | [TAKE MY NEW SPEAKER SURVEY ](http://links.freelibertyinfo.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e97409a96c914653b5b49cdbf85c216e&_e=9XRvKCsUEe0Sj63vzuEblrtmVQCwXkONlQcxmB-q0R8gU2Np6amGvLX3rbYQ6lAyQCmXgx0Zz72ncPgk10tLwtq8xOEWYzCYFeeypPiQiNVo9G87r3Udjz9YDhpVIxsJEVRBqc8CIwjt8MQ3QIcfSe-jaZAMKD8XdLHoj1P6naW1npOs-gtmQaqffl0HqEDPek7NSuK50ahrOGwCpfzJkhAVxBfVD0FbetTWomfxMShUGIPB01LpFR2XjXkH6C6-GOl4i6B9oV9r-AeTG0HGhFQd7FddzgWOS2rzs9pB4vuVUC57i8Y9VbrDG28yqEU7R7orwvx4_pnz1_rMwS76plfoTQlD-IK3mTygnRk6ejAqwAHDI_F9tDBcq0hS-8Epq0B2pKQUpe8xrMxt47xILz13C3Bl-0YyQ_y880PZQnw%3D "TAKE MY NEW SPEAKER SURVEY ")

I want to make myself perfectly clear:

I really value your feedback. As your Speaker, I want to know what concerns you most and how we can better serve you.

Once you fill out my survey, it'll immediately transmit your responses to me and my team.

_**I 'll be eagerly awaiting your feedback to come through. **_

Thanks for everything you do.

For America,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

name: Katie Porter
subject: personal update 16 days to the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Hello from the campaign trail!
Hello from the campaign trail! Yesterday was a busy day, with a rally in Long Beach followed by a candidate forum hosted by Univision in LA. With just 16 days until the election, every day and every dollar counts.
**I have to be honest, this last week has been tough.** On Tuesday, a crypto super PAC funded by a handful of billionaires spent **$3.6 million on attack ads**. That ad buy came just days after Schiff’s super PAC spent several million against us.
The Schiff campaign alone spent more on Facebook advertising last week than the Biden campaign—they’re spending and raising at record-high levels, and I’ll be blunt—we’re not able to keep up.
Recent polls show that between 20-30% of voters are undecided about who they’ll support in this race, and the results will likely come down to just a few percentage points.
That means every additional digital ad we can get eyeballs on, every additional event we can host, and every extra 30 seconds worth of TV ads we can secure could make all the difference.
**I’m at real risk of losing, which would mean I’m out of Congress for good.** Can you make a donation today to help my campaign ramp up during this final stretch:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240218-1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240218-1?refcode=em20240218-37859&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37859_3422442_e677B8&akid=37859%2E3422442%2Ee677B8)**
Thanks so much, I can’t do this without you.
Katie

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=1&akid=37859%2E3422442%2Ee677B8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=37859%2E3422442%2Ee677B8)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: The facts about immigration

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

subject: Chumming it up with the D.C. elite

**In order to hit our February donor goal, I need 166 patriots to step up and[make a donation of $10 or more today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39e4e14790c9492bbe034240374194be&_e=gPm9Ua9mIVypoFCSb3fa9z98TcHAARt9y66pvuCufx_K79b8dG-p3BabiN7JYcR-QvbBqB_ZftFAVayXNfB0RUcsQp438Wu66MthatFyOFJpPf2x5qqb0u4ji862na-FaYi4UPcUTO2342K-UFM1S5FBJw0TdmzOTYIvxFAQ3LYzD_VOKZojmBwsZw50wfjFLzKaa6VhCJvG1jCWg8HiguXCtGUYy9GExJqTjPvVzoTylFBLZJbksNi00rYRX1lRh9nfQMyKWsjExPLjZGJY-4EZk7e7B9AfdpZdNpoWEnxSM0_Imq62SuHqOyY7OisYfpaQJ9Bq6Huo4z41DS0PwwYywEb0LjtH0habqKp0aY77Bzbc0TpFrhP5EKbWtOYa1EfUMgI4isloClfaTx__ZXLLZ9xXHBFRnBhX2hftdwE%3D)**

Peter,

With over 20 years of raising money under his belt, it’s no surprise that my opponent has had no trouble raising more than **$5.5 million in the final quarter of 2023.**

With more than 18 years of chumming it up with Washington Elite under his belt, it’s no wonder that the most powerful Democrats in the country are _**rushing**_ to spend as much money as possible to secure a fourth Senate term for Jon Tester.

Whether it’s the **25 million dollars** Tester raised in 2023 or the **44.9 million dollars** his friends in DC have **earmarked** to spend on TV ADS in Montana this fall, one thing is sure: Democrats know that I am the one who has what it takes to beat Jon Tester.
**
Navy SEALS fight to win. We don’t quit, and we don’t lose. **

And Jon Tester is ripe for defeat.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39e4e14790c9492bbe034240374194be&_e=gPm9Ua9mIVypoFCSb3fa9z98TcHAARt9y66pvuCufx_K79b8dG-p3BabiN7JYcR-QvbBqB_ZftFAVayXNfB0RUcsQp438Wu66MthatFyOFJpPf2x5qqb0u4ji862na-FaYi4UPcUTO2342K-UFM1S5FBJw0TdmzOTYIvxFAQ3LYzD_VOKZojmBwsZw50wfjFLzKaa6VhCJvG1jCWg8HiguXCtGUYy9GExJqTjPvVzoTylFBLZJbksNi00rYRX1lRh9nfQMyKWsjExPLjZGJY-_k5Hw2jbxDdnajtx-S4SZXeUumsJIuJrvA--jI-mfdcMq0L3iBiViXWvXcwPxGDh61yNblTqC9HlJm3oqQzCvkX1j0-oCmHYMfouC3svZKg8Ps043j5SEgyR-Ge_d2JCbt-0gbcR2MVshowa-P3i-g%3D)
_**If Democrats didn’t invest another penny into Montana, which I assure you won’t be the case, the amount of money they’ve already invested would be akin to spending roughly more than $166,000 against me PER DAY.**_

We can’t compete with them right now on the money front, but polls show that I CAN win in November. So today, **[I’m setting a goal of finding 166 donors to make a gift of $10 to my campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39e4e14790c9492bbe034240374194be&_e=gPm9Ua9mIVypoFCSb3fa9z98TcHAARt9y66pvuCufx_K79b8dG-p3BabiN7JYcR-QvbBqB_ZftFAVayXNfB0RUcsQp438Wu66MthatFyOFJpPf2x5qqb0u4ji862na-FaYi4UPcUTO2342K-UFM1S5FBJw0TdmzOTYIvxFAQ3LYzD_VOKZojmBwsZw50wfjFLzKaa6VhCJvG1jCWg8HiguXCtGUYy9GExJqTjPvVzoTylFBLZJbksNi00rYRX1lRh9nfQMyKWsjExPLjZGJY-2evlR9Y1zHgeUg9XVJwh14N9AtRot6KN5jVOebyH3uj-d_vUTdbnFxenl25wIxv6f29L6JKFJXp4r0hMthkuPchfvZ1j91yXaBJWVR_5kI5xFexbZTkTUYeX8yHd566atftZ6xUbTXPV0Fls3dvSd0%3D)
**
Can I count on you to **[be one of the 166 donors](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39e4e14790c9492bbe034240374194be&_e=gPm9Ua9mIVypoFCSb3fa9z98TcHAARt9y66pvuCufx_K79b8dG-p3BabiN7JYcR-QvbBqB_ZftFAVayXNfB0RUcsQp438Wu66MthatFyOFJpPf2x5qqb0u4ji862na-FaYi4UPcUTO2342K-UFM1S5FBJw0TdmzOTYIvxFAQ3LYzD_VOKZojmBwsZw50wfjFLzKaa6VhCJvG1jCWg8HiguXCtGUYy9GExJqTjPvVzoTylFBLZJbksNi00rYRX1lRh9nfQMyKWsjExPLjZGJY-9RApHdoI8sjHrHGp-JO7iQ5ckbdWTFGDznF-lfaZzzQmBnB_upbCui2aYpYKG8Ny4m5WUBAtZ5qPolqRLqi9QrQ-cTPa4JxtVfYNE_4pRdRj_01bqhBd7DrLl6GlBqCXKctNo1ItkHs7_ln_C-yAb0%3D)** I need to step up and help me fill my February donor fund?

[**CLAIM YOUR DONATION ->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=39e4e14790c9492bbe034240374194be&_e=gPm9Ua9mIVypoFCSb3fa9z98TcHAARt9y66pvuCufx_K79b8dG-p3BabiN7JYcR-QvbBqB_ZftFAVayXNfB0RUcsQp438Wu66MthatFyOFJpPf2x5qqb0u4ji862na-FaYi4UPcUTO2342K-UFM1S5FBJw0TdmzOTYIvxFAQ3LYzD_VOKZojmBwsZw50wfjFLzKaa6VhCJvG1jCWg8HiguXCtGUYy9GExJqTjPvVzoTylFBLZJbksNi00rYRX1lRh9nfQMyKWsjExPLjZGJY--GP_1ZMoj5hsiUwaJVcvX77Z0DfbmzXI3y0jWulM8AELT6o6HY4Jk_0i6pPiahJhgG2wMbqNhZ9xn6EfMYH_6SbBd1zlolelD4hHuP09p9PCvriEWQk6UoCuRWOLd0yBE5JZAM3e-PdIrxWYqEiCcg%3D)

When you read newspaper headlines in Montana and the national press, it’s clear that this race - and this state - will be the center of the political universe for the next nine months. The amount of money Democrats have reserved to spend in Montana should tell you all you need to know about what’s at stake in this race.

_**Let’s get this done.**_

For America's Future,
Tim Sheehy
Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana

subject: 🚨ATTENTION: Republican Party of Nebraska Announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
NEGOP+ Booster Membership Drive | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a57c3dc71a06/n41kepo7ku-12681390?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ba02ffffb0&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| With the 2024 Elections, **May 14th Primary and November 5th General** fast approaching, the Republican Party of Nebraska has a lot to do!

Our Party and our values need _your_ support like never before.

_Your_ support of the **Republican Party of Nebraska** is instrumental in our mission to promote conservative values and maintain our government of, by, and for the people when we elect Constitutional and Platform Republican leaders who will represent _your_ interests all across this state.

For most voters, the focus in 2024 will be on the Presidential election. And our mission is clear, you and I know we can’t afford four more years of a Biden Presidency!

[**Join our NEGOP+ Booster Club today and be part of a membership that works tirelessly to uphold the principles that our great republic stands for. Click here to register and pick the membership level that suits you best.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=85310d9f83&e=25844e23a8)

Here in Nebraska, we are committed to increasing the number of Republican officeholders in the State Legislature and in Education positions, ensuring that our children receive the best possible education. 244 local school boards need Republican values to DEFEND against the liberal agenda and PROMOTE higher proficiency scores.

To support these efforts and invest in a robust party infrastructure, we need your support like never before.

_Your_ contribution will help fund Republican campaign resources, support our voter outreach, and engage in initiatives to strengthen our party.

Together, we can secure a brighter future for Nebraska.

Our State Party does the work no candidate can do alone: Registering new voters. Canvassing voters. Recruiting volunteers. Mobilizing our state-wide-county operation.

We will also be aggressive in getting legislation that matches the **Photo Voter ID **Initiative that 65.45% of Nebraskans voted for in 2022. We know the Dems are waiting to harvest ballots and we must secure our elections by ensuring that a voter must show PROPER Photo ID at the moment of CASTING their vote.

Our goal is simple ... to further our principles in our communities and elect more
Republicans at all levels in Nebraska ... starting with electing a Republican President. And we need you on our team!

[**Join us today and be part of a membership that chooses****BOLD****action versus status quo politics. Click here to register and pick the membership level that suits you best.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=a7d49ff2fb&e=25844e23a8)

_**Here's a snapshot of what you can expect from each membership level:**_

**_CHAIRMAN'S CLUB_ \- _PREMIUM LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $600 or $50 monthly, you get all the benefits of the Preferred Level, plus:
A private invite to our Chairman's Club Dinner with VIPs
A stylish quarter-zipper sweater

**_CAPITOL CLUB_ \- _PREFERRED LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $450 or $37.50 monthly, you get all the benefits of the Plus Level, plus:
A choice from an array of custom local T-shirts
An annual Zoom meeting or phone call with House or Senate leadership

**_VICTORY CLUB_ \- _PLUS LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $300 or $25 monthly, you get all the benefits of the Basic Level, plus:
An exclusive NEGOP+ high-quality tumbler/thermos
Access to an exclusive quarterly Zoom meeting with me, the Chairman of Nebraska GOP

**_BOOSTER CLUB_ \- _BASIC LEVEL_**
For a yearly fee of $150 or $12.50 monthly, you get:
A unique NEGOP+ Club Pin
Access to exclusive NEGOP+ events

[**Join us today and be part of a membership that believes in The People of Nebraska. Click here to register and pick the membership level that suits you best.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8b53e3019f&e=25844e23a8)

Your support is integral to the GOP's strength in Nebraska. I look forward to welcoming you to our growing NEGOP+ community!
---
| Best,

Eric Underwood - Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---

You can [update your preferences](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=1a996f6e0c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&t=b&e=25844e23a8&c=1a996f6e0c).

body:
We’re facing a slew of special elections in ultra-competitive states like Michigan and New Hampshire, and Republicans are prepared to dump huge sums of money into battleground states this year. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**20,000.** That’s how many grassroots Democrats have committed to defending our democracy against Republican voter suppression. **20,000.** Democrats have taken a meaningful step to elect leaders who will protect abortion access in our statehouses. **20,000.** Democrats have joined a movement larger than themselves to fight against Republican extremism. **Grassroots supporters from every state in the country have donated to our movement to elect state Dems ( including 153 from your community!). But you still haven’t joined them.** We’re facing a slew of special elections in ultra-competitive states like Michigan and New Hampshire, and Republicans are prepared to dump huge sums of money into battleground states this year. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Stop eating oatmeal and quinoa
body:
Untitled Document

Please read the
following message from our sponsor.

You've been told over and over in
the media that foods like oatmeal and quinoa are good for you,
and you should eat lots of them. But what most people don't
realize is that these two particular foods contain compounds that
can actually harm your health and your digestion in many ways...

And as your favorite
Nutritionist, I'll explain why in this quick email, so you can
avoid further harming your health and digestion with these
so-called "healthy" foods...

1. Oatmeal and Oat Milk

While oatmeal is touted as a
healthy carb and a source of fiber, unfortunately there are more
cons than pros with this food...

The first problem with oats is
that they are loaded with a compound called phytic acid
(phytates) that significantly lowers your absorption of certain
minerals and vitamins, such as calcium, magnesium, and zinc.

So whenever you eat oats, the
phytic acid causes you to absorb less of these vitally important
minerals which could cause health problems if you eat oats too
frequently, since most people already don't get enough minerals
like magnesium and zinc.

The second problem with oats is
that they contain one of the highest residue concentrations of
the toxic herbicide glyphosate, which can damage your gut, and
have been linked to other health problems like cancer, hormone
issues, and more.

The next major problem with oats
is that they are a significant source of mycotoxins in the diet,
which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut
problems, hormone problems and more.

Lastly, oats can also contain
high levels of the toxic heavy metal Cadmium, which is linked to
health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your
body.

2. Quinoa

Quinoa is another food that is
pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this
is another example of a food that has more downsides than good
sides.

First off, quinoa is high in
compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies
to cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut".

Another problematic compound in
quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can
damage the cells of your intestines, and contribute to several
gut disorders and immune system problems.

Many friends and colleagues of
mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa,
bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of
autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions.

Now that we've talked about why
we should avoid oatmeal and quinoa if we want to avoid many of
these health issues, let's look below at a unique way to HEAL
your gut, get rid of gas and bloating, increase energy, and lose
fat easier...

Broccoli vs Kale vs Green
Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat.

This veggie can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones... It contains a toxin that damages the
lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and
a bulging belly.

Do you know the veggie I'm
talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you
think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the
next page:

>> Green Beans

>> Broccoli

>> Kale

>> Cauliflower

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Marc Damikolas
subject: How I Met Allyson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Hey there, I’m Marc, Allyson’s husband.

I’ve known Allyson since we were teenagers. We first met when we were both lifeguards in high school, and then we also both studied engineering at Cal Poly Pomona.

For the over three decades that I’ve known Allyson now, she’s always been committed to serving her community. Her selflessness is one of her many qualities that I admire.

She also inspires me every day, even when times are tough, Allyson is resilient. I can’t wait to see Allyson continue to progress as a leader and represent this wonderful community in CA-40.

I know you’ve received emails from my kids too, but as someone who’s known Allyson since I was a kid, I can tell you firsthand she’ll deliver on her promises.

I’m asking you to contribute any amount that you’re able to help Allyson WIN her campaign for Congress and represent this district with the same resilience and spirit that she’s shown me for over three decades.

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2024q1?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.02.18_B1_HowIMetAllyson_FriendsAndFamilyList]

Thank you for your consistent help!

– Marc

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813
Tustin, CA 92781-9998
United States

name: Maxwell Alejandro Frost
subject: important you understand, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/TSOAjtt7skYTDxFPTsuBWg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRntNAXP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIxOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc19lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yY1NaUk1yYkJsM2N2a1cwWTFzMExCQmM1bnkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmNTWlJNcmJCbDNjdmtXMFkxczBMQkJjNW55JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJjU1pSTXJiQmwzY3ZrVzBZMXMwTEJCYzVueVcDc3BjQgplzhdL0mWb2DHIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Peter, this email is long.

But now that I just started my second year in Congress, I think it's important you understand my (less than conventional) road here, my experience, and what kind of leader I plan to be. [If you’re short on time, I understand, but please consider chipping in to get us closer to our $10,000 goal and keep me fighting for the most vulnerable among us in Congress >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/TSOAjtt7skYTDxFPTsuBWg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRntNAXP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIxOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc19lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yY1NaUk1yYkJsM2N2a1cwWTFzMExCQmM1bnkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmNTWlJNcmJCbDNjdmtXMFkxczBMQkJjNW55JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJjU1pSTXJiQmwzY3ZrVzBZMXMwTEJCYzVueVcDc3BjQgplzhdL0mWb2DHIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, my biological mother turned to drugs and crime while she was pregnant with me. She didn’t have healthcare during this time and wasn’t able to see a doctor even once. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care and raise another child. I learned all of this just two months before I announced my run for Congress. **Understanding my biological mother’s story and the circumstances surrounding my birth underscored for me why politics is so important. And it further crystallized my core vision of it - that we need our elected leaders who view the world through the eyes of the most vulnerable.** My community needs a leader like that in Congress and I’m running to be that person - someone that fights every day for and with the marginalized and disadvantaged. A champion for working people. This isn’t new for me though. I’ve been fighting for my community since I was 15 years old when I became an advocate for ending gun violence following the Sandy Hook shooting. In 2018, I helped lead the ACLU of Florida’s fight to win Amendment 4, which restored voting rights to over 1.6 million Floridians who had previous felony convictions. While at the ACLU in 2020, I worked to win Biden’s support for abolishing the Hyde Amendment, legislation that has limited abortion access for millions of people. As Organizing Director at March for Our Lives, one of the largest youth political movements in the country, I led an ambitious voter turnout program that helped drive a record number of young people to the polls, helping to hold the House, and win a Democratic Senate, and Presidency. **I share all of this with you, so you understand the kind of leader I am and will continue to be.** [Peter, I didn’t make it this far on my own and I’m going to need _your support_ to continue my fight in Congress. I need to raise another $7,000 before my deadline tonight. Please, if you can, chip in $27 right now >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/TSOAjtt7skYTDxFPTsuBWg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRntNAXP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIxOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc19lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yY1NaUk1yYkJsM2N2a1cwWTFzMExCQmM1bnkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmNTWlJNcmJCbDNjdmtXMFkxczBMQkJjNW55JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJjU1pSTXJiQmwzY3ZrVzBZMXMwTEJCYzVueVcDc3BjQgplzhdL0mWb2DHIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Iold-uaomeKRfGc-Wlkpjw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRntNAXP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIxOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc19lbi1ycyZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yY1NaUk1yYkJsM2N2a1cwWTFzMExCQmM1bnkmcmVmY29kZTI9MmNTWlJNcmJCbDNjdmtXMFkxczBMQkJjNW55JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJjU1pSTXJiQmwzY3ZrVzBZMXMwTEJCYzVueVcDc3BjQgplzhdL0mWb2DHIUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Peter, I wouldn’t be asking for your help if there wasn’t _so much_ at stake.
**Our society is structured in a way that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us._A system that makes it nearly impossible to earn a living wage, obtain access to healthcare, and escape gun violence._**
And right now, those enabling that system are desperate to maintain power and shut out anyone who tries to challenge their destructive policies.
I’m ready to fight back in Congress, but if my campaign doesn’t have the funds to keep me there, our voices will continue to be silenced. We can’t let that happen.

clean_body: | ~~ Peter, this email is long. But now that I just started my second year in Congress, I think it's important you understand my (less than conventional) road here, my experience, and what kind of leader I plan to be. ~~ A victim of the system and enmeshed in trying circumstances, my biological mother turned to drugs and crime while she was pregnant with me. She didn’t have healthcare during this time and wasn’t able to see a doctor even once. As the mother of seven, she made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption because she lacked the resources to care and raise another child. I learned all of this just two months before I announced my run for Congress. Understanding my biological mother’s story and the circumstances surrounding my birth underscored for me why politics is so important. And it further crystallized my core vision of it - that we need our elected leaders who view the world through the eyes of the most vulnerable. My community needs a leader like that in Congress and I’m running to be that person - someone that fights every day for and with the marginalized and disadvantaged. A champion for working people. This isn’t new for me though. I’ve been fighting for my community since I was 15 years old when I became an advocate for ending gun violence following the Sandy Hook shooting. In 2018, I helped lead the ACLU of Florida’s fight to win Amendment 4, which restored voting rights to over 1.6 million Floridians who had previous felony convictions. While at the ACLU in 2020, I worked to win Biden’s support for abolishing the Hyde Amendment, legislation that has limited abortion access for millions of people. As Organizing Director at March for Our Lives, one of the largest youth political movements in the country, I led an ambitious voter turnout program that helped drive a record number of young people to the polls, helping to hold the House, and win a Democratic Senate, and Presidency. I share all of this with you, so you understand the kind of leader I am and will continue to be. ~~ | | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Peter, I wouldn’t be asking for your help if there wasn’t so much at stake. Our society is structured in a way that makes life more difficult for the most vulnerable among us.A system that makes it nearly impossible to earn a living wage, obtain access to healthcare, and escape gun violence. And right now, those enabling that system are desperate to maintain power and shut out anyone who tries to challenge their destructive policies. I’m ready to fight back in Congress, but if my campaign doesn’t have the funds to keep me there, our voices will continue to be silenced. We can’t let that happen. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ ~ Thank you, Maxwell Alejandro Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to keep this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you become a Founding Donor of this movement today? | ~~ | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5510%2E5257348%2EOR9dyW)
Derek, I’m _laser-focused_ on the next **16 days.**
Our primary election is March 5, and the outcome is up in the air.
Up to a third of voters are still undecided, and Donald Trump just attacked me while spreading damaging lies about California’s election integrity.
**With Trump’s attacks on our election system and me personally, we have to hit tonight’s fundraising goal to reach more voters before the voter registration deadline in just two days.**
**[My team says we need 938 contributions before midnight to reach tonight’s fundraising goal and fully fund our voter outreach efforts. I’m personally counting on you, Derek. We CANNOT reach this goal without your help. body:
#
Peter,
**Here’s why we’re reaching out:** DC insiders have already spent millions of dollars to prop up Josh Hawley in this race. They know he’s the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election this year — and they know he’s already in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
**Here’s why it matters:** This race is our most affordable and winnable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024. And with so much at stake in this election, not having the resources to stand up to those national insiders and take advantage of this opportunity could be a huge mistake.
**So we’re coming directly to you, Peter:[Will you rush a donation of any amount toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43835?refcode=em20240218-4829&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4829%2E614464%2ENyOnO4)**

clean_body: Peter, Here’s why we’re reaching out: DC insiders have already spent millions of dollars to prop up Josh Hawley in this race. They know he’s the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election this year — and they know he’s already in a neck-and-neck race with Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. Here’s why it matters: This race is our most affordable and winnable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024. And with so much at stake in this election, not having the resources to stand up to those national insiders and take advantage of this opportunity could be a huge mistake. So we’re coming directly to you, Peter: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Lucas doesn’t take a single penny from corporate PACs, so please know that when we say your support — no matter the amount — makes a big impact, we really mean it. Thanks for all your help, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: Why did they name it that?
body:
Jesse James visits Pink Bench Distillery - for Troy Montana's iconic Pink Bench in front of the store | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/why-did-they-name-it-that?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e064b045d3&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=cf762d16cc&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James,
Our tour recently brought us to the NW corner of Montana to visit with two amazing women entrepreneurs at [Pink Bench Distilling](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=0149fe4023&e=805e709ff8). Shawna Kelsey and Kris Boyd are bringing people together with their new venture, and the commitment to their community is inspiring.
But if it weren’t for incredible patience and perseverance, it wouldn’t happen. Montana’s state government is too frequently a company-killing obstacle for locally-owned businesses.

| [DONATE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=49089cc42c&e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=e7bf54c97e&e=805e709ff8)
Two young women breaking into the distilling market in rural Montana is no small task.
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=867e5b5f32&e=805e709ff8)
Help me return competent customer service to Helena. Montana has been without good service since Linda McCulloch was term-limited out of the Secretary of State’s office.
[**Will you chip in $4 to elect motivated and competent leadership to Helena?**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=b6005efd55&e=805e709ff8)
I don’t fearmonger in these emails, and I try to send as few as possible to respect your time and resources. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t essential.
Thank you,Jesse James Mullen

| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c4ce8a34ab&e=805e709ff8)
---
|
---

body:
Why haven't you responded?
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f436c77d7f14d01b6a742459e7837e1&_e=p2h3v5VPrWNLl-UVqPYAHkyILLZ_Xb3hMrtNHJbNJ40rPs7VvolFpwndKRd2fBO0ycB5GqTE74pZlmFhc0D3AghQ4xEY7_MPxK6BQzcnf6NuyALhyGjeYMZFq_LOJsqKx8mVJ8vFnb9qfq3ibz02uKKKNM86Gi7fZvQhEK4t7sBvq9uiFHYOZtpdFm_0jSBUI6XjdkU57gvBdLMYsMe_ptumpTiPu7jy6NEXHZhlHvVyeKV8dcnUfuCoHgW-vRClC5Vu_WH4rh6-ATp_ec4_r7nbvuCLTOQ7TDVb1EodmLLwW-lSIEsjj9ERTYtNzBoIzpfJ3kXecQjqLTCKjUWfm08rMdhl-4_e6-qvzWyiETbQDNiqRPfdpNYQ0WAPYtO6tbpxzsCp7nBJMj6bfhv2XJl38BqgN3kF1GgOiFC6SuaE8CjGKHTwydNUiLS9AYVPZKYdp1CTtEjeOczDuS8U4vVcu42HEtZpKyyX4KP4Rag%3D)

Peter,

House Republican Majority Leader Steve Scalise has been trying to get in touch with YOU about our Party's [**2024 Platform Audit.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f436c77d7f14d01b6a742459e7837e1&_e=p2h3v5VPrWNLl-UVqPYAHkyILLZ_Xb3hMrtNHJbNJ40rPs7VvolFpwndKRd2fBO0ycB5GqTE74pZlmFhc0D3AghQ4xEY7_MPxK6BQzcnf6NuyALhyGjeYMZFq_LOJsqKx8mVJ8vFnb9qfq3ibz02uKKKNM86Gi7fZvQhEK4t7sBvq9uiFHYOZtpdFm_0jSBUI6XjdkU57gvBdLMYsMe_ptumpTiPu7jy6NEXHZhlHvVyeKV8dcnUfuCoHgW-vRClC5Vu_WH4rh6-ATp_ec4_r7nbvuCLTOQ7TDVb1EodmLLwW-lSIEsjj9ERTYtNzBoIzpfJ3kXecQjqLTCKjUWfm3ACHs9I5vcrePiQWvul4gkC_GSbv2ApIeHETJ84YTx4EDSSn3gbJxx8TU5tMY4opn0NkVWDxql7uI7zSZZ0LnNJs_ki3LFnKtbwfEDk1z3TZVo5OQKnknFu6nCVByUK5QPIyGTU60fH2pqnExlW7Lw%3D)

He registered it in YOUR NAME to give GOP leaders an opportunity to hear directly from you, but you never responded to several of the questions.

[**This is your opportunity to stand out and be heard, Peter. Make the most of it by completing our 2024 Party Platform Audit IMMEDIATELY.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f436c77d7f14d01b6a742459e7837e1&_e=p2h3v5VPrWNLl-UVqPYAHkyILLZ_Xb3hMrtNHJbNJ40rPs7VvolFpwndKRd2fBO0ycB5GqTE74pZlmFhc0D3AghQ4xEY7_MPxK6BQzcnf6NuyALhyGjeYMZFq_LOJsqKx8mVJ8vFnb9qfq3ibz02uKKKNM86Gi7fZvQhEK4t7sBvq9uiFHYOZtpdFm_0jSBUI6XjdkU57gvBdLMYsMe_ptumpTiPu7jy6NEXHZhlHvVyeKV8dcnUfuCoHgW-vRClC5Vu_WH4rh6-ATp_ec4_r7nbvuCLTOQ7TDVb1EodmLLwW-lSIEsjj9ERTYtNzBoIzpfJ3kXecQjqLTCKjUWfm48gDoqdYFWdocnRoh57DFujGnBmEKY_koE7yS-CG4Vow2_Hpp999yIc94Nx-MKK_XoAGQ9_Jl1yST2wiu5KfDbE2sxTeHnhqJD0WobLFNoO0ZsxVFbhumqAsWAh4yXODV8GhUBIlmN0LBWgLjel32g%3D)

Thank you,

Republican Party Headquarters

***************************

This November's elections will be a battle for the future of America, Peter.

Republicans across the country are running to combat the left's insane agenda and protect our freedoms, but if we're going to WIN on election day, we'll need input from real Americans like YOU.

That's why I'm attaching the [**2024 Republican Party Platform Audit**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8f436c77d7f14d01b6a742459e7837e1&_e=p2h3v5VPrWNLl-UVqPYAHkyILLZ_Xb3hMrtNHJbNJ40rPs7VvolFpwndKRd2fBO0ycB5GqTE74pZlmFhc0D3AghQ4xEY7_MPxK6BQzcnf6NuyALhyGjeYMZFq_LOJsqKx8mVJ8vFnb9qfq3ibz02uKKKNM86Gi7fZvQhEK4t7sBvq9uiFHYOZtpdFm_0jSBUI6XjdkU57gvBdLMYsMe_ptumpTiPu7jy6NEXHZhlHvVyeKV8dcnUfuCoHgW-vRClC5Vu_WH4rh6-ATp_ec4_r7nbvuCLTOQ7TDVb1EodmLLwW-lSIEsjj9ERTYtNzBoIzpfJ3kXecQjqLTCKjUWfm11v797gtVbFt-5OAuQs7NJaBGq5mqCswBbcoemp4-U_jQDyLqLg1Emy8ag8yGsYSQei_4fZJCAJ_1ZHmgbWXuVXgmUq8WPCVjoDdszPBJng8kh3kcBV5Dt0z8m6jdtxFrQOQ8lWgo8mvvdCeASInVI%3D) below to give YOU a chance to make your voice heard. name: Adam Schiff
subject: A more personal message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79266350/455949619/18334046?UTS_FR_90DO_240218_1_2=refcode&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhMTQxMzIwLTkzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2hK1yY08F9iyXq-d1bQjRcGWi6OsUkvb6wZ5WJSVFDk=)
Peter—

This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country.

The last few years have been grueling for our nation and our democracy, but it hasn’t always been like this.

There was a time before Donald Trump. When you could disagree without being disagreeable. When it wasn’t taboo to have friends across the aisle, or at least people you could work with. When you would bring people together — Democrats and Republicans — to get things done.

Why? Because it was in the best interest of the American people to have a government that functioned. And that wasn’t in chaos 24/7.

Those days feel long gone now. We have seen a seismic shift in the last few years — since a charlatan celebrity and reality TV host who called disabled veterans “suckers” and “losers,” denigrated our immigrant communities, and railed on about “fake news” was elected President of the United States.

I’ve never been one to back down from the bad guys — so amidst these attacks, I did my duty and called him out. I took on these fights not because they were easy, but because it needed to be done.

That vitriol has taken a turn for the worse. Here’s what the other side has had to say about me:

“Wild-eyed conspiracy nut.” - Tucker Carlson
“Pencil neck. Shifty Schiff.” - Donald Trump
“[He] openly lied to the American public.” - Kevin McCarthy

Never in my life would I expect to be cast a president’s “favorite” enemy — but here we are. And I’m not going to back down.

It doesn’t end with these personal attacks either. With every new insult comes a horde of MAGA supporters, ready to pile on more death threats. Through Twitter. Email. Phone calls. Letters. You name it. With multiple people prosecuted for threatening to kill me. That NEVER happened before Trump.

There are days when the fight gets difficult. During the impeachment process. Serving on the January 6 Committee. When House Republicans censured me for doing my constitutional duty.

But like I said on the House floor, I am honored by their enmity. I am flattered by the falsehoods they level against me. Those who were the authors of the big lie must attack the truth tellers and I am proud to stand accused. I wear their attacks as a badge of honor. Knowing that I have lived by my oath of office.

My guiding principle has been serving in a way that will bring pride to my children. I believe that right and truth and decency matter now more than ever.

After long nights of consideration, I decided to run for California’s U.S. Senate seat. Because MAGA Republicans aren’t getting the job done and there’s too much that needs fixing. I have a record of getting tough things done, and I’m ready to do the hard work needed for our families, for our economy, for our democracy, and for our planet.

[**It’s clear Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are going to do everything they can to sabotage my campaign — because they know how effective I am at gathering the truth, making a case, and holding them accountable. I need your help to overcome their attacks. Will you rush in a split $3 donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help me continue my work for the American people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79266351/455949620/443154033?amount=3&UTS_FR_90DO_240218_1_2=refcode&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhMTQxMzIwLTkzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2hK1yY08F9iyXq-d1bQjRcGWi6OsUkvb6wZ5WJSVFDk=)
