clean_body: = Peter— This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country. The last few years have been grueling for our nation and our democracy, but it hasn’t always been like this. There was a time before Donald Trump. When you could disagree without being disagreeable. When it wasn’t taboo to have friends across the aisle, or at least people you could work with. When you would bring people together — Democrats and Republicans — to get things done. Why? Because it was in the best interest of the American people to have a government that functioned. And that wasn’t in chaos 24/7. Those days feel long gone now. We have seen a seismic shift in the last few years — since a charlatan celebrity and reality TV host who called disabled veterans “suckers” and “losers,” denigrated our immigrant communities, and railed on about “fake news” was elected President of the United States. I’ve never been one to back down from the bad guys — so amidst these attacks, I did my duty and called him out. I took on these fights not because they were easy, but because it needed to be done. That vitriol has taken a turn for the worse. Here’s what the other side has had to say about me: “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut.” - Tucker Carlson “Pencil neck. Shifty Schiff.” - Donald Trump “[He] openly lied to the American public.” - Kevin McCarthy Never in my life would I expect to be cast a president’s “favorite” enemy — but here we are. And I’m not going to back down. It doesn’t end with these personal attacks either. With every new insult comes a horde of MAGA supporters, ready to pile on more death threats. Through Twitter. Email. Phone calls. Letters. You name it. With multiple people prosecuted for threatening to kill me. That NEVER happened before Trump. There are days when the fight gets difficult. During the impeachment process. Serving on the January 6 Committee. When House Republicans censured me for doing my constitutional duty. But like I said on the House floor, I am honored by their enmity. I am flattered by the falsehoods they level against me. Those who were the authors of the big lie must attack the truth tellers and I am proud to stand accused. I wear their attacks as a badge of honor. Knowing that I have lived by my oath of office. My guiding principle has been serving in a way that will bring pride to my children. I believe that right and truth and decency matter now more than ever. After long nights of consideration, I decided to run for California’s U.S. Senate seat. Because MAGA Republicans aren’t getting the job done and there’s too much that needs fixing. I have a record of getting tough things done, and I’m ready to do the hard work needed for our families, for our economy, for our democracy, and for our planet. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you, Adam | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. subject: BREAKING: McConnell’s super PAC makes massive Ohio ad buy

body:
Team, it's Sherrod Brown, and I'll be quick.
News just broke that a Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC is reserving nearly $83M of TV airtime in Ohio ALONE to attack my record and flip this seat red.
This is the largest reservation ever made by this group in a single state.
I know we can fight back and win this race, but not without your help. So please, will you donate now to me and Serve America to fight back against Mitch McConnell, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]

clean_body: | Friend, This is the most important email you will receive all year. Keep reading. This is proof the Deep State exists. I was getting anxious, so recently, I released an entire recording of the time a Deep State agent tried to bribe me and get me to step away from politics. I wanted you to know that I'm not sitting cozy in a comfy job because I f**** care about this country so much. Considering everything that's happened means we must tell the country our story, and we need to keep fighting no matter what. We've come too far to give up now. Meeting these fundraising deadlines is crucial to a winning campaign, and this FIRST DEADLINE OF THE YEAR is no different. I'm offering you an opportunity to make a difference in the most important Senate race of 2024. This link automatically activates 30X IMPACT!!! Yes, that is a 3,000% IMPACT FOR A LIMITED TIME. | Let's make it count. These are REAL goals and REAL deadlines. We can't miss them. We really can't. Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, **.

We did some research and made a quiz whose answers even shocked us. See if you know the answers to these questions and then let us know you’re committed to helping elect more black women to office in 2024. | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI=20Ohio?=
subject: 🔥 URGENT! Vote on or before March 19th!
body:
🔥 URGENT! Vote on or before March 19th! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=acc281e633&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
Happy New Year!

I’m sorry we haven’t communicated in quite a while. It’s been a busy few months for “self-governance” in Ohio. Issue 1 in August, another Issue 1 in November, and now a primary election just around the corner, which is the reason for this communication.

Many volunteers across Ohio are working to fix what we believe is wrong with the way we’re governed at the local, state, and national levels. But it all starts locally, because as the saying goes, “All politics is local.”

We have an opportunity with Ohio’s March 19th primary election to wrest control of both Ohio’s House of Representatives & the Ohio Republican Party from insider, corrupt, career politicians. But it won’t be easy, and we need your help. Please consider doing everything you can to lend a hand.

---
| | | **
WE MUST VOTE
ON****-or- BEFORE
MARCH 19TH!**

---
| If you're an Ohio Trump supporter, don't skip the March 19th Republican Primary. While President Trump's nomination is secure, there's still crucial work to do. We need your vote to secure Senate control, gain House seats, support local conservatives, and defeat the Ohio "Blue 22". MOST IMPORTANTLY Democrats may try to sway the primary to weaken our candidates by pulling a Republican primary ballot and "crossing over" to steal our votes! Your vote ensures we elect strong Republicans who will advance the "Trump Agenda". Spread the word and vote on March 19th (or any time February 21 or after using absentee or early-voting options). Check out our recommended candidates at **[LiberatorList.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e9f156d9db&e=5c740fa3e2)**. President Trump is counting on us to shape the future. It's now or never!

---
| |
**THE OHIO “LIBERATOR LIST”

[www.liberatorlist.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cc27aa342b&e=5c740fa3e2)**

---
|
Myriad people involved in grassroots political activism across Ohio have built this list to make all Ohioans aware of candidates who aren't establishment & tend to be small-government, freedom-loving, America-loving, regular people. These candidate have stood up and are willing to contribute their time, talent, and/or treasure to run for office in hopes of fixing our badly broken communities, state & nation. They face an uphill battle against insider, establishment, money, a legacy corporate media that disrespects them, and the headwind of cancel culture degrading word-of-mouth support. You can see the list [HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1f0e832cf0&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below. We pray this list will help in this battle against these obstacles. Please share it with everyone you can!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=47a24dda86&e=5c740fa3e2)

This list is not an endorsement of these candidates. We urge you to do your own homework & research these people. Where we can, we've linked to their web presence so you can click their names & start your exploration. Worst case, if you're pressed for time or can't drum up what's needed to do a deeper dive, we believe you can trust these candidates to do a good job of representing you. We believe they are the best candidates of those from whom you will be asked to choose on March 19, 2024, in Ohio's primary election.

---
| |
**HELP US PROMOTE THE "LIBERATOR LIST"**

---
|
If you like this idea please become part of our promotional army across Ohio to help us promote the "Liberator List". As we did with both Issue 1 ballot initiatives, we are promoting the “Liberator List” with magnetic car door signs, magnetic bumper stickers, and re-stickable bumper stickers.

The new twist here is we’ve made these generic so they can be used over and over for every election. The signs & stickers won’t change but the web page will! Invest in signs or stickers once & promote our movement many times!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=10f839b999&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Car Door Magnets (9" x 12")_

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=019107ecfd&e=5c740fa3e2)
_Bumper Sticker (9" x 3") either magnetic or re-stickable_

Order yours by going **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2fcce0bf37&e=5c740fa3e2)** or clicking on the images above. You will pay when you receive your order. There's no payment needed up-front.

Please don’t delay. Early voting starts February 21st!

Remember, we're just getting started. This effort will continue for every election!

Thank you!

---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=082eb9bb13&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ddac9bdb2b&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4aa3dff253&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=4757e89987) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=4757e89987).

---

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: Bring. It. On.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
I’m ready to go toe to toe with David Schweikert on border security |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79267535/455953156/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljMzcyNzUtOThjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I9623zDoMIo7oSVBabppDmOcUHA7YB8k7zdmibVtY04=)
---
Peter, our country is facing a border crisis. Last week, David Schweikert and Republicans in Congress could have done something about it – in a bipartisan fashion. They said “no” for one reason and one reason only: Schweikert and Donald Trump would rather have a political wedge issue than take action and make progress. Well, if David Schweikert wants to make the race for Congress here in Arizona about border security, I have three words for him: Bring. It. On. As Arizona Assistant Attorney General, I went after the cartels that traffic humans and drugs across our border. I helped prosecute one of the largest human smuggling operations in the state's history. In contrast, Schweikert has voted to cut our border patrol agents and wants to get rid of the FBI because they’re too mean to Trump. As a proud son of immigrants, I know how important it is to the success of our country that we have an immigration system that is fair for all people. The current chaos does nothing other than give more power and money to the cartels. **[If we’re going to defeat David Schweikert, we need to be able to go on offense when it comes to our border. I’m ready to do that, but to get the chance to do so, I need your support today. Peter, can I count on you to pitch in to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79267537/455953159/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljMzcyNzUtOThjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I9623zDoMIo7oSVBabppDmOcUHA7YB8k7zdmibVtY04=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79267539/455953162/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzljMzcyNzUtOThjZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I9623zDoMIo7oSVBabppDmOcUHA7YB8k7zdmibVtY04=) Every day, I hear from Arizonans frustrated about the inaction at the border. Washington has failed us and after 14 years in Congress, David Schweikert is a big part of the problem. In Congress, I will fight for real action, like more resources and reforms on the border. David Schweikert has proven once again he’s more focused on doing what’s good for him and Donald Trump than what’s good for our community and country. clean_body: I’m ready to go toe to toe with David Schweikert on border security | = Peter, our country is facing a border crisis. Last week, David Schweikert and Republicans in Congress could have done something about it – in a bipartisan fashion. They said “no” for one reason and one reason only: Schweikert and Donald Trump would rather have a political wedge issue than take action and make progress. Well, if David Schweikert wants to make the race for Congress here in Arizona about border security, I have three words for him: Bring. It. On. As Arizona Assistant Attorney General, I went after the cartels that traffic humans and drugs across our border. I helped prosecute one of the largest human smuggling operations in the state's history. In contrast, Schweikert has voted to cut our border patrol agents and wants to get rid of the FBI because they’re too mean to Trump. As a proud son of immigrants, I know how important it is to the success of our country that we have an immigration system that is fair for all people. The current chaos does nothing other than give more power and money to the cartels. = = Every day, I hear from Arizonans frustrated about the inaction at the border. Washington has failed us and after 14 years in Congress, David Schweikert is a big part of the problem. In Congress, I will fight for real action, like more resources and reforms on the border. David Schweikert has proven once again he’s more focused on doing what’s good for him and Donald Trump than what’s good for our community and country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In your service, Andrei Cherny Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. [**I OPPOSE REFORM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79267992/455954133/-1761503001?refcode=ea.edac16fc-98ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.edac16fc-98ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGFjMTZmYy05OGNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hap33WGXOT0rFrL_-T9nU_POXDnrcA5m5gPOi2kWFck=&emci=4d9997b3-e0cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=edac16fc-98ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

While most U.S. states have enacted medical cannabis legislation and eased legal repercussions for cannabis possession, Tennessee has FAILED to pass any kind of reform.
America has a long history of applying anti-cannabis laws unequally, particularly targeting communities of color for prosecution. Meanwhile, Tennessee patients are unable to access medical cannabis to relieve symptoms from conditions like cancer and Multiple Sclerosis.

Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
From day one, I’ve always said that this race is about the people of Texas.
And if I’m going to run a truly grassroots campaign, then that means I need to get out and actually meet people where they’re at.
That’s why I’ve put over 5,000 miles — and counting — on the road since this campaign began.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
[CHIP IN TO ELECT ROLAND >>] [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
I’ve visited every corner of this state, Peter — and I’m just getting started.
Everywhere I’ve gone, people have told me personal stories about why they support an assault weapons ban, abortion rights, affordable health care, and so much more.
For me, it’s a powerful reminder that this race isn’t about scoring political points or winning power in DC.
This race is about fighting for real people and the issues that matter to them — and I’m committed to being a leader who delivers for those who call Texas home.
But a true grassroots campaign requires more than just a few thousand miles out on the road, Peter. It also requires steadfast support from folks like you.
That’s why I’m asking for your support tonight. If you’re able to chip in $5, $10, or more right now, I’d be so grateful. It’s going to take all of us working together to defeat Ted Cruz — and I need you on the team. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

clean_body: | | | Peter,to take back our Senate majority, we just need to flip TWO SEATS. And right now, all eyes are on Virginia. Our game plan is clear: CAPT Hung Cao is the ONLY candidate who can beat swamp creature Tim Kaine and help us take back the Senate. We won’t mince our words - if we’re going to win, we need your urgent support. Our team needs to reach EVERY voter in Virginia to set the record straight and show them our vision for a stronger commonwealth and a stronger country. Elections are expensive, and your contribution could help us reach that one voter who denies the race. Thank you, Team Cao | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Team – did you hear the news? Democrat Tom Suozzi won the special election in New York’s Third District – replacing George Santos with an honest, proven leader, flipping this seat from red-to-blue, **and bringing Democrats one step closer to taking back the House Majority. ** Last week’s result shows that from New York to Oregon, Democrats are fired up and building the grassroots energy we need to win in November. But we can’t afford to lose our momentum now. **The path back to a Democratic House Majority runs through Oregon** and starts with sending Andrea back to Congress. subject: Hopefully you’ll help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Hey.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c876014d2af943928e2f6854f57a7d0d&_e=8gz9thr4HEBGYQ6i1ylOoSJ8frZkkb-H5TM0429eJ9s_SYsG1tWath4_dfS-1RX3mR3WHttdZYe0ZgzXMGZmsD_4rsGPdsrn_JiR7ZKB5O14_paG4hhOuEn5cLsyL7d5gFxkylcqmeQHRN7tRxFW9sInmORuzOIFhL5ApV-q3co5J8ouIcr8g9LEUONl4wGfUWXqFBwlKOMPdJy6R8sXGRI_yzZyCdBVmupz5eTHa6bs5qmZ9ydKggSHWhuiiwvyaKj0zT19CXMaP-S2x89WTTzMaenObb7tAvXin9YCz5v45184snpGm7ngl4S2gxem)
---
Hey Peter...

**I hate to come to you with bad news, but you have to know.**

Our game-changing deadline ended just a few days ago and let me tell you, it wasn't good.

I pulled out all the stops - texting, emailing, begging - and we still failed.

Adam Frisch was able to send Boebert running scared because he’s been working hard – and because grassroots donors like you have chipped in to help him win.

name: THANK YOU JAMIE RASKIN! (via VPP)
subject: Sign the letter before your signature spot closes >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62303?t=6&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62303?t=7&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62303?t=8&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62303?t=9&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62303?t=10&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=13029%2E878179%2EAUbd6Y)

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: A better future is possible
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
But we must keep up our work to achieve it
#

Friends -
People are dying every day in America from preventable acts of gun violence.
It doesn’t have to be this way.
We don’t have to live in a country where we fear for our lives in what should be safe spaces in our communities—our grocery stores, our schools, our places of worship, and our parades.
[**We won’t rest until a future without gun violence is a reality in our country. Will you please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep moving forward in this important fight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240218-1-30&t=1&akid=7665%2E3935704%2EJKiOfl)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240218-1-30&t=2&akid=7665%2E3935704%2EJKiOfl)**
We understand that when a mass shooting happens, overcoming our nation’s gun violence epidemic may seem impossible.
But we need you to know that a better future is possible.
There is no one solution to solve the complex gun violence crisis in our nation. The status quo is not working— _inaction is not working_ —but we can change our course. We’ve taken important steps forward, but it’s not enough. That's why we have to keep working to enact a variety of laws—including popular measures like universal background checks.
[**So please. Contribute $3 to help us keep up the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240218-1-30&t=3&akid=7665%2E3935704%2EJKiOfl)

subject: I’m voting for Colin Allred on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Whether you can or can’t vote for Colin, your support makes a difference. |
---

| | | | Early voting in the Texas primary begins Tuesday, and I can’t wait to cast my vote for my friend Colin Allred. Here’s why I’m voting for Colin on Tuesday: Colin is liked and respected on both sides of the aisle. He shows up for his constituents. He connects with his colleagues. He works to find common ground and gets things done. Colin is an advocate for reproductive freedom, and he’s helped create good-paying jobs and lower prescription costs for Texans. And he’s a leader in the fight for voting rights to ensure equal access to the ballot box for all Americans. [_**Whether you can or can’t vote for Colin, you can help him win. Will you split a contribution between Colin’s campaign and mine before early voting begins on Tuesday?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79269183/455957550/1963720995?refcode=lpfe240218split-ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Zjk3NDQwNi05ZmNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_4RRC3yLq7nLCguEMWi-nvWxHXgI3ovOMfbeLmAtTA=) Colin has won tough races before. Please split any amount you can between his campaign and mine.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79269184/455957551/1963720995?refcode=lpfe240218split-ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Zjk3NDQwNi05ZmNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M_4RRC3yLq7nLCguEMWi-nvWxHXgI3ovOMfbeLmAtTA=) **P.S. name: Jenn Stowe
subject: Welcome to the care movement, Peter
body:
Everyone’s voice matters here
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79269785/455959044/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzRiMzY2Ni1hMWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6B_uB1w11kwSd_RAd2HRyFIS4U-YiI8wlG0g_UYgZd8=&emci=257c2223-feb3-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=274b3666-a1ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
I'm Jenn, Senior Advisor to Care in Action. First, I want to say thank you for making a caring future possible.
The same women who power our economy and care for our homes and families, often while caring for their own, lead this movement. They have bold, progressive ideas about how to make our country work better for working families, and they know how to win!
Even facing a global pandemic and deliberate attempts to block us from the ballot box, women of color voters make our voices heard and lead our movement to victories — not just in the presidential election, but in state and local elections across the country.
We supported Kamala Harris in her run to become the first Black, first South Asian, and first woman Vice President; won 70% of the state and local races where we endorsed women of color candidates; and elected Georgia’s first Black senator.
These history-making moments happened because everyone organized. Now it’s time to organize for better child and elder care policies, fair pay for essential work, and a government that will build a caring future. Jobs, communities, families, and futures are on the line. Join us in organizing!
**So I want to know — what brought you to this movement?**[Please take 30 seconds to fill out this survey and tell us what better care policies would mean for you. clean_body: Everyone’s voice matters here Hi Peter, I'm Jenn, Senior Advisor to Care in Action. First, I want to say thank you for making a caring future possible. The same women who power our economy and care for our homes and families, often while caring for their own, lead this movement. They have bold, progressive ideas about how to make our country work better for working families, and they know how to win! Even facing a global pandemic and deliberate attempts to block us from the ballot box, women of color voters make our voices heard and lead our movement to victories — not just in the presidential election, but in state and local elections across the country. We supported Kamala Harris in her run to become the first Black, first South Asian, and first woman Vice President; won 70% of the state and local races where we endorsed women of color candidates; and elected Georgia’s first Black senator. These history-making moments happened because everyone organized. Now it’s time to organize for better child and elder care policies, fair pay for essential work, and a government that will build a caring future. Jobs, communities, families, and futures are on the line. Join us in organizing! So I want to know — what brought you to this movement? Excited to work with you! Jenn Jenn Stowe Senior Advisor, Care in Action

name: Hirono HQ
subject: Mazie isn't a typical politician.
body:
|
#
Mazie isn't a typical politician, Peter. She didn’t get into politics for money, fame, or power. She didn’t come from wealth or status. English wasn’t even Mazie’s first language — she first arrived to the United States when she was 8 years old with her mother, who worked low-wage jobs with no health benefits to give her daughter a better life. **Mazie committed herself to this work because her mother’s perseverance inspired her to fight for justice and dignity for all people.** She fights every day for legislation that will lift children and families out of poverty, stave off the worst effects of climate change, and defend reproductive rights — critical Democratic priorities that deliver for the American people. She speaks out passionately against the extremism, bigotry, and hatred of MAGA Republicans. She’s not afraid to stand up to corporate greed. She will be the first to tell you that we must abolish the Jim Crow filibuster, reform the right-wing Supreme Court, and codify _Roe v. Wade._ That won’t always make you friendships in Washington, but like we said, Mazie isn’t in the Senate to cozy up to corporate interests or wealthy CEOs. **She’s there to fight for you.** **[With 23 Senate seats to defend this November, including Mazie’s, she’s counting on the support of this grassroots team to help her stay the course and protect this seat. Peter, will you chip in $5 or more today to ensure Mazie can continue fighting for our working families, our freedoms, and our future in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79269822/455959258/240141381?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjljMDY1ZS1hMWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jTb9WgeWW_Xo_SdFKQ6J3XdaxEloQoxIosBa1kmt8Dg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79269823/455959259/240141381?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjljMDY1ZS1hMWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jTb9WgeWW_Xo_SdFKQ6J3XdaxEloQoxIosBa1kmt8Dg=)******

name: American Update
subject: Biden Admin Leaned On Questionable And Misleading Science To Justify Halting Natural Gas Hub Approvals
body:
And ‘Everybody Is Afraid’: Biden Opioid Office Run By ‘Prima Donna’ Who Has Staffers Running For The Exits, Report Alleges

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684192%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OAI4qnc6I%2flxwJMtNT2eDg&sysid=1 Biden Admin Leaned On Questionable And Misleading Science To Justify Halting Natural Gas Hub Approvals

The Biden administration relied on questionable and misleading scientific material to support its decision to pause new approvals of liquefied natural gas (LNG) export terminals.

name: Representative Vikki Breese Iverson
subject: Representing real Oregonians - like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Vikki 20022
body:
| Representing Rural Oregonians, every day.
---
[View online version](https://026s4.mjt.lu/nl3/hjvIehriyLxweqvgtyspbA?m=AW4AADik_jQAAAAQLmoAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABl0ngGwBjqNR4cR_6i95NesEnkPwAasDI&b=3281f093&e=d9bca419&x=tfLWWkgYyQnikGdJV5PgPO7Do1p91l8ijm7Oi_gXjrQ)
---
| |
---
|
# **Oregon is not lost, just on the wrong track. We can fix this with some sound determination and hard work**
---
In the midst of session happening in Salem, it's made me think about where we are as a state. There is _some_ good things in Salem right now and some political stuff keeping us apart. _The better_ \- **Housing**. As Vice-Chair of the Housing Committee in the House we are able to work through the Governor's bill with her staff, industry, activists and other Democrat legislators. Many amendments later - we get SB1537 coming out of committee and heading to Ways and Means then to the full floors for a vote. This is a way better bill than HB2001 from the session last year, but it still lacks some real teeth for land coming into UGB's around the Metro Area and my friends in Bend and other fast growing communities who are simply 'out of land'. I won't dwell on the UGB expansion. There were some negotiations happening without me, but the Majority party with their environmentalist groups like 1000 friends and OCV to name a few. They settled on an acreage number. In rural Oregon we need more infrastructure improvements and tools available to us to build. Portland Metro area cities need land in their UGB's to keep costs down to build a home people want to live in. Bend for sure is feeling the land crunch.Oregon REALTORS did a statewide study and people want to live in a home, not an apartment, row house, ADU, etc. They want to own a home. These homes take land. Most of this building would take place in cities above 25,000 people around the state. You can read the [_full study here_](https://026s4.mjt.lu/lnk/AW4AADik_jQAAAAQLmoAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABl0ngGwBjqNR4cR_6i95NesEnkPwAasDI/1/nXlvd0VDE4qFx0sqYoI81g/aHR0cHM6Ly9vcmVnb25yZWFsdG9ycy5vcmcvc3RhdGV3aWRlLWhvdXNpbmctc3VydmV5Lw) , it is pretty fascinating information if you are into housing. I am proud of the work I and my colleagues put into this bill. It is not perfect, there is more to do, but we have to start somewhere. We need more work in the housing arena with the following things in 2025 session I will be working on; _Right to Farm_ \- homes are butting up to farm and ranch activities and we need to look at how this affects farmers and ranchers, _Home Production_ \- cutting more red tape, faster building permit turn around times, land swapping for developing, and first time home buyers incentives. _Water_ \- this is going to be key for areas of the state growing like Central Oregon. **The Ugly** \- Measure 110 reforms. I stand with my Republican colleagues who want full repeal or at a minimum some crime with teeth so our police officers and district attorney's can force repeat offenders into getting clean or jail. This is an ugly category because I don't think there is a compromise in which people win. There are many large forces on the left pushing for no criminalization of drugs and then many of us seeing the devastation of open drug use wanting hard sentences. Not really a middle ground to find here. I do know there is way to much discussion on the end drug user versus talking about the drug dealers and drugs flowing into Oregon from Mexico and other states. We need HARSH penalties for these drug criminals. House Republican Leader **Jeff Helfrich** is a former police officer, he knows what the system needs to compel people into treatment. I will follow his lead on this issue. **The bad** \- _SB 1583_ is attempting to politicize school libraries and curriculum AGAIN. This is just an attempt to take more control away from our school boards. I hope **Senate President Rob Wagner** just let's this die on the desk and not send it to a floor vote in the Senate. There already is safe guards in place with many school boards to ensure a process on books, curriculum and other material is "age appropriate". Let it die. Right to Repair - _SB 1596_ \- this is not a consumer protection bill. It strips companies of their ability to keep their secrets, well secret. It will force companies like Apple to give up technologies in their cell phones so generic products can be replaced with their products when it breaks. Like your screen or camera. I am all for consumer protection and opening things up, but I don't think this is the bill to do it._Run for office! _ I will leave it with campaigns. We had 60 House candidates on the Republican side for 60 House Seats. This was the first time in decades since we had every seat with a Republican candidate. This is not the case today. Find out what district your in and see if anyone has filed. If no one has, maybe you should. All the offices you can run for are [_right here_](https://026s4.mjt.lu/lnk/AW4AADik_jQAAAAQLmoAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABl0ngGwBjqNR4cR_6i95NesEnkPwAasDI/2/KZd1oXpDxvtcRlPTQ4lb0w/aHR0cHM6Ly9zb3Mub3JlZ29uLmdvdi9lbGVjdGlvbnMvUGFnZXMvcnVuZm9yb2ZmaWNlLmFzcHg). We really need someone to run for Secretary of State and Treasurer to go along with **Will Lathrop** running for Attorney General. Who is stepping up? In gratitude,
| **Vikki Breese-Iverson **
**Mom, Wife, Realtor and Rancher**
**Oregon State Representative for HD 59 **
---
14 states with Republicans across America stand with Texas. Oregon is one of them. Read the full story [_here_](https://026s4.mjt.lu/lnk/AW4AADik_jQAAAAQLmoAAC7a4LMAAAAATF0AAUT4ABvaFABl0ngGwBjqNR4cR_6i95NesEnkPwAasDI/3/Su_5wFQa3JNCH-UFb2BOTw/aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDI0LzAyLzEyL3JlcHVibGljYW4tbGVnaXNsYXRvcnMtaW4tdGhlc2UtMTQtc3RhdGVzLWFyZS1iYWNraW5nLXRleGFzLW92ZXItYmlkZW4tYm9yZGVyLXN0YW5kb2ZmLw).

clean_body: | Representing Rural Oregonians, every day. | | | Oregon is not lost, just on the wrong track. We can fix this with some sound determination and hard work In the midst of session happening in Salem, it's made me think about where we are as a state. There is some good things in Salem right now and some political stuff keeping us apart. The better \- Housing. As Vice-Chair of the Housing Committee in the House we are able to work through the Governor's bill with her staff, industry, activists and other Democrat legislators. Many amendments later - we get SB1537 coming out of committee and heading to Ways and Means then to the full floors for a vote. This is a way better bill than HB2001 from the session last year, but it still lacks some real teeth for land coming into UGB's around the Metro Area and my friends in Bend and other fast growing communities who are simply 'out of land'. I won't dwell on the UGB expansion. There were some negotiations happening without me, but the Majority party with their environmentalist groups like 1000 friends and OCV to name a few. They settled on an acreage number. In rural Oregon we need more infrastructure improvements and tools available to us to build. Portland Metro area cities need land in their UGB's to keep costs down to build a home people want to live in. Bend for sure is feeling the land crunch.Oregon REALTORS did a statewide study and people want to live in a home, not an apartment, row house, ADU, etc. They want to own a home. These homes take land. Most of this building would take place in cities above 25,000 people around the state. You can read the , it is pretty fascinating information if you are into housing. I am proud of the work I and my colleagues put into this bill. It is not perfect, there is more to do, but we have to start somewhere. We need more work in the housing arena with the following things in 2025 session I will be working on; Right to Farm \- homes are butting up to farm and ranch activities and we need to look at how this affects farmers and ranchers, Home Production \- cutting more red tape, faster building permit turn around times, land swapping for developing, and first time home buyers incentives. Water \- this is going to be key for areas of the state growing like Central Oregon. The Ugly \- Measure 110 reforms. I stand with my Republican colleagues who want full repeal or at a minimum some crime with teeth so our police officers and district attorney's can force repeat offenders into getting clean or jail. This is an ugly category because I don't think there is a compromise in which people win. There are many large forces on the left pushing for no criminalization of drugs and then many of us seeing the devastation of open drug use wanting hard sentences. Not really a middle ground to find here. I do know there is way to much discussion on the end drug user versus talking about the drug dealers and drugs flowing into Oregon from Mexico and other states. We need HARSH penalties for these drug criminals. House Republican Leader Jeff Helfrich is a former police officer, he knows what the system needs to compel people into treatment. I will follow his lead on this issue. The bad \- SB 1583 is attempting to politicize school libraries and curriculum AGAIN. This is just an attempt to take more control away from our school boards. I hope Senate President Rob Wagner just let's this die on the desk and not send it to a floor vote in the Senate. There already is safe guards in place with many school boards to ensure a process on books, curriculum and other material is "age appropriate". Let it die. Right to Repair - SB 1596 \- this is not a consumer protection bill. It strips companies of their ability to keep their secrets, well secret. It will force companies like Apple to give up technologies in their cell phones so generic products can be replaced with their products when it breaks. Like your screen or camera. I am all for consumer protection and opening things up, but I don't think this is the bill to do it.Run for office! I will leave it with campaigns. We had 60 House candidates on the Republican side for 60 House Seats. This was the first time in decades since we had every seat with a Republican candidate. This is not the case today. Find out what district your in and see if anyone has filed. If no one has, maybe you should. All the offices you can run for are . We really need someone to run for Secretary of State and Treasurer to go along with Will Lathrop running for Attorney General. Who is stepping up? In gratitude, | Vikki Breese-Iverson Mom, Wife, Realtor and Rancher Oregon State Representative for HD 59 14 states with Republicans across America stand with Texas. Oregon is one of them. Read the full story . | | | We added a bunch more signatures to our list of elected officials across Oregon who stand with Texas in their attempt to secure our Southern Border. I don't know why Democrats want open borders so drugs, terrorists and fighting age men come through at the clip of over 7000 a day? A nation must have a secure border to be a nation. | This e-mail has been sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. . Paid for by Friends of Vikki 20022 PO Box 249 97754 Prineville US

subject: This Week in Indiana's Black History...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah _
body:
Special Message from Haneefah Khaaliq on Indiana's Black History | | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq**
Former Candidate for U.S. Senate (Indiana)

**This week in Indiana’s Black History...**
**On February 18, 2022, during Black History Month, the first two African American women to run for the U.S. Senate in Indiana, Haneefah Khaaliq and Dr.****Valerie McCray, ****were removed from the ballot by Indiana Election Commission (IEC) members: Paul Okeson, Suzannah Wilson, Karen Horseman, and Litany Pyle. ** **The Commission refused to list their names on the ballot after the women’s signature counts were challenged by fellow Democrat, Attorney Scott Yahne of Valparaiso, IN. ****Yahne was a close friend and ally of Thomas McDermott, Jr., Mayor of Hammond, IN, who became the Democratic Nominee for the 2022 U.S. Senate race.**

**McDermott's campaign manager, Kevin Smith, in a statement to the Associated Press earlier that year, hinted that, like so many others, he would use Indiana's much-despised ****unconstitutional**** signature collection system as a weapon to clear the way for McDermott. In the end, the McDermott campaign was successful in removing what would've been great primary competition. **

**Shortly after ballot removal, ****[Khaaliq opened a private investigation](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=85020da980&e=a49cb82bb3)****into the IEC and discovered staff member, Matthew Kochevar, had been making campaign political contributions to her political opponent long before the hearing. Fair hearings cannot and should not be conducted by staff members who show pre-mature favoritism toward candidates. **

**To worsen matters, longtime IEC staff member and co-director, Angela Nussmeyer, gave Khaaliq just five (5) pages of evidence before the hearing. During the hearing, however, Ms. Nussmeyer presented an astounding 400 pages of evidence.

Although commission members knew Khaaliq had just been presented with the new pages of evidence, they allowed no additional time for review and voted to remove her from the ballot. ** **When Khaaliq sought an appeal from the decision, Nussmeyer improperly informed Khaaliq on where to file her appeal. Due to this, Khaaliq's case was ultimately dismissed, and unfortunately, she ****was never afforded an appeal from the IEC's decision to remove her from the 2022 ballot.

Despite this harsh treatment, Khaaliq fulfilled her promise to supporters and ultimately finished the senate race by filing to run as an Independent (Write-In) candidate in Indiana's general election. She only secured 148 votes, but in doing so, became the first African American to run for U.S. Senate in Indiana in a General Election.

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information. **
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=1a42083b52&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
I was a strong candidate in the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Indiana. Check out my documentary [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=38f723472e&e=a49cb82bb3)!
|
---
|
---
| **_First African American to Qualify to Run for U.S. Senate in Indiana!_**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=425ac5ff68&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Dr. Valerie McCray, the first African American to meet Indiana's ballot access laws to run in the primaries for the U.S. Senate. [Visit the official website of Dr. Valerie McCray for U.S. Senate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=3421191523&e=a49cb82bb3)!
| **In 2022, Dr. Valerie McCray was unfairly removed from the ballot by the Indiana Election Commission. This week, she became the first African American to meet Indiana's strict ballot access requirements to run in the primaries. No matter who you decide to support in the primaries, let's give a shout-out and round of applause to this brave woman for her persistence in continuing in her effort to bring significant change to Indiana. Every step counts! **
---
|
---
| _**First African American Woman
Files to Run for Governor in Indiana!**_
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=d6e157afee&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Tamie Dixon-Tatum of Anderson, IN, is a civil rights and human rights agency director and is well-known for her community activism. [Visit her website](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=84bddb826b&e=a49cb82bb3)!
| **This week, longtime Democrat from Anderson, IN, Dixon-Tatum became the first African American woman in Indiana's history to file to run for governor. Unfortunately, her candidacy is being challenged by a fellow Democrat, Kelly Whittman, Ph.D. of Speedway, IN. Whittman is a strong supporter of new Democrat, Jennifer McCormick for Governor. McCormick appointed Whittman to an executive position in the state house when she became superintendent years ago.**** **

**The Indiana Election Commission will decide whether or not to keep Dixon-Tatum on the ballot during its public meeting to be held at 10:00 a.m. EST on Tuesday, February 27, 2024, in Conference Room B at the Indiana Government Center located at South, 402 W. Washington Street, Indianapolis. I'm wishing Dixon-Tatum all the best for her efforts! **
---
|
---
| **_An Opinion on Filing Challenges Against Candidates by Haneefah Khaaliq_**
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=70ad30e62c&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
In 2022, [Khaaliq published a mini-documentary based on an investigation into the Indiana Election Commission](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=8f45b0e00c&e=a49cb82bb3) in which she shares how the system of removing candidates is unfair, unconstitutional, and suffers from extreme bias.
| **_An Opinion on Filing Challenges Against Candidates by Haneefah Khaaliq_**

**Dear Hoosiers, it is my conviction that competition is a sufficient and necessary condition for democracy to thrive in our country. Studies have shown that where competition exists, there's greater quality, more interest, more innovation, and politically, more drive for candidates to show why voters should vote for them. **

**Absent a truly egregious reason to eliminate a candidate, such as criminal activity...using an old, archaic process, such as Indiana's outdated signature collection system, prone to errors, to get rid of what would otherwise be good competition, is****senseless**** and cowardly.

In my book, no candidate who ever resorts to such low means to get rid of their opponent instead of facing them head-on ****will ever be a true winner or deserving of their desired political title. **
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=75492ce369&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
[Visit Indiana's voter registration site!
Check on your voter registration status now](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=ea0023933c&e=a49cb82bb3)!
**Primary Election Day: May 7, 2024
General Election Day: November 5, 2024**
| [Find Out More](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=bcbd895060&e=a49cb82bb3 "Find Out More")
---

---
| | [](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=756fe94caa&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
| | [](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=e3967a36dc&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
| | [](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=381c549849&e=a49cb82bb3)

National Republicans are propping our opponent up so much that he’s now headlining articles in the Associated Press. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Long story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I ran for office not to make history, but to make a difference.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2016%2E35263%2EpwTEkb)
Peter, can I tell you a longer story? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2016%2E35263%2EpwTEkb) Seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love — I came to realize that I could do both. I could run for office and be honest about who I am. **Thanks to the support of this incredible team, I was elected as the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.** I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. From lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place — **not to make history, but to make a difference.** And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. Now, as Republicans threaten to advance an extreme and hateful agenda, I'm asking you again: **[Will you help me continue to make a difference and fight back against those who want to take us back in time by pitching into my reelection campaign today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2016%2E35263%2EpwTEkb)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-feb24.LnIHXA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2016%2E35263%2EpwTEkb)

Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for equality. But Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for victory.
Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ+ youth. A Republican Senate majority threatens to do the same at the national level.
It’s going to take all of us to counter these right-wing attacks so everyone — even a kid like me — grows up knowing they belong and that kindness and inclusion, not hatred and division, are American values.
**[I’m committed to keeping up the fight as long as I can, and I’m hoping you’ll support our important work by chipping in any amount to my reelection campaign.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=2016%2E35263%2EpwTEkb)**
Thank you for your ongoing support. I’m grateful to have you with me in this fight.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: Tammy Murphy
subject: Before tonight’s debate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
Hi, I wanted to take a short break from prep to describe how much your support means to me. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79271042/455962645/1121826091?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQyMWJjYzMtYTljZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAKALFLwXbz5w8vFrD8eQoejulAEa610W6DlptjJf9E=&emci=ecb7f7e7-b8cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=6d21bcc3-a9ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451) Team — Before tonight’s debate, I wanted to take a short break from preparation to describe how much your support means to me. **Tonight, I’ll be fighting for and thinking of you.** I’ll be thinking of all the moms, nurses, doulas, and patient advocates I’ve met fighting injustice in our health care system. Together, we reduced New Jersey’s maternal death rate from 47th to 27th in the nation, and we’re not done making progress. _I can’t wait to share those stories._ I’ll be thinking of all the kids I’ve met while working to improve NJ schools and combat climate change. Every kid deserves safe classrooms, quality education, and to grow up with clean air and water. _I’m looking forward to sharing that message._ And I’ll be thinking of all the girls and young women who've told me they fear for their reproductive rights. A woman's health care choices should not be decided by politicians in Washington. _When I’m at the debate tonight, I’ll be fighting for my daughter and young women everywhere._ I have spent these last months traveling New Jersey to meet folks like you and hear what issues matter to you — what problems are in need of solution. At tonight’s debate, I hope to show you and New Jersey that there’s a way forward. If you’d like to support me today before the debate begins, here’s your personal link to donate: **[actblue.com/donate/tmnj-em-debatenight?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79271043/455962646/-1091503686?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmQyMWJjYzMtYTljZS1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fAKALFLwXbz5w8vFrD8eQoejulAEa610W6DlptjJf9E=)** I can’t thank you enough for your support, and I hope to make you proud. clean_body: Hi, I wanted to take a short break from prep to describe how much your support means to me. | Team — Before tonight’s debate, I wanted to take a short break from preparation to describe how much your support means to me. Tonight, I’ll be fighting for and thinking of you. I’ll be thinking of all the moms, nurses, doulas, and patient advocates I’ve met fighting injustice in our health care system. Together, we reduced New Jersey’s maternal death rate from 47th to 27th in the nation, and we’re not done making progress. I can’t wait to share those stories. I’ll be thinking of all the kids I’ve met while working to improve NJ schools and combat climate change. Every kid deserves safe classrooms, quality education, and to grow up with clean air and water. I’m looking forward to sharing that message. And I’ll be thinking of all the girls and young women who've told me they fear for their reproductive rights. A woman's health care choices should not be decided by politicians in Washington. When I’m at the debate tonight, I’ll be fighting for my daughter and young women everywhere. I have spent these last months traveling New Jersey to meet folks like you and hear what issues matter to you — what problems are in need of solution. At tonight’s debate, I hope to show you and New Jersey that there’s a way forward. If you’d like to support me today before the debate begins, here’s your personal link to donate: = I can’t thank you enough for your support, and I hope to make you proud. To tune in tonight, visit at 8 PM. Thank you, Tammy | | | Tammy is a mom of four, a leader in the fight against climate change, an advocate for women’s health, and the First Lady of New Jersey. Now, she’s running to represent us in the Senate. = | = Tammy Murphy for Senate PO Box 378 Maplewood, NJ 07040 United States mailto:info@tammymurphyforsenate.com | Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate

name: Bob Casey
subject: I mean it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2036%2E552475%2EZK7wxA)
Hi Peter,
When I say I’m proud of the team we are building together, I mean it. **We’re up against a wall of Republican money, and it’s folks like you who help us compete.**
This is not going to be an easy fight. We recently learned that a super PAC supporting my opponent received $10 million from a _single_ donor last quarter. What’s more, my opponent is already putting his own personal fortune behind his effort to defeat us.
[**The stakes this year couldn’t be higher, so I’m coming to you to ask: Can you chip in any amount to help power my re-election campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240218-2?refcode=em20240218-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2036_552475_ZK7wxA&akid=2036%2E552475%2EZK7wxA)
If we’re going to stand up to the money my opponent, out-of-state billionaires, and the national GOP are pouring into Pennsylvania, I need help from folks like you. Your support really does make a difference.
This race could decide our Senate majority.

clean_body: Hi Peter, When I say I’m proud of the team we are building together, I mean it. We’re up against a wall of Republican money, and it’s folks like you who help us compete. This is not going to be an easy fight. We recently learned that a super PAC supporting my opponent received $10 million from a single donor last quarter. What’s more, my opponent is already putting his own personal fortune behind his effort to defeat us. If we’re going to stand up to the money my opponent, out-of-state billionaires, and the national GOP are pouring into Pennsylvania, I need help from folks like you. Your support really does make a difference. This race could decide our Senate majority. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. I’m glad to have your support, Peter. With gratitude, Bob Casey

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Today, I make a promise
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I will never stop fighting until we pass voting rights legislation
Team—Fair and equal access to the ballot box is our nation’s bedrock principle and the foundation of all the progress we’ve made as a nation.

But since the gutting of the Voting Rights Act by the radical, far-right Supreme Court, Republican lawmakers across the country have been working nonstop to make it harder for Americans—especially Black and brown Americans—to vote.

They’re using every trick in the Jim Crow playbook to stop people from voting, from ID requirements to gerrymandering to shutting down voting centers in rural communities.

That’s why I got to work immediately when I was first sworn in to co-author legislation including the **John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** to protect our right to vote—legislation passed by the House when we had a Democratic majority.

Sadly, Republican obstruction and another Jim Crow relic—the Senate filibuster—blocked our efforts. Today, I promise you this: when I return to Congress, I won’t stop fighting until we pass comprehensive voting rights legislation and forever secure equal access to the ballot box. **Will you help me in the fight right now?**

[**Add your name to demand to join me in demanding Congress pass critical and urgent voting rights legislation now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79271521/455963811/821040254?ms=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zytCeTZdekis4LdASShosX8tVjUW05fJ+xALJeWVl86PLZjgEj5HnrDHtK64gcFYP7VvU7gUFDtXntiDKnzkfyX4FhXU1dwRNY09CPG+7WM=&refcode2=77e5f070-b1ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U1ZjA3MC1iMWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbxbzPjGQTT1TJlTsSGz1qFlevyCU5To1v7Obl3zm2I=&emci=9b3f97c5-f3ca-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=77e5f070-b1ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24719896)

The fact is, our democracy is in crisis. It faces its greatest test since Jim Crow.

Today’s Republican Party has completely abandoned democracy—instead choosing to side with the serially indicted former President, Donald Trump, who incited an insurrection and attempted to toss out the votes of Black and brown voters in places like Georgia, Arizona, and Pennsylvania.

Congressman Mike Lawler and his Republican colleagues went even further and elected Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House—the legal architect of House Republican efforts to overturn the election.

Our nation is at a turning point, but we’ve been here before. It’s time to dig deep and fight hard to get us through the wilderness with democracy still intact.

[**We can restore the Voting Rights Act, ban partisan gerrymandering, make Election Day a national holiday, enact automatic voter registration, and more—but we must act. Add your name to call on Congress to take up critical voting rights legislation now and save our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79271523/455963813/821040254?ms=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240217_Voting_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=zytCeTZdekis4LdASShosX8tVjUW05fJ+xALJeWVl86PLZjgEj5HnrDHtK64gcFYP7VvU7gUFDtXntiDKnzkfyX4FhXU1dwRNY09CPG+7WM=&refcode2=77e5f070-b1ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2U1ZjA3MC1iMWNlLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbxbzPjGQTT1TJlTsSGz1qFlevyCU5To1v7Obl3zm2I=&emci=9b3f97c5-f3ca-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=77e5f070-b1ce-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24719896)

clean_body: I will never stop fighting until we pass voting rights legislation Team—Fair and equal access to the ballot box is our nation’s bedrock principle and the foundation of all the progress we’ve made as a nation. But since the gutting of the Voting Rights Act by the radical, far-right Supreme Court, Republican lawmakers across the country have been working nonstop to make it harder for Americans—especially Black and brown Americans—to vote. They’re using every trick in the Jim Crow playbook to stop people from voting, from ID requirements to gerrymandering to shutting down voting centers in rural communities. That’s why I got to work immediately when I was first sworn in to co-author legislation including the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to protect our right to vote—legislation passed by the House when we had a Democratic majority. Sadly, Republican obstruction and another Jim Crow relic—the Senate filibuster—blocked our efforts. Today, I promise you this: when I return to Congress, I won’t stop fighting until we pass comprehensive voting rights legislation and forever secure equal access to the ballot box. Will you help me in the fight right now? The fact is, our democracy is in crisis. It faces its greatest test since Jim Crow. Today’s Republican Party has completely abandoned democracy—instead choosing to side with the serially indicted former President, Donald Trump, who incited an insurrection and attempted to toss out the votes of Black and brown voters in places like Georgia, Arizona, and Pennsylvania. Congressman Mike Lawler and his Republican colleagues went even further and elected Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House—the legal architect of House Republican efforts to overturn the election. Our nation is at a turning point, but we’ve been here before. It’s time to dig deep and fight hard to get us through the wilderness with democracy still intact. I will not rest until it’s done. Mondaire | Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

**TODAY'S HEADLINE**
---
Friday's Fani Willis hearing was not as dramatic as Thursday's because Willis decided not to take the stand on Friday at the last moment. However, Willis's father, John Floyd, a member of the radical Black Panthers, provided many fireworks during his testimony, which led to many questions. One colossal question arose when Floyd stated that he lived in South Africa until 2019. South Africa is one of China's biggest allies. Floyd later said that he knew in 2019 that COVID-19 would become a pandemic in 2020. Floyd, like his daughter Fani, had a short temper and used "racism" as reasoning to avoid answering critical questions...

body:
We've got exciting news about upcoming events and rallies and a special message from RFK Jr. you won't want to miss.

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=1)
---
|
---
Upcoming Events: An Exclusive Invitation to a Memorable Experience!
Don't miss out on an opportunity to embark on an extraordinary journey with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and connect with our future President. [RSVP now!](https://www.kennedy24.com/events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=2)
|
* * *
---
[Los Angeles, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/night-of-laughter-la?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=3) \- Wednesday, February 21st at 7:30 PM
Experience an unforgettable evening of laughter as Cheryl Hines hosts _A Night of Laughter with RFK, Jr._ Secure your tickets now to enjoy performances by Tim Dillon, Rob Schneider, and more!
[**Online Event**](https://www.kennedy24.com/february-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=4) \- Friday, February 23rd at 5:00 PM
You’re invited to an unforgettable virtual experience featuring Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. alongside Angela Stanton-King for an engaging fireside chat, providing insights into RFK, Jr.'s "Vision for the Future of our Nation."
[Newport Beach, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/newport-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=5) \- Saturday, February 24th at 7:30 PM
Join us at a private venue in the heart of Newport Beach for a special event. Experience an intimate Q&A session with RFK, Jr. while enjoying hors d'oeuvres, cocktails, and memorable photo opportunities.
[Folkston, Georgia](https://www.kennedy24.com/folkston-ga-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=6) \- Thursday, February 29th at 5:00 PM
This one-of-a-kind event features a Farm to Table Dinner & Mule Ride with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. Support his candidacy while enjoying a unique experience and delicious cuisine in friendly Folkston, Georgia.
[Las Vegas, Nevada](https://www.kennedy24.com/march-las-vegas-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=7) \- Friday, March 8th at 6:00 PM
Please join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austin-private-dinner?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=8) \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM
Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers.
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/american-wellness-summit?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=9) \- Saturday, March 16th at 9:00 AM
Experience a day of wellness, inspiration, live musical performances, biohacking, and exclusive time with Mr. Kennedy while supporting his candidacy for President of the United States.
|
* * *
---
RFK Jr.: Stop The Crisis
The crisis at the border is unsustainable.
The body bags keep piling up. Drugs and human trafficking run rampant. Our cities and towns are overrun and strained to the max. The number of illegal migrants in the United States has roughly doubled under President Biden. Under his watch, the number of people taken into custody by the U.S. Border Patrol has reached an average of 2 million per year—the highest levels in the agency’s 100-year history.
President Biden continues to play chicken with our lives and refuses to use executive authority to secure the border. In fact, he walked back many of the restrictions that were keeping the crisis under control before he took office.
This is a deliberate political move. Biden has held office for 50 years; he’s playing dumb when pretends he doesn’t know what to do. And he’s playing politics when he ties border security to overseas war funding.
Enough is enough.
[Sign the petition](https://www.kennedy24.com/border-petition?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=10) **demanding President Biden secure the border.**
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/border-crisis-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_2_18_24_e2&n=11)

Kennedy, Jr. and Cheryl Hines at this in-person fundraising event which includes hors d’ oeuvres and cocktails, remarks from the candidate, Q&A, and a photo opportunity. \- Friday, March 15th at 6:30 PM Along with a very special dinner with RFK, Jr., this exclusive gathering includes business leaders, entrepreneurs, leading podcast hosts, media personalities, celebrities, and industry influencers. \- Saturday, March 16th at 9:00 AM Experience a day of wellness, inspiration, live musical performances, biohacking, and exclusive time with Mr. Kennedy while supporting his candidacy for President of the United States. | RFK Jr.: Stop The Crisis The crisis at the border is unsustainable. The body bags keep piling up. Drugs and human trafficking run rampant. Our cities and towns are overrun and strained to the max. The number of illegal migrants in the United States has roughly doubled under President Biden. Under his watch, the number of people taken into custody by the U.S. Border Patrol has reached an average of 2 million per year—the highest levels in the agency’s 100-year history. President Biden continues to play chicken with our lives and refuses to use executive authority to secure the border. In fact, he walked back many of the restrictions that were keeping the crisis under control before he took office. This is a deliberate political move. Biden has held office for 50 years; he’s playing dumb when pretends he doesn’t know what to do. And he’s playing politics when he ties border security to overseas war funding. Enough is enough. demanding President Biden secure the border. | | Discover our latest , suitable for any occasion. Delve into the unique appeal of limited edition items that reflect the essence of this historic campaign. Immerse yourself in the spirit of change and progress, and join a movement that holds the power to shape the future. Thank you for your continued support. Every dollar you give moves us one step closer to the White House. | * | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.
