name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter, **Donald Trump just attacked me directly and accused California of voter fraud** in our U.S. Senate race.

**With Californians voting _right now,_ there is NO WAY we can allow Trump’s election disinformation to influence the outcome of this election in the final days of this primary.**

[I’ll share what he posted to his social media platform in a moment, but first, can you rush a split donation of any amount to Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help us respond to this unhinged Trump attack? We CANNOT allow this claim to go unanswered. Not today, Peter.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272101/455965697/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=)
| [DONATE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272104/455965699/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=)
---

After calling me a “slimeball,” “low life,” “shifty,” and more, he then tried to cast doubt on California’s primary election if I win, in an ALL CAPS social media rant.

With none more damaging than this: _**“SADLY, BETWEEN RANK ‘NO CHOICE’ VOTING, AND ‘UNLIMITED’ NUMBERS OF MAIL-IN BALLOTS POURING INTO PLACES UNKNOWN, TO PEOPLE THAT SOMETIMES RECEIVE MANY BALLOTS TO FILL OUT AND SEND BACK AT WILL, CALIFORNIANS ARE ‘SCREWED!’”**_

**Here are the facts:** California’s mail-in ballots are not “unlimited” — they are limited to one for every registered California voter. Every ballot has a known destination — its assigned voter’s address on their voter registration. Every registered voter can only vote once (but on every ballot this year, the California U.S. Senate seat appears TWICE). Every ballot must be postmarked by Election Day. And Trump is just spewing lies about there being ranked-choice voting.

**But Peter, Trump’s allies in the far-right media, aren't going to share the facts.**

They’re going to share his words across the right-wing ecosystem. His MAGA followers will spread his lies far and wide, reaching huge swathes of California’s 22 million registered voters. Their online obscenities and attacks against me, as well as written and verbal threats to our offices, will increase exponentially.

And like the disinformation he sowed that led to the Capitol insurrection, Trump will attempt to create a new reality for millions of California voters **— and if I win, paint my election as illegitimate.**

[I told you more attacks were coming after Monday’s debate, and they’re officially here. Trump is using the same con he has for years — attacking me personally and undermining confidence in election integrity. It’s clear there is no candidate he fears more from being elected than me, and for good reason. Chip in a split donation of $15 between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help me win this race and hold Trump and his allies accountable. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272106/455965702/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below._ [DONATE $5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272108/455965704/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=) [DONATE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272110/455965706/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272112/455965708/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79272114/455965710/1889252675?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240218_1_1&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlYjVlMTg5LWIzY2UtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=10M93NnWKmha_SnHWvjJcHiyDTBY8jPejOV8RKA_Xyc=)
---

There are 16 days left in this election, and it’s going to take a surge in grassroots support to ensure we have the resources to respond to these lies and reach undecided voters.

Thanks for anything you can spare in support.

— Adam

body:
| | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KMNmXtxKVqeG7gPLBY_XZpT4XwIC0EXMhJgC_Pg0-Wv82rw_cSV73LXag2HiwmFqcqvuajs671PseuW1TdidPZGYy2rf4owMKLAGyyIb4dQVMuojSLlFb08Qe4Zy9IHi0aAj_QTs_4K5h8DqoDS3KXss6C4n24uJQEHxSrzWt0d4a-gHMgnW3kvziw93ax1mcmKCl5QCk2HMW_ttCeVe54-2UpKXbO6WsFQ5QoJKPjSMLts0Bs9aGAHqg-RnOiAEs3jJIImipxYP1VZWseCTPPCa9n6rsdo6CZ4G69w9motbYp02ieMZMwkG-smsyTD6zAOtMrPQUdkSYo-uoeDsSRt-jy4CJqQ2ppcKIpoxOSQp6r8sMqYHn_lyWiHyOC3q4M/43y/yWT6SHEtTcOUmjlZGqaztA/h0/OSoZh5GOSw-mJSztLrA8hoVtqE-t-bCdf5vO8rlzzBY)
I’m proud to be endorsed by the Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund as I run to represent one of America’s national treasures: Joshua Tree National Park, and the natural beauty of California’s High Desert.
MAGA Republicans like my opponent, funded by polluters and the fossil fuel industry, are fighting to protect profits at the expense of our planet.
They voted for devastating cuts to the National Park Service and the Environmental Protection Agency.
**In Congress, I’ll fight for climate justice.** I’ll support a halt on new fossil fuel development as we decarbonize our economy, work to expand mass transit and electric vehicles, and defend our national parks.
**[I need your help to defeat oil and gas money, and flip CA-23. clean_body: | | | I’m proud to be endorsed by the Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund as I run to represent one of America’s national treasures: Joshua Tree National Park, and the natural beauty of California’s High Desert. MAGA Republicans like my opponent, funded by polluters and the fossil fuel industry, are fighting to protect profits at the expense of our planet. They voted for devastating cuts to the National Park Service and the Environmental Protection Agency. In Congress, I’ll fight for climate justice. I’ll support a halt on new fossil fuel development as we decarbonize our economy, work to expand mass transit and electric vehicles, and defend our national parks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Derek is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . name: Tony Evers
subject: All eyes are on Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

The polls have shown that Wisconsin is expected to be the closest state in
the country in 2024. With so much on the line, including our essential
rights and our democracy, our mission is clear.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2231?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.4&t=1001&akid=6608%2E1827488%2EwfQ3dW ]Before I tell you why this is important, and how we can fight back, can
I count on you to rush a donation here to help us close our mid month
fundraising goal before the deadline? Your support is crucial, now more
than ever.

MAGA Republicans, led by the likely Republican nominee Donald Trump,
aren’t even trying to hide their attempts to end fair elections and
abortion access nationwide. Trump is still lying about the outcome of the
2020 election, and across the country, extremist Republicans are pushing
for restrictive abortion bans.

We’re witnessing threats to our democracy and we must fight back. There is
zero margin for error in Wisconsin, where in 2020, we narrowly avoided
another Trump administration.

The stakes could not be higher,
Derek: whoever wins Wisconsin
will likely win the Presidency.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2231?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.4&t=1002&akid=6608%2E1827488%2EwfQ3dW ]That’s why we can’t afford to fall behind now in order to push through
just as we did in 2020. Help us save American democracy and preserve our
rights before it’s too late by rushing a donation here.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2232?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_Feb2024_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.4&t=1003&akid=6608%2E1827488%2EwfQ3dW ]Donate $10 Now

name: Biden Poll
subject: Your President Biden Rating —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | We're conducting a nationwide poll of top Democrats to verify strong support for President Biden before the next election -- and we've selected you to represent Pennsylvania. ****Please answer to the best of your ability and do not include input from others.****

Thank you for participating,

Team DSCC

name: Jon Tester
subject: URGENT: A new GOP opponent has jumped into the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is a turning point in our race
| | **BREAKING NEWS: Another GOP opponent has launched his campaign to defeat Jon Tester and flip Montana’s Senate seat**

[**Rush a split donation to help us build the resources we need to fight off the GOP’s attacks, defend Montana’s Senate seat, and hold the Democratic Senate majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62292?t=6&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62292?t=7&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI)
---
Folks,

Last week, another GOP opponent threw his hat in the ring against me for Montana’s U.S. Senate seat. **Experts are saying Montana is a complete toss-up so we have to act ASAP.**

This is a critical turning point in our race and we’re about to see a flood of outside money and attacks rush into Montana. You can bet far-right groups will spend unprecedented amounts to attack me and mislead voters.

**Mitch McConnell knows Montana is his best shot at taking back the gavel so we need to raise an emergency $1,000,000 this week to fight back ASAP. Outside groups will stop at nothing to defeat me and retake the gavel.**

[**With so much on the line, we cannot afford to lose. Rush a split donation between VPP and my campaign to help us raise the funds we need to beat my GOP opponents and protect this seat.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62292?t=8&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62293?t=9&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62297?t=13&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI)
There has never been a more important time for you to step up than right now.

— Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13025%2E878179%2EWUfUqI).**

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Save health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump's first term was so disastrous and so chaotic that many people have forgotten or haven't thought about some of the most terrible moments in some time. | | |
---
Peter -- Want to know something wild? Donald Trump's first term was so disastrous and so chaotic that many people have forgotten or haven't thought about some of the most terrible moments in some time. Remember how close he was to ending the _Affordable Care Act_ and ripping away health care from millions of Americans? Like, really... remember it? Remember when Senator McCain shocked everyone with his "Thumbs Down" and saved health care? Remember those days and hours where it looked like the _Affordable Care Act_ was doomed? Make absolutely ZERO mistake about it. Trump will do it again if he gets a chance. So yes, this campaign is about saving abortion access. Yes, it's about defending our democracy. Yes, it's about an economy that works for everyone and not just the richest Americans. But very specifically -- it's also about protecting health care for millions of Americans. So today, we are asking you to make a donation to save health care. Maybe it's for you. Maybe it's for a loved one. Maybe it's for someone you've never met and never will. But there's only one way we'll defeat Trump, and that's if everyone is chipping in what they can when they can. So what do you say? clean_body: Donald Trump's first term was so disastrous and so chaotic that many people have forgotten or haven't thought about some of the most terrible moments in some time. | | | Peter -- Want to know something wild? Donald Trump's first term was so disastrous and so chaotic that many people have forgotten or haven't thought about some of the most terrible moments in some time. Remember how close he was to ending the Affordable Care Act and ripping away health care from millions of Americans? Like, really... remember it? Remember when Senator McCain shocked everyone with his "Thumbs Down" and saved health care? Remember those days and hours where it looked like the Affordable Care Act was doomed? Make absolutely ZERO mistake about it. Trump will do it again if he gets a chance. So yes, this campaign is about saving abortion access. Yes, it's about defending our democracy. Yes, it's about an economy that works for everyone and not just the richest Americans. But very specifically -- it's also about protecting health care for millions of Americans. So today, we are asking you to make a donation to save health care. Maybe it's for you. Maybe it's for a loved one. Maybe it's for someone you've never met and never will. But there's only one way we'll defeat Trump, and that's if everyone is chipping in what they can when they can. So what do you say? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We're so thankful to be in this together. It's our only chance. Team Joe
